Matthew19:24 Kananjalo ke ndithi kuni, Kulula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukaThixo." 
Matthew19:25 Bakuva ke abafundi bakhe, bakhwankqiswa kakhulu, besithi, Ngubani na ke ongasindiswayo?" 
Matthew19:26 Ondele ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Kubantu le nto ayinakwenzeka;ke kuye uThixo zonke izinto zinako ukwenzeka." 
Matthew19:27 Waphendula uPetros wathi kuye, Uyabona, thina sishiye iinto zonke sakulandela; siya kuba nantoni na ke?" 
Matthew19:28 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Inene, ndithi kuni, Nina nindilandeleyo, ekuzalweni okutsha, xa athe wahlala uNyana woMntu phezu kwetrone yozuko lwakhe, niya kuhlala nani phezu kweetrone ezilishumi elinambini, nigweba ezizweni ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Umntu wonke oshiye izindlu, nokuba ngabazalwana, nokuba ngoodade, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngunina, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yegama lam, uya kwamkela kalikhulu, abudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade." 
Matthew19:30 Ke baninzi abokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela, nabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala." 
Matthew20:1 Kuba ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nomntu ongumninindlu, owaphuma ekuseni, waya kuqesha abasebenzi bokuya esidiliyeni sakhe." 
Matthew20:2 Akuvumelana nabasebenzi ngedenariyo ngemini, wabathuma esidiliyeni sakhe." 
Matthew20:3 Ephume malunga nelixa lesithathu wabona abanye bemi endaweni yembutho bengasebenzi. 
Matthew20:4 Wathi nakwabo, Hambani nani niye esidiliyeni, ndoninika okusukuba kufanelekile. Bahamba ke baya." 
Matthew20:5 Wabuya waphuma malunga nelixa lesithandathu nelesithoba, wenza kwangokunjalo." 
Matthew20:6 Ephumile ke malunga nelixa leshumi elinanye, wafumana abanye bemi bengasebenzi; athi kubo, Yini na ukuba nime apha imini iphela ningasebenzi?" 
Matthew20:7 Bathi kuye, Akukho bani usiqeshileyo. Athi kubo, Hambani nani niye esidiliyeni; niya kwamkela okusukuba kufanelekile." 
Matthew20:8 Kwakuhlwa, uthi umninisidiliya egoseni lakhe, Babize abasebenzi, ubamkelise, uqala kwabokugqibela ude uye kwabokuqala." 
Matthew20:9 Bezile abo bebeqeshwe malunga nelixa leshumi elinanye, bamkela elowo idenariyo." 
Matthew20:10 Ke kaloku bakuza abokuqala, baba baya kwamkela into engaphezulu; nabo bamkela elowo idenariyo." 
Matthew20:11 Beyamkele ke, bamrokrela umninindlu," 
Matthew20:12 besithi, Aba bokugqibela basebenze ilixa lalinye, usuke wabalinganisa nathi, thina sithwele ubunzima nobushushu bemini." 
Matthew20:13 Waphendula ke yena wathi komnye wabo, Wethu, andikoni;ubungavumelananga nam ngedenariyo yini na?" 
Matthew20:14 Thabatha okwakho uhambe; ndithanda ukumnika lowo wokugqibela kwanjengoko ndikunike ngako. 
Matthew20:15 Akuvumelekile na ukuba ndenze endikuthandayo ngokukokwam?Iliso lakho likhohlakele na, ngokuba ndilungile mna?" 
Matthew20:16 Ngokunjalo abokugqibela baya kuba ngabokuqala, nabokuqala, baya kuba ngabokugqibela; kuba baninzi ababiziweyo, ke bambalwa abanyuliweyo." 
Matthew20:17 Ke kaloku enyuka uYesu esiya eYerusalem, wabathabatha abafundi abalishumi elinababini babodwa endleleni, wathi kubo," 
Matthew20:18 Niyabona, siyenyuka siya eYerusalem, waye uNyana woMntu eya kunikelwa kubo ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali. Baya kumgweba ukuba afe," 
Matthew20:19 bamnikele kuzo iintlanga ukuba zidlale ngaye, zimtyakatye, zimbethelele emnqamlezweni, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke." 
Matthew20:20 Ngelo xesha kweza kuye unina woonyana bakaZebhedi, enoonyana bakhe, equbuda, ecela into kuye." 
Matthew20:21 Wathi ke yena kuye, Uthanda ntoni na? Athi kuye, Yitsho baze aba nyana bam bobabini bahlale, omnye ngasekunene kwakho, omnye ngasekhohlo, ebukumkanini bakho." 
Matthew20:22 Uphendule ke uYesu wathi, Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ninako na ukuyisela indebe endiza kuyisela mna, nibhaptizwe ngobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna? Bathi kuye, Sinako." 
Matthew20:23 Athi kubo. Okunene indebe yam niya kuyisela, nobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna niya kubhaptizwa kwangalo; kodwa kona ukuhlala ngasekunene kum, nangasekhohlo kum, asikwam ukupha ngako; kophiwa abo kulungiselwe bona nguBawo." 
Matthew20:24 Bekuvile ke oko abalishumi, babacaphukela abo bazalwana bobabini." 
Matthew20:25 Ke kaloku uYesu, ebabizele kuye, wathi, Niyazi ukuba abaphathi beentlanga bayazigagamela, nabo bazizikhulu benza ngegunya kuzo." 
Matthew20:26 Ze kungabi njalo ke phakathi kwenu nina; osukuba enga angaba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu;" 
Matthew20:27 nosukuba enga angaba ngowokuqala phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumkonzi wenu;" 
Matthew20:28 kwanjengokuba uNyana woMntu engezanga kulungiselelwa; weza kulungiselela, nokuncama ubomi bakhe, bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi." 
Matthew20:29 Bakubon ukuba bayaphuma eYeriko, walandelwa yindimbane enkulu." 
Matthew20:30 Nanko kuhleli iimfama zimbini ngasendleleni; zathi, zakuva ukuba kudlula uYesu, zadanduluka, zisithi, Senzele inceba, Nkosi, nyana kaDavide." 
Matthew20:31 Ke kaloku indimbane yazikhalimela ukuba zithi tu; kwaba kukhona ke zidandulukayo, zisithi, Senzele inceba, Nkosi, nyana kaDavide." 
Matthew20:32 Wema uYesu, wazibiza wathi, Ninga ndinganenzela ntoni na?" 
Matthew20:33 Zithi kuye, Nkosi, ukuba kuvulwe amehlo ethu." 
Matthew20:34 Wasikwa ke yimfesane uYesu, wawachukumisa amehlo azo; zaba nokubona kwaoko ngamehlo azo, zamlandela." 
Matthew21:1 Kuthe, xa babesondele eYerusalem, befikile eBhetefage, kwiNtaba yemiNquma, uYesu wesusa abafundi bababini," 
Matthew21:2 esithi kubo, Yiyani emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani; kwaoko nofumana iesile libotshelelwe linethole, likhululeni nilizise kum." 
Matthew21:3 Nokuba kukho othe wathetha into kuni, nothi, Ayafuneka eNkosini; wothi ke awathumele kwaoko." 
Matthew21:4 Ke kaloku oku konke kwenzeke, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngomprofeti, esithi," 
Matthew21:5 Yithini kwintombi uZiyon, Yabona, uKumkani wakho uza kuwe, Enobulali, ekhwele e-esileni, ilithole ke, Inkonyana yento ebotshwayo." 
Matthew21:6 Baya ke abafundi, benza ngoko wayebamisele ngako uYesu," 
Matthew21:7 balizisa iesile nethole, babeka iingubo zabo phezu kwawo, bamhlalisa phezu kwazo." 
Matthew21:8 Yathi ke inkoliso yezihlwele yazandlala iingubo zayo endleleni; baye abanye bexhuzula amasebe emithini, bewandlala endleleni." 
Matthew21:9 Zaye ke izihlwele, ebezihamba ngaphambili nebezilandela, zidanduluka, zisithi, Hosana kuye unyana kaDavide! Makabongwe lo uzayo egameni leNkosi! Hosana enyangweni!" 
Matthew21:10 Akungena eYerusalem, wonke umzi wazamazama, usithi, Ngubani na lo?" 
Matthew21:11 Bathi ke abantu, Lo nguYesu, umprofeti ongowaseNazarete yelaseGalili." 
Matthew21:12 Wangena uYesu etempileni kaThixo, wabakhupha bonke ababethengisa nababethenga etempileni, wazibhukuqa iitafile zabananisi bemali, nezihlalo zabathengisa ngamahobe;" 
Matthew21:13 athi kubo, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu yokuthandaza; ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange." 
Matthew21:14 Kweza kuye iimfama neziqhwala, etempileni apho, waziphilisa." 
Matthew21:15 Bathe ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, bakuyibona imimangaliso awayenzayo, kwanabantwana bedanduluka etempileni, besithi, Hosana kuye unyana kaDavide: basuka bacaphuka," 
Matthew21:16 bathi kuye, Uyayiva na into abayithethayo aba? Athi ke uYesu kubo, Ewe; anizanga nikulese na ukuthi, Emlonyeni weentsana nabanyayo ulungiselele udumiso?" 
Matthew21:17 Wabashiya, waphumela ngaphandle komzi, waya eBhetani, walala khona." 
Matthew21:18 Uthe ke kwakusa, xa abuyela kuwo umzi, walamba." 
Matthew21:19 Wathi, ebone mkhiwane uthile ngasendleleni, waya kuwo, akafumana nto kuwo, yangamagqabi odwa; athi kuwo, Makungaze kuvele siqhamo kuwe naphakade. Wasuka woma kwaoko umkhiwane lowo." 
Matthew21:20 Bakukubona oko abafundi, bamangaliswa, besithi, Utheni na ukoma msinya kangakanana umkhiwane?" 
Matthew21:21 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Inene, ndithi kuni, ukuba nithe nanokholo, anathandabuza, anisayi kwenza le nto yomkhiwane yodwa; kosuka, nokuba nithe kule ntaba, Thabatheka uphoseke elwandle, kwenzeke." 
Matthew21:22 Neento zonke enithe nazicela ekuthandazeni nikholwa, nozamkela." 
Matthew21:23 Kuthe akungena etempileni, xa afundisayo, beza kuye ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu, besithi, Ezi zinto uzenza ngagunya lini na? Kananjalo ngubani na okunike eli gunya?" 
Matthew21:24 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kubuza kuni zwi-nye; endothi, ukuba nithe nandixelela lona, ndinixelele nam ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto:" 
Matthew21:25 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma phi na, emazulwini, ebantwini, sini na? Bacamanga ke bodwa, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaphuma emazulwini, wothi kuthi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?" 
Matthew21:26 Ukuba ke sithe, Lwaphuma ebantwini, soyika abantu; kuba bonke bebambe ukuthi uYohane ungumprofeti." 
Matthew21:27 Bamphendula uYesu bathi, Asazi. Wathi naye kubo, Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Matthew21:28 Nithini na ke nina? Umntu wayenabantwana ababini; weza kowokuqala wathi, Mntwana wam, yiya kusebenza namhla esidiliyeni sam." 
Matthew21:29 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Andiyi; ke wabuya wazohlwaya, waya." 
Matthew21:30 Weza nakowesibini, wathetha kwangokunjalo. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndiyaya, nkosi; akaya." 
Matthew21:31 Nguwuphi na kwabo bobabini owenza ukuthanda kukayise?Bathi kuye, Ngowokuqala. Athi kubo uYesu, Inene ndithi kuni, Bayaniphangela ke ukungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo ababuthi berhafu namahenyukazi." 
Matthew21:32 Ngokuba uYohane weza kuni ngendlela yobulungisa, anakholwa nguye; kodwa bakholwa nguye bona ababuthi berhafu namahenyukazi; ke nina, nakukubona oko, anibuyanga nizohlwaye, ukuze nikholwe nguye." 
Matthew21:33 Yivani omnye umzekeliso. Bekukho umninindlu othile owatyala isidiliya, wasibiyela ngothango, wemba kuso isixovulelo seediliya, wakha inyango, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye." 
Matthew21:34 Kuthe ke lakusondela ixesha leziqhamo, wathuma abakhonzi bakhe kubalimi abo, ukuya kwamkela iziqhamo zaso." 
Matthew21:35 Besuka abalimi babathabatha abakhonzi bakhe, bathi omnye bamtyabula, omnye bambulala, nomnye bamgibisela ngamatye." 
Matthew21:36 Wabuya wathuma abanye abakhonzi, bebaninzi kunabokuqala, benjenjalo nakubo." 
Matthew21:37 Uthe ke kamva wathuma kubo unyana wakhe, esithi, Baya kumhlonela yena unyana wam." 
Matthew21:38 Bathe ke bakumbona unyana abalimi, batshono ukuthi, Lo yindlalifa; yizani simbulale, sihlale nelifa lakhe." 
Matthew21:39 Bamthabatha, bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya, bambulala." 
Matthew21:40 Xa athe weza ngoko umninisidiliya, uya kwenza ntoni na kwabo balimi?" 
Matthew21:41 Bathi kuye, uya kubatshabalalisa kakubi abangendawo abo, aze isidiliya eso aqeshise ngaso kubalimi bambi, abomamkelisa iziqhamo ngamaxesha azo." 
Matthew21:42 Athi kubo uYesu, Anizanga nilese na ezibhalweni ukuthi, Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo;Kwavela eNkosini oku, Kungummangaliso emehlweni ethu?" 
Matthew21:43 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni, Ubukumkani bukaThixo buya kususwa kuni, bunikwe uhlanga oluzivelisayo iziqhamo zabo." 
Matthew21:44 Kanjalo lowo uwe phezu kweli litye uya kutyumka, ke lowo lithe lamwela liya kumcola." 
Matthew21:45 Bathi ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi, bakuyiva imizekeliso yakhe, baqonda ukuba uthetha ngabo." 
Matthew21:46 Bathi befuna ukumbamba, boyika abantu, ekubeni ke babebambe ukuthi ungumprofeti." 
Matthew22:1 Waphendula uYesu, wabuya wathetha kubo ngemizekeliso, esithi," 
Matthew22:2 Ubukumkani bamazulu bufanekiswa nomntu ongukumkani, owamenzela umsitho unyana wakhe." 
Matthew22:3 Wesusa abakhonzi bakhe ukuba baye kubabiza abamenyiweyo, beze emsithweni; basuka abavuma ukuza." 
Matthew22:4 Wabuya wesusa abanye abakhonzi, esithi, Yitshoni kwabamenyiweyo ukuthi, Yabonani, isidlo sam sendisilungisile;iinkomo zam neento zam ezityetyisiweyo zixheliwe, konke sekulungile; yizani emsithweni." 
Matthew22:5 Abakhathalanga ke bona; basuka bemka, omnye waya kweyakhe intsimi, omnye waya ekurhwebeni kwakhe." 
Matthew22:6 Bathi ke abaseleyo bababamba abakhonzi bakhe, babaphatha kakubi, bababulala." 
Matthew22:7 Evile ke ukumkani, waqumba, wayikhupha imikhosi yakhe, wabatshabalalisa abo babulali, wawutshisa nomzi wabo." 
Matthew22:8 Aze athi kubakhonzi bakhe, Umsitho okunene sewulungile wona, kodwa abamenyiweyo bebengafanelekile." 
Matthew22:9 Yiyani ngoko ezintlanganweni zeendlela, nithi abo nithe nabafumana, nibabize beze emsithweni." 
Matthew22:10 Baphuma abo bakhonzi baya ezindleleni, bahlanganisa bonke ababafumanayo, abakhohlakeleyo kwanabalungileyo; wazala umsitho ngabamenyiweyo." 
Matthew22:11 Ke kaloku akungena ukumkani, eza kukhangela abamenyiweyo, wabona apho umntu ongambethe ngubo yamsitho." 
Matthew22:12 Athi kuye, Wethu, utheni na ukungena apha, ungenayo ingubo yomsitho? Lamkhohla ke." 
Matthew22:13 Wathi ukumkani kubalungiseleli, Mbopheni iinyawo nezandla, nimthabathe, nimkhuphele ebumnyameni bangaphandle; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo." 
Matthew22:14 Kuba baninzi ababiziweyo, ke bambalwa abanyuliweyo." 
Matthew22:15 Baza abaFarisi baya benza ibhunga lokuba bamthiyele ekuthetheni kwakhe. 
Matthew22:16 Bathumela kuye abafundi babo benamaHerode, besithi, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uyinyaniso, uyifundisa indlela kaThixo ngenyaniso; kananjalo akukhathali nangubani, kuba akukhethi buso bamntu." 
Matthew22:17 Sixelele ngoko, uthini na wena? Kuvumelekile na ukumnika irhafu uKesare, akuvumelekile, sini na?" 
Matthew22:18 Ke kaloku, eyazi uYesu inkohlakalo yabo, wathi, Nindilingelani na, bahanahanisindini?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndiboniseni iqhosha lerhafu. Bamzisela ke idenariyo. 
Matthew22:20 Athi kubo, Ngokabani na lo mfanekiso nombhalo?" 
Matthew22:21 Bathi kuye, NgokaKesare. Andule ukuthi kubo, Nikelani kaloku izinto zikaKesare kuKesare, neento zikaThixo kuThixo." 
Matthew22:22 Bakuva bamangaliswa, basuka bamshiya, bemka." 
Matthew22:23 Kwangaloo mini kweza kuye abaSadusi, abathi akukho luvuko;bambuza," 
Matthew22:24 besithi, Mfundisi, uMoses wathi, Ukuba ubani uthe wafa engenabantwana, wothi umzalwana wakhe amngene umfazi wakhe, amvelisele imbewu umzalwana wakhe." 
Matthew22:25 Ke kaloku kwaye kukho kuthi abazalwana abasixhenxe; waza owokuqala akubon ukuba uzekile wabhubha, wathi, kuba engenambewu, wamshiya kumzalwana wakhe umfazi wakhe." 
Matthew22:26 Wenjenjalo nowesibini, nowesithathu, kwada kwaya kowesixhenxe." 
Matthew22:27 Emveni ke kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi." 
Matthew22:28 Ngoko eluvukweni uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi na kweso sixhenxe? Kuba babenaye bonke. 
Matthew22:29 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Niyalahleka, kuba ningazazi izibhalo kwanamandla kaThixo." 
Matthew22:30 Kuba eluvukweni abazeki, abendiswa; banjengazo izithunywa zikaThixo emazulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Ngalo ke uvuko lwabafileyo, anikulesanga na okwathethwayo kuni nguThixo, esithi," 
Matthew22:32 Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi? UThixo akaThixo wabafileyo, ungowabaphilileyo." 
Matthew22:33 Zathi izihlwele zakukuva, zakhwankqiswa yimfundiso yakhe." 
Matthew22:34 Ke kaloku bathe abaFarisi, bakuva ukuba ubethe labakhohla abaSadusi, bahlanganiselana ndawonye." 
Matthew22:35 Omnye kubo ongumqondisi-mthetho wambuza emlinga, wathi," 
Matthew22:36 Mfundisi, owona myalelo mkhulu emthethweni nguwuphi na?" 
Matthew22:37 Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Uze uyithande iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela." 
Matthew22:38 Nguwo lowo owokuqala nomkhulu umthetho. 
Matthew22:39 Owesibini ke ufana nawo: Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako. 
Matthew22:40 Kule mithetho yomibini kuxhomekeke umyalelo uphela nabaprofeti. 
Matthew22:41 Bakubon ukuba bahlanganisene ke abaFarisi, uYesu wabuza kubo," 
Matthew22:42 esithi, Nithini na nina ngaye uKristu? Ungunyana kabani na? Bathi kuye, KaDavide." 
Matthew22:43 Athi kubo, Yini na phofu ukuba uDavide ngoMoya ambize ngokuthi, Nkosi, esithi," 
Matthew22:44 Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho?" 
Matthew22:45 Ukuba uDavide ngoko umbiza ngokuba Nkosi, ungunyana wakhe ngani na?" 
Matthew22:46 Akubangakho namnye ubenako ukumphendula nezwi eli;kananjalo kususela kuloo mini, akubanga sabakho mntu waba nabuganga bakumbuza nto." 
Matthew23:1 Waza uYesu wathetha kwisihlwele nakubafundi bakhe," 
Matthew23:2 esithi, Ababhali nabaFarisi bahleli esihlalweni sikaMoses." 
Matthew23:3 Konke ngoko abasukuba besithi kuni kugcineni, ze nikugcine nikwenze; kodwa ze ningenzi ngokwemisebenzi yabo; kuba bathetha baze bangenzi." 
Matthew23:4 Kuba babopha imithwalo enzima, esindayo, bayibeke emagxeni abantu, babe ke bona bengathandi kuyishukumisa nangomnwe lo wabo." 
Matthew23:5 Yonke imisebenzi yabo ke bayenza ngokunga bangabonwa ngabantu; bawenze banzi amaqhaga abo ezikhumbuzo, bayandise imiqukumbelo yeengubo zabo." 
Matthew23:6 Kananjalo bathanda izilili zobukhulu ezidlweni, kwanezihlalo zobukhulu ezindlwini zesikhungu," 
Matthew23:7 nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho, nokubizwa ngabantu kuthiwe, Rabhi, Rabhi." 
Matthew23:8 Ke nina maningabizwa kuthiwe Rabhi; kuba mnye uMkhokeli wenu, uKristu; nina ke nonke ningabazalwana." 
Matthew23:9 Ningabizi mntu ngokuba nguyihlo emhlabeni apha; kuba mnye uYihlo wenu, lowo usemazulwini." 
Matthew23:10 Kananjalo maningabizwa ngokuba ningabakhokeli; kuba mnye uMkhokeli wenu, uKristu." 
Matthew23:11 Omkhulu ke kuni makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu. 
Matthew23:12 Osukuba ke eziphakamisa uya kuthotywa; nosukuba ezithoba uya kuphakanyiswa. 
Matthew23:13 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nibuvala ubukumkani bamazulu phambi kwabantu; kuba aningeni nina, nabangenayo anibavumeli ukuba bangene." 
Matthew23:14 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nisidla izindlu zabahlolokazi, nize ngokunyhwalaza nithandaze uzungu; ngenxa yoko niya kwamkela ugwebo olugqithiseleyo." 
Matthew23:15 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nijikajika ulwandle nomhlaba ukuze nenze nokuba mnye ongena ebuYudeni; nithi, xa athe wazuzeka, nimenze abe ngumntwana wesihogo ngokuphindiweyo kunani." 
Matthew23:16 Yeha, nina bakhokelindini baziimfama! Nina nithi, Othe wafunga itempile, akunto oko; ke othe wafunga igolide yetempile, unetyala." 
Matthew23:17 Ziyatha, zimfama, kanene yiyiphi na enkulu? Yigolide, yitempile eyingcwalisayo igolide, kusini na?" 
Matthew23:18 Kanjalo nina nithi, Othe wafunga isibingelelo, akunto oko;ke othe wafunga umnikelo ophezu kwaso, unetyala." 
Matthew23:19 Ziyatha, zimfama, kanene yiyiphi na enkulu? Ngumnikelo, sisibingelelo esiwungcwalisayo umnikelo, kusini na?" 
Matthew23:20 Lowo usifungayo ngoko isibingelelo ufunga sona neento zonke eziphezu kwaso. 
Matthew23:21 Nalowo uyifungayo itempile, ufunga yona nomiyo kuyo." 
Matthew23:22 Nalowo uwafungayo amazulu, ufunga itrone kaThixo nohleli phezu kwayo." 
Matthew23:23 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba ninikela izishumi zetyeleba nedile nekumin, kanti nizishiyile ezona ndawo zinzima zomthetho, umgwebo nenceba nokholo; ezi benimelwe kukuba nizenze, nithi neziya ningazishiyi." 
Matthew23:24 Bakhokelindini baziimfama, abahluza imbuzane, ke baginye inkamela." 
Matthew23:25 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nihlambulula umphandle wendebe nesitya, kanti ke ngaphakathi kuzele kukuphanga nokungazeyisi." 
Matthew23:26 MFarisindini uyimfama, hlambulula tanci okungaphakathi kwendebe nesitya, ukuze kuthi okungaphandle kwazo kuhlambuluke nako." 
Matthew23:27 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nifana namangcwaba aqatywe ifutha, athi abonakale emahle okunene ngaphandle, kanti ngaphakathi azele ngamathambo abafileyo nokungcola konke." 
Matthew23:28 Ngokukwanjalo nani ngaphandle okunene nibonakala kubantu ningamalungisa, kanti ngaphakathi nizele luhanahaniso nokuchasene nomthetho." 
Matthew23:29 Yeha, nina babhali, baFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba niwakha amangcwaba abaprofeti, nivathise amangcwaba amalungisa," 
Matthew23:30 nithi, Ukuba sasikho thina ngemihla yoobawo, singe singabanga nabudlelane nabo ngegazi labaprofeti." 
Matthew23:31 Ngoko niyangqina kwanina, ukuba ningoonyana babo babulala abaprofeti." 
Matthew23:32 Wuzaliseni kambe nani umlinganisela wooyihlo. 
Matthew23:33 Zinyokandini, nzalandini yamarhamba, ningathini na ukuwusaba umgwebo wesihogo?" 
Matthew23:34 Ngenxa yoko, niyabona, mna ndinithumela abaprofeti nezilumko nababhali; niya kuthi inxenye kubo niyibulale, niyibethelele eminqamlezweni, nithi inxenye kubo niyityakatye ezindlwini zenu zesikhungu, niyitshutshise kwimizi ngemizi;" 
Matthew23:35 ukuze linifikele lonke igazi elinobulungisa, elaphalazwayo emhlabeni apha, lithabathela egazini lika-Abheli ilungisa, lizise egazini likaZekariya, unyana kaBherekiya, enambulalela phakathi kwendawo engcwele nesibingelelo." 
Matthew23:36 Inene, ndithi kuni, Zonke ezo zinto ziya kusihlela esi sizukulwana." 
Matthew23:37 Yerusalem, Yerusalem, wena ubabulalayo abaprofeti, ubagibisele ngamatye abo bathunywe kuwe, kufuthi kangakanani na ndithande ukubabuthela ndawonye abantwana bakho, ngohlobo esithi isikhukukazi siwabuthele ndawonye amathole aso ngaphantsi kwamaphiko, anavuma!" 
Matthew23:38 Yabonani, indlu yenu ishiywa nani ize." 
Matthew23:39 Kuba ndithi kuni, Aniyi kuba sandibona emveni koku, nide nithi, Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi." 
Matthew24:1 Ephumile uYesu, wemka etempileni; bathe abafundi bakhe beza kumbonisa izakhiwo zetempile." 
Matthew24:2 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Niyazibona na zonke ezi zinto? Inene, ndithi kuni, Akusayi kusala apha ilitye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa." 
Matthew24:3 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba uhleli eNtabeni yemiNquma, beza kuye abafundi bebodwa, bathi, Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto; uya kuba yini na umqondiso wokufika kwakho, nowokupheliswa kwephakade eli?" 
Matthew24:4 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa mntu." 
Matthew24:5 Kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi banguKristu, balahlekise into eninzi." 
Matthew24:6 Niya kuthi ke nive iimfazwe namarhe eemfazwe; lumkani ningabi navuso, kuba zonke ezo zinto zimele ukuhla; kanti kona ukuphela akukabikho." 
Matthew24:7 Kuba uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani; kuya kubakho iindlala, neendyikitya zokufa, nezinyikimo zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo." 
Matthew24:8 Zonke ke ezo zinto zikukuqaleka kwenimba. 
Matthew24:9 Ngelo xesha baya kuninikela ekubandezelweni, banibulale;niya kuthiywa ziintlanga zonke ngenxa yegama lam." 
Matthew24:10 Ngelo xesha baninzi abaya kukhutyekiswa, banikelane, bathiyane." 
Matthew24:11 Kwaye kuya kuvela abaprofeti ababuxoki babe baninzi, balahlekise abantu abaninzi." 
Matthew24:12 Nangenxa yokwanda kokuchasa umthetho, luya kuphola uthando lwabaninzi." 
Matthew24:13 Ke onyamezeleyo kwada kwaba sekupheleni, lowo uya kusindiswa." 
Matthew24:14 Zaye ezi ndaba zilungileyo zobukumkani ziya kuvakaliswa kulo elimiweyo liphela, zibe bubungqina kuzo zonke iintlanga;kwandule ke ukufika ukuphela." 
Matthew24:15 Xa ke ngoko nithe nalibona isikizi lesiphanziso, ekwakuthethwa lona ngoDaniyeli umprofeti, limi endaweni engcwele (olesayo makaqiqe)," 
Matthew24:16 ngelo xesha mabathi abakwelakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni. 
Matthew24:17 Ophezu kwendlu makangehli aye kuthabatha into endlwini yakhe; 
Matthew24:18 nosentsimini makangabuyeli emva aye kuthabatha iingubo zakhe. 
Matthew24:19 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla!" 
Matthew24:20 Thandazani ke, ukuba intsabo yenu ingabi khona ebusika nangesabatha." 
Matthew24:21 Kuba ngelo xesha kuya kubakho imbandezelo enkulu, ekungazanga kubekho injalo kwasekuqalekeni kwehlabathi, kwada kwaba kalokunje, ekungasayi kubuye kubekho injalo." 
Matthew24:22 Kanjalo ukuba ibingayi kuthi loo mihla inqanyulelwe, bekungayi kubakho nyama isindayo; ngenxa ke yabanyuliweyo, loo mihla iya kunqanyulelwa." 
Matthew24:23 Ngelo xesha, ukuba ubani uthe kuni, Nanku apha uKristu, nokuba uthe, Nankuya phaya, musani ukuholwa." 
Matthew24:24 Kuba kuya kuvela ooKristu ababuxoki, nabaprofeti ababuxoki, benze imiqondiso emikhulu nezimanga, ngokokude bathi, ukuba bekunokwenzeka, balahlekise nabanyuliweyo." 
Matthew24:25 Yabonani, ndinixelele ngenxa engaphambili." 
Matthew24:26 Ukuba ngoko bathi kuni, Nanko entlango, musani ukuphuma niye. Nokuba bathi, Nanko emagumbini, musani ukukholwa." 
Matthew24:27 Kuba kwanjengokuba umbane uthi uphume empumalanga, ubonakale kude kuse entshonalanga, kuya kuba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu." 
Matthew24:28 Kuba apho sukuba sikhona isidumbu, aya kuhlanganisana khona amaxhalanga." 
Matthew24:29 Kwaoko ke, emveni kwembandezelo yaloo mihla, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, ithi nenyanga ifiphale, zithi neenkwenkwezi ziwe ezulwini, athi namandla amazulu azanyazanyiswe." 
Matthew24:30 Uya kubonakala ngelo xesha umqondiso woNyana woMntu ezulwini; zimbambazele ngelo xesha zonke izizwe zomhlaba, zimbone uNyana woMntu esiza phezu kwamafu ezulu, enamandla, nobuqaqawuli obukhulu." 
Matthew24:31 Wozithuma izithunywa zakhe zasemazulwini, zinexilongo elisandi sikhulu, zihlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, baphume kumacala omane omoya, kuthabathela esiphelweni sezulu, kude kuse kwesinye isiphelo salo." 
Matthew24:32 Wufundeni ke umzekeliso kuwo umkhiwane: xa selithe lathamba isebe lawo, lahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufuphi ihlobo." 
Matthew24:33 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona zonke ezo zinto, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango." 
Matthew24:34 Inene ndithi kuni, Asisayi kudlula esi sizukulwana, zingadanga zonke ezo zinto zibekho." 
Matthew24:35 Liya kudlula izulu nomhlaba, ke wona amazwi am akasayi kudlula." 
Matthew24:36 Kodwa akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo lixa; azazi nezithunywa zamazulu, nguBawo yedwa." 
Matthew24:37 Ke kaloku, njengokuba ibinjalo imihla kaNowa, koba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu." 
Matthew24:38 Kuba njengokuba babesithi, ngemihla ebingaphambi konogumbe, badle, basele, bazeke, bendise, kwada kwayimini awangena ngayo emkhombeni uNowa, bengaqondanga," 
Matthew24:39 wada wafika unogumbe, wabakhukulisa bonke: koba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu." 
Matthew24:40 Ngelo xesha ababini boba sentsimini, athi omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe." 
Matthew24:41 Abafazi ababini boba besila etyeni lokusila, athi omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe." 
Matthew24:42 Phaphani ngoko; ngokuba ningazi ukuba lilixa liphi na eza ngalo iNkosi yenu. 
Matthew24:43 Yazini ke oku, ukuba ebesazi umninindlu ukuba isela liza ngawuphi na umlindo wobusuku, ange elindile, akavuma ukuba indlu yakhe igqojozwe." 
Matthew24:44 Ngenxa yoko yibani nilungile nani, ngokuba uNyana woMntu uza ngelixa eningalikhumbuleliyo." 
Matthew24:45 Ngubani na ke loo mkhonzi uthembekileyo, uqondayo, eyathi inkosi yakhe yammisa phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuze abanike ukudla ngexesha elifanelekileyo?" 
Matthew24:46 Unoyolo loo mkhonzi, iya kuthi yakufika inkosi yakhe imfumane esenjenjalo." 
Matthew24:47 Inene ndithi kuni, iya kummisa phezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo." 
Matthew24:48 Ukuba ke umkhonzi lowa ukhohlakeleyo uthe entliziyweni yakhe, Inkosi yam ilibele," 
Matthew24:49 ayizi, aqale ababethe abakhonza kunye naye, adle ke, asele nabanxilayo," 
Matthew24:50 iya kufika inkosi yaloo mkhonzi ngemini angayikhangeleyo, nangelixa angalaziyo," 
Matthew24:51 imsike kubini, immisele isabelo sakhe nabahanahanisi;khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo." 
Matthew25:1 Ngelo xesha ubukumkani bamazulu buya kufanekiswa neentombi ezilishumi, ezazithabathayo izibane zazo, zaphuma zaya kumkhawulela umyeni." 
Matthew25:2 Ezintlanu ke kuzo zaye ziziingqondi, ezintlanu ziziziyatha." 
Matthew25:3 Ezo ziziziyatha zaphatha izibane zazo, azaphatha oli nazo;" 
Matthew25:4 kodwa eziziingqondi zaphatha ioli ezityeni zazo, kwanezibane zazo." 
Matthew25:5 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba ulibele umyeni, zozela zonke zalala." 
Matthew25:6 Phakathi kobusuku ke kwabakho umemezo oluthi, Nanko umyeni esiza; phumani niye kumkhawulela." 
Matthew25:7 Zaza zavuka zonke ezo ntombi, zalungisa izibane zazo." 
Matthew25:8 Zathi ke eziziziyatha kweziziingqondi, Sipheni kwioli yenu leyo, ngokuba izibane zethu zicima." 
Matthew25:9 Zaphendula ke eziziingqondi, zathi, Hayi, hleze inganeli kuthi nakuni; yiyani kanye kwabathengisayo, nizithengele." 
Matthew25:10 Kuthe ke, zisaya kuthenga, wafika umyeni; zaza ezo bezisezilungile zangena naye emsithweni, lwavalwa ke ucango." 
Matthew25:11 Zithi ke kamva zifike nezinye iintombi ezo, zisithi, Nkosi, nkosi, sivulele." 
Matthew25:12 Yaphendula ke yona yathi, Inene ndithi kuni, andinazi nina." 
Matthew25:13 Phaphani ngoko, ngokuba ningayazi imini kwanalo ilixa." 
Matthew25:14 Kuba kunjengomntu owathi, eza kuhambela kwelinye, wabiza abakhe abakhonzi, wayinikela kubo impahla yakhe." 
Matthew25:15 Wathi omnye wamnika iitalente zantlanu, omnye zambini, nomnye yaba nye, walowo wanikwa ngokwawakhe amandla; wahambela kwelinye kwaoko." 
Matthew25:16 Lowo ke wamkela iitalente ezintlanu, waya wasebenza ngazo, wenza esinye isihlanu seetalente." 
Matthew25:17 Kwangokunjalo nalowo wamkela ezimbini, naye wazuza esinye isibini." 
Matthew25:18 Ke naye lowo wamkela yanye, waya wemba emhlabeni, wayifihla imali yenkosi yakhe." 
Matthew25:19 Ithi ke emveni kwexesha elikhulu, ifike inkosi yabo bakhonzi, ibalelane nabo." 
Matthew25:20 Weza lowo wamkela iitalente ezintlanu, wazisa esinye isihlanu seetalente, esithi, Nkosi, wandinika iitalente zantlanu; khangela, ndizuze esinye isihlanu seetalente phezu kwazo." 
Matthew25:21 Yathi ke kuye inkosi yakhe, Hee ke, mkhonzi ulungileyo, uthembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwiinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukumisa phezu kweento ezininzi, ngena eluvuyweni lwenkosi yakho." 
Matthew25:22 Weza ke nalowo wamkela iitalente ezimbini, wathi, Nkosi, wandinika iitalente zambini; khangela, ndizuze esinye isibini seetalente phezu kwazo." 
Matthew25:23 Yathi kuye inkosi yakhe, Hee ke, mkhonzi ulungileyo, uthembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwiinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukumisa phezu kweento ezininzi; ngena eluvuyweni lwenkosi yakho." 
Matthew25:24 Weza ke nalowo wamkela italente yanye, wathi, Nkosi, bendikwazi wena ukuba ungumntu olukhuni, uvuna apho ubungahlwayelanga khona, ubuthe apho ungelelanga khona;" 
Matthew25:25 ndasuka ndoyika, ndaya ndayiselela italente yakho ngomhlaba; nanku unako okwakho." 
Matthew25:26 Yaphendula ke inkosi yakhe yathi kuye, Mkhonzindini ukhohlakeleyo, ulivila, ubusazi nje ukuba ndivuna apho ndingahlwayelanga khona, ndibuthe apho ndingelelanga khona," 
Matthew25:27 ubumelwe kukuthi ngoko ube ubuyibeke imali yam kubananisi, ndaza ndakufika mna, ndabuya ndakuzuza okwam kunenzala." 
Matthew25:28 Mhlutheni ngoko italente leyo, niyinike lowo uneetalente ezilishumi." 
Matthew25:29 Kuba wonke umntu onako Uya kunikwa, abe nako ngokugqithiseleyo; ke ongenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako." 
Matthew25:30 Naye umkhonzi ongancedi lutho, mkhupheleni ebumnyameni obungaphandle; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo." 
Matthew25:31 Xa ke athe wafika uNyana woMntu esebuqaqawulini bakhe, enazo zonke izithunywa ezingcwele, ngelo xa uya kuhlala phezu kwetrone yobuqaqawuli bakhe;" 
Matthew25:32 zihlanganiswe phambi kwakhe zonke iintlanga, abahlule abanye kwabanye, njengokuba umalusi ezahlula izimvu ezibhokhweni;" 
Matthew25:33 athi zona izimvu azimise ngasekunene kwakhe, athi kodwa zona iibhokhwe azimise ngasekhohlo." 
Matthew25:34 Uya kuthi ke ukumkani kwabangasekunene kwakhe, Yizani, nina nisikelelweyo nguBawo, nibudle ilifa ubukumkani obalungiselwa nina kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi;" 
Matthew25:35 kuba ndalamba, nandipha ukudla; ndanxanwa, nandiseza;ndandingowasemzini, nandingenisa endlwini;" 
Matthew25:36 ndandize, nandambesa; ndandisifa, nandivelela;ndandisentolongweni, neza kum." 
Matthew25:37 Oza amphendule ke amalungisa, esithi, Nkosi, sakubona nini na ulambile, sakonga; unxaniwe, sakuseza?" 
Matthew25:38 Sakubona nini na ke ungowasemzini, sakungenisa endlwini, uze, sakwambesa?" 
Matthew25:39 Sakubona nini na ke usifa, okanye usentolongweni, seza kuwe?" 
Matthew25:40 Aze aphendule ukumkani athi kuwo, Inene ndithi kuni, Ekubeni nenjenjalo nakumnye waba bazalwana bam bangabona bancinane, nenjenjalo nakum." 
Matthew25:41 Uya kuthi nakwabangasekhohlo, Mkani kum, nina baqalekiswa, niye emlilweni ongunaphakade, owalungiselwa uMtyholi nezithunywa zakhe." 
Matthew25:42 Kuba ndalamba, anandipha kudla; ndanxanwa, anandiseza;" 
Matthew25:43 ndandingowasemzini, anandingenisa ndlwini; ndandize, anandambesa; ndandisifa, ndandisentolongweni, anandivelela." 
Matthew25:44 Boza ke bamphendule nabo, besithi, Nkosi, sakubona nini na ulambile, okanye unxaniwe, okanye ungowasemzini, okanye uze, okanye usifa, okanye usentolongweni, asakulungiselela?" 
Matthew25:45 Aze abaphendule, esithi, Inene ndithi kuni, Ekubeni ningenjanga njalo nakumnye waba bangabona bancinane, anenjanga njalo nakum." 
Matthew25:46 Baya kumka aba baye elubethweni olungunaphakade; ke wona amalungisa aya kuya ebomini obungunaphakade. 
Matthew26:1 Kwathi, xa ebewagqibile uYesu onke la mazwi, wathi kubafundi bakhe," 
Matthew26:2 Niyazi ukuba emveni kweentsuku ezimbini kukho ipasika, aze uNyana woMntu anikelwe ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew26:3 Bathi ngelo xa ababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, namadoda amakhulu abantu, bahlanganisana endlwini yombingeleli omkhulu okuthiwa nguKayafa;" 
Matthew26:4 babhunga ukuba bambambe uYesu ngenkohliso, bambulale." 
Matthew26:5 Ke babesithi, Makungabi khona ngomthendeleko, ukuze kungehli saqunge phakathi kwabantu." 
Matthew26:6 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba uYesu useBhetani, endlwini kaSimon owayeneqhenqa," 
Matthew26:7 kweza kuye umfazi enehlala lelabhastile, linamafutha aqholiweyo axabiso likhulu, wawagalela phezu kwentloko yakhe, akubon ukuba uhleli ngasesithebeni." 
Matthew26:8 Bekubonile ke oko abafundi bakhe, bacaphuka, besithi, Yeyani na le nkcitho?" 
Matthew26:9 Kuba la mafutha ngekuthengiswe lukhulu ngawo, kwaza kwaphiwa amahlwempu." 
Matthew26:10 Ekwazi ke oko, uYesu wathi kubo, Umfazi lo nimaphulelani na? Kuba usebenze kum umsebenzi omhle." 
Matthew26:11 Kuba amahlwempu lawo nihleli ninawo; kodwa mna anihleli ninam. 
Matthew26:12 Kuba la mafutha aqholiweyo, yena ewathululele emzimbeni wam nje, wenzele ukungcwatywa kwam." 
Matthew26:13 Inene ndithi kuni, Apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zilungileyo kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto ayenzileyo yena, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngaye." 
Matthew26:14 Ngelo xesha kwaphuma omnye weshumi elinababini, ekuthiwa nguYuda Sikariyoti, waya kubabingeleli abakhulu," 
Matthew26:15 wathi, Ningandinika ntoni na, ndimnikele kuni? Bammisela ke amaqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu." 
Matthew26:16 Waza kwalapho wafuna ithuba elilungileyo lokuze amnikele kubo. 
Matthew26:17 Ke kaloku, ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, beza abafundi kuYesu, besithi kuye, Ufuna ukuba sikulungisele phi na ukuyidla ipasika?" 
Matthew26:18 Wathi ke yena, Hambani niye kuwo umzi, kuthile, nithi kuye, Uthi uMfundisi, ixesha lam likufuphi; ndiya kuyenzela kuwe ipasika nabafundi bam." 
Matthew26:19 Abafundi benza ke ngoko uYesu abebayaleze ngako, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kwakuhlwa ke, wahlala ngasesithebeni nabalishumi elinababini." 
Matthew26:21 Xa badlayo, wathi, Inene ndithi kuni, Omnye kuni aba uya kundingcatsha." 
Matthew26:22 Baza, bebuhlungu kakhulu, baqala ukuthi kuye bonke ngabanye, Ingaba ndim yini na, Nkosi?" 
Matthew26:23 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Osithe nkxu nam isandla esityeni, nguye lowo uya kundingcatsha." 
Matthew26:24 UNyana woMntu uyemka okunene, njengoko kubhaliweyo ngaye.Kodwa ke, yeha, loo mntu uNyana woMntu angcatshwa nguye!Ngekumlungele ukuba ebengazalwanga loo mntu." 
Matthew26:25 Waphendula ke uYuda, lowo wamngcatshayo, wathi, Ingaba ndim yini na, Rabhi? Athi yena kuye, Uselutshilo nawe." 
Matthew26:26 Bakubon ukuba bayadla ke, uYesu wasithabatha isonka, wathi akusikelela waqhekeza, wanika abafundi, wathi, Thabathani nidle; ngumzimba wam lo." 
Matthew26:27 Wayithabatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika, esithi, Selani kuyo nonke;" 
Matthew26:28 kuba ligazi lam eli lomnqophiso omtsha, eliphalala ngenxa yabaninzi, ukuze kuxolelwe izono." 
Matthew26:29 Ndithi ke kuni, Andisayi kusela kwesi siqhamo somdiliya, kuthabathela kweli xesha, kude kube yiloo mini sukuba ndisisela nani sisitsha ebukumka nini bukaBawo." 
Matthew26:30 Bakuba bevume ingoma yokudumisa, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma." 
Matthew26:31 Ngelo xesha uthi uYesu kubo, Nina nonke niya kukhubeka ngam ngobu busuku; kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kumbetha umalusi, zichithwachithwe izimvu zomhlambi." 
Matthew26:32 Kodwa emveni kokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela ndiye kwelaseGalili." 
Matthew26:33 Waphendula ke uPetros wathi kuye, Nokuba bonke baya kukhubeka ngawe, andisayi kukha ndikhubeke mna." 
Matthew26:34 Wathi uYesu kuye, Inene ndithi kuwe, Kwangobu busuku, ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu." 
Matthew26:35 Athi uPetros kuye, Ndingafanelana ndimelwe kukuba ndife nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele. Batsho nabo bonke abafundi." 
Matthew26:36 Ngelo xesha, ufika uYesu nabo kumhlatyana ekuthiwa yiGetsemane; athi kubafundi, Hlalani phantsi apha, ndikhe ndiye kuthandaza phaya." 
Matthew26:37 Wathabatha uPetros noonyana bobabini bakaZebhedi, waqala ukuba buhlungu nokudandatheka kakhulu." 
Matthew26:38 Aze athi kubo, Umphefumlo wam ubuhlungu kakhulu, ngokokude ube sekufeni; hlalani apha nilinde nam." 
Matthew26:39 Waza, ehambele phambili umganyana, wawa ngobuso bakhe, wathandaza, esithi, Bawo, ukuba kunokwenzeka, mayidlule kum le ndebe; noko makungabi njengokuthanda kwam, makube njengokuthanda kwakho." 
Matthew26:40 Uyeza kubafundi, abafumane belele, athi kuPetros, Ninje na ukungabi nako ukulinda nam nexa elinye?" 
Matthew26:41 Lindani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni; umoya wona okunene unentumekelelo, ke yona inyama ithambile." 
Matthew26:42 Wabuya wemka okwesibini, wathandaza, esithi, Bawo, ukuba ayinako le ndebe ukudlula kum ndingathanga ndiyisele, makwenzeke ukuthanda kwakho." 
Matthew26:43 Afike abafumane bebuye balala, kuba amehlo abo ayenzima bubuthongo." 
Matthew26:44 Wabashiya, wabuya wemka, wathandaza okwesithathu, ethetha kwalona elo lizwi." 
Matthew26:45 Andule ukuza kubafundi bakhe, athi kubo, Lalani ngoku, niphumle; yabonani, lisondele ilixa lokuba uNyana woMntu anikelwe ezandleni zaboni." 
Matthew26:46 Vukani, sihambe; yabonani, usondele lowo undinikelayo." 
Matthew26:47 Kuthe, esathetha, kwathi gqi uYuda, omnye wabalishumi elinababini; weza enendimbane enkulu inamakrele neentonga, ivela kubabingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu." 
Matthew26:48 Ke kaloku, wayethe lowo umnikelayo wabanika umqondiso, esithi, Endithe ndamanga, nguye lowo; mbambeni." 
Matthew26:49 Wafika ke kwaoko kuYesu, wathi, Aa, Rabhi! Wamanga nokumanga." 
Matthew26:50 Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Wethu! Ukho ngani na? Bandula ukuza, bamsa izandla uYesu, bambamba." 
Matthew26:51 Wesuka omnye wabo babenoYesu, wolula isandla, warhola ikrele lakhe, wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqumla indlebe." 
Matthew26:52 Aze athi uYesu kuye, Libuyisele endaweni yalo ikrele lakho; kuba bonke abathabatha ikrele baya kutshabalala likrele." 
Matthew26:53 Uba andinako na ngoku ukumbongoza uBawo, andikhuphele imikhosi yezithunywa zezulu engaphezu kweshumi elinamibini?" 
Matthew26:54 Bezingathini na ke oko ukuzaliseka izibhalo ezithi, kumele ukuba kube nje?" 
Matthew26:55 Ngalo elo lixa wathi uYesu kwindimbane, Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna na, ninamakrele neentonga nje, ngathi niphumele isihange? Bendihleli nani imihla ngemihla, ndifundisa etempileni, anandibamba." 
Matthew26:56 Oku ke konke kwenzeke, ukuze zizaliseke izibhalo zabaprofeti. Basuka bonke abafundi bamshiya, babaleka." 
Matthew26:57 Abo ke bambambayo uYesu, bamrholela kuKayafa, umbingeleli omkhulu, apho babehlanganisene khona ababhali namadoda amakhulu." 
Matthew26:58 Ke kaloku uPetros wayemlandela, ebekele kude, kwada kwaya entendelezweni yendlu yombingeleli omkhulu. Engene ngaphakathi, wahlala phantsi namadindala, ukuba abone isiphelo." 
Matthew26:59 Ke kaloku, baye ababingeleli abakhulu, namadoda amakhulu, nentlanganiso yamatyala iphelele, befuna ubungqina obubuxoki ngoYesu, ukuze bambulale; ababufumananga;" 
Matthew26:60 nangona afikayo amangqina abuxoki aba maninzi, ababufumananga. Ada ke afika amangqina abuxoki emabini," 
Matthew26:61 athi, Lo wathi, Ndinako ukuyichitha itempile kaThixo, ndibuye ndiyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu." 
Matthew26:62 Wesuka wema umbingeleli omkhulu, wathi kuye, Akuphenduli nto na? Bangqina ntoni na aba ngawe?" 
Matthew26:63 Wahlala yena uYesu wathi tu. Waphendula umbingeleli omkhulu wathi kuye, Ndikufungisa uThixo ophilileyo, ukuba usixelele ukuba unguye na uKristu, unyana kaThixo." 
Matthew26:64 Athi uYesu kuye, Uselutshilo nawe. Ke ndithi kuni, Emveni koku niya kumbona uNyana woMntu, ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza esemafini ezulu." 
Matthew26:65 Waza umbingeleli omkhulu wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, esithi, Unyelisile; sisawafunelani na amangqina? Yabonani, ngoku nikuvile ukunyelisa kwakhe; nithini na nina?" 
Matthew26:66 Baphendula ke bona bathi, Unetyala lokuba afe." 
Matthew26:67 Baza bamtshicela ebusweni, bamntlitha, abanye bammonxoza," 
Matthew26:68 besithi, Siprofetele, wena Kristu; ubethwe ngubani na?" 
Matthew26:69 Ke kaloku uPetros wayehleli ngaphandle entendelezweni;kweza kuye sicakazana sithile, sisithi, Nawe ubunaye uYesu lo waseGalili." 
Matthew26:70 Wakhanyela ke yena phambi kwabo bonke, esithi, Andiyazi into oyithethayo." 
Matthew26:71 Kuthe ke, ephume waya esangweni, sambona esinye; sithi kwababekhona, Naye lo ebenaye uYesu waseNazarete." 
Matthew26:72 Waphinda wakhanyela efunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu." 
Matthew26:73 Kwathi ke kwakuba mzuzwana, beza abo babemi khona, bathi kuPetros, Inyaniso, nawe ungowabo; kuba nokuthetha kwakho kuyakudiza." 
Matthew26:74 Waza waqala ukushwabula nokufunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu. Yasuka yalila kwaoko inkuku." 
Matthew26:75 Walikhumbula uPetros ilizwi likaYesu, abelithethile kuye, esithi, Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu. Ephume phandle, walila ngokukrakra." 
Matthew27:1 Kuthe ke kwakusa, babhunga bonke ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu ngaye uYesu, ukuba bambulale." 
Matthew27:2 Bathi bakumbopha, bamrhola, bamnikela kuPontiyo Pilato, irhuluneli." 
Matthew27:3 Waza uYuda, lowo wamngcatshayo, ebone ukuba ugwetyiwe, wazohlwaya, wawabuyisela kwakubabingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu loo maqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu," 
Matthew27:4 esithi, Ndonile, kuba ndingcatshe igazi elingenatyala.Bathi ke bona, Iyini na kuthi loo nto? Zibonele wena." 
Matthew27:5 Wawaphosa phantsi etempileni apho loo maqhosha esilivere, wemka, waya wazixhoma." 
Matthew27:6 Ke kaloku ababingeleli abakhulu bawathabatha loo maqhosha esilivere, bathi, Akuvumelekile ukuwagalela emkhombeni weminikelo, ngokokuba elinani legazi." 
Matthew27:7 Babhunga ke, bathenga ngawo umhlaba wombumbi, ukuze ube yindawo yokungcwabela abasemzini." 
Matthew27:8 Kungoko wabizwayo loo mhlaba ngokuba ngumhlaba wegazi, kwada kwanamhlanje." 
Matthew27:9 Kwazaliseka ke okwathethwayo ngoYeremiya umprofeti, esithi, Bawathabatha loo maqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu, inani lalowo wamiselwa inani, abammisela inani aboonyana bakaSirayeli," 
Matthew27:10 bawarholela umhlaba wombumbi, njengoko yandiyalelayo iNkosi." 
Matthew27:11 Wema ke uYesu phambi kwerhuluneli, yambuza irhuluneli isithi, Unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda? Wathi ke uYesu kuyo, Nawe utsho." 
Matthew27:12 Ke kaloku ekumangalelweni kwakhe ngababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu, akaphendulanga nto." 
Matthew27:13 Aze athi uPilato kuye, Akuziva na ukuba zininzi kwazo iindawo abazingqinayo ngawe?" 
Matthew27:14 Akaphendula zwi, noko lilinye, yada yamangaliswa kakhulu irhuluneli leyo." 
Matthew27:15 Ke kaloku imithendeleko ngemithendeleko irhuluneli ibiqhele ukuzikhululela izihlwele umbanjwa abe mnye, lowo babesithi bamfune." 
Matthew27:16 Baye ke ngelo xesha benombanjwa obesazeka, ekuthiwa nguBharabhas." 
Matthew27:17 Bakubon ukuba ngoko bahlanganisene, wathi kubo uPilato, Nithanda ukuba ndinikhululele wuphi na, uBharabhas, uYesu ekuthiwa nguKristu, kusini na?" 
Matthew27:18 Kuba ebesazi ukuba bamnikele ngomona. 
Matthew27:19 Akubon ukuba uhleli esihlalweni sokugweba, umfazi wakhe wathumela kuye, esithi, Uze ungabi nakuthini kuloo mntu ulilungisa, kuba namhlanje ndive izinto ezininzi ezinzima ephupheni, ngenxa yakhe." 
Matthew27:20 Kodwa ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu bazeyisela izihlwele ekuthini zicele uBharabhas, zimtshabalalise uYesu." 
Matthew27:21 Yaphendula ke irhuluneli yathi kubo, Nguwuphi na kwaba bobabini enithanda ukuba ndinikhululele yena? Bathe ke bona, NguBharabhas." 
Matthew27:22 Athi uPilato kubo, Ndimenzeni na ke uYesu ekuthiwa nguKristu? Bathi kuye bonke, Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:23 Yathi ke irhuluneli, Kuba enze bubi buni na? Kwaba kukhona ke bancamisayo ukunkqangaza, besithi, Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:24 Uthe ke uPilato, akubona ukuba akancedi lutho, ebona ukuba sisuke sangakumbi isiphithiphithi, wathabatha amanzi, wahlamba izandla phambi kwezihlwele, esithi, Andinatyala egazini lalo mntu ulilungisa; ziboneleni nina." 
Matthew27:25 Baphendula bonke abantu bathi, Igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwethu, naphezu kwabantwana bethu." 
Matthew27:26 Waza wabakhululela uBharabhas; wathi ke, emtyakatyile uYesu, wamnikela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:27 Aza amasoldati erhuluneli amthabatha uYesu, amsa endlwini yerhuluneli, alihlanganisela phezu kwakhe ibutho lawo liphela." 
Matthew27:28 Amhluba, amnxiba ingubo ebomvu." 
Matthew27:29 Aluka isithsaba ngameva, amthi jize ngaso entloko; abeka nengcongolo esandleni sakhe sokunene, awa ngamadolo phambi kwakhe, adlala ngaye, esithi, Aa! Kumkani wamaYuda!" 
Matthew27:30 Amtshicela, ayithabatha ingcongolo, ambetha entloko." 
Matthew27:31 Athi, akuba edlale ngaye, amhluba ingubo leyo, amambathisa kwaezakhe iingubo; amrhola, aya kumbethelela emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:32 Athe ke ekuphumeni, afumana umntu waseKirene, ogama linguSimon; anyanzela lowo ukuba awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe." 
Matthew27:33 Athi akufika ndaweni kuthiwa yiGologota, oko kukuthi, yindawo yokakayi," 
Matthew27:34 amnika iviniga iphithikezwe nenyongo, ukuba asele; wathi akuyiva, akavuma ukuyisela." 
Matthew27:35 Athi ke, akumbethelela emnqamlezweni, abelana ngeengubo zakhe, esenza amaqashiso, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwa ngumprofeti, esithi, Babelana ngeengubo zam, benza amaqashiso ngesambatho sam." 
Matthew27:36 Ahlala phantsi, amlinda khona apho." 
Matthew27:37 Babeka ngaphezu kwentloko yakhe ityala lakhe libhaliwe, kwathiwa, lo nguYesu uKumkani wamaYuda." 
Matthew27:38 Kwaza kwabethelelwa naye eminqamlezweni izihange ezibini, esinye ngasekunene, nesinye ngasekhohlo." 
Matthew27:39 Bamnyelisa ke bona abadlulayo, behlunguzela iintloko zabo," 
Matthew27:40 besitsho ukuthi, Wena uchitha itempile, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu, zisindise; ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, yihla emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:41 Ngokukwanjalo ke nababingeleli abakhulu, bedlala ngaye, benabo ababhali namadoda amakhulu, bathi," 
Matthew27:42 Abanye wabasindisa; yena ngokwakhe akanakuzisindisa. Ukuba unguKumkani kaSirayeli, makehle kalokunje emnqamlezweni;sokholwa nguye;" 
Matthew27:43 ukholose ngoThixo, makamhlangule kalokunje, ukuba uyamthanda; kuba wathi, NdinguNyana kaThixo." 
Matthew27:44 Zaye ke nezihange, ezibe zibethelelwe eminqamlezweni naye, zimngcikiva kwangokunjalo." 
Matthew27:45 Kuthe ke, kuthabathele kwilixa lesithandathu, kwada kwesa kwilixa lesithoba, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba." 
Matthew27:46 Ke kaloku, malunga nelixa lesithoba, wadanduluka uYesu ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Eli! Eli! Lama sabhaktani! Oko kukuthi, Thixo wam! Thixo wam! Undishiye ngani na?" 
Matthew27:47 Inxenye ke yababemi khona, yakuva, yathi, Lo mntu ubiza uEliya." 
Matthew27:48 Wesuka wagidima kwaoko omnye kubo, wathabatha imfunxa, wayizalisa ngeviniga, wayifaka engcongolweni, wamseza." 
Matthew27:49 Bathe ke bona abanye, Khawuyeke, sibone ukuba uEliya uza kumsindisa na." 
Matthew27:50 Uthe ke uYesu, ephinde wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, wawukhupha umoya wakhe." 
Matthew27:51 Lasuka ikhuselo lengcwele lakrazuka kubini, lithabathele phezulu lada lesa phantsi; umhlaba wanyikima, namawa acandeka," 
Matthew27:52 namangcwaba avuleka, zathi izidumbu ezininzi zabangcwele ababelele zavuka;" 
Matthew27:53 baphuma emangcwabeni emveni kokuvuka kwakhe, bangena kuwo umzi ongcwele, babonakala kuninzi." 
Matthew27:54 Ke kaloku umthetheli-khulu, nabo babelinda uYesu naye, bakubona ukunyikima oko, nezo zinto zenzekileyo, boyika kakhulu, besithi, Inyaniso, lo ebenguNyana kaThixo." 
Matthew27:55 Kwaye kukho ke khona abafazi abaninzi, bekhangele bemgama, bona babemlandele uYesu kwakwelaseGalili, bemlungiselela;" 
Matthew27:56 ekwakukho phakathi kwabo uMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina wooYakobi noYose, kwanonina woonyana bakaZebhedi." 
Matthew27:57 Kwathi ke kwakuhlwa, kweza umntu osisityebi waseArimati, ogama linguYosefu, owayengumfundi kaYesu naye." 
Matthew27:58 Yena lowo waya kuPilato, wacela umzimba kaYesu. Waza uPilato wathi makawunikelwe umzimba." 
Matthew27:59 Ewuthabathile ke umzimba uYosefu, wawusongela kwilinen entle emhlophe." 
Matthew27:60 Wawubeka kwelakhe ingcwaba elitsha, abelixhole eweni;waqengqela ilitye elikhulu emnyango wengcwaba elo, wemka." 
Matthew27:61 Baye ke bekhona apho uMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, behleli phantsi malunga nengcwaba." 
Matthew27:62 Ke kaloku ngengomso, eliyimini esemva kwaleyo yokulungiselela, bahlanganisana ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi kuPilato," 
Matthew27:63 besithi, Nkosi, sikhumbule ukuba umlahlekisi lowa wathi esahleli, Emveni kweentsuku ezintathu, ndiya kuvuka." 
Matthew27:64 Yitsho ngoko linqatyiswe ingcwaba, kude kube lusuku lwesithathu, hleze abafundi bakhe beze ebusuku, bambe, bathi ke ebantwini, Uvukile kwabafileyo; luze olokugqibela ulahlekiso lube lubi kunolokuqala." 
Matthew27:65 Wathi ke uPilato kubo, Ninabo abalindi; hambani niye kunqabisa ngoko nazi ngako." 
Matthew27:66 Baya ke bona balinqabisa ingcwaba, ngokulitywina ilitye, bekunye nabalindi." 
Matthew28:1 Ke kaloku, ekupheleni kwesabatha, ekuseni ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, kweza uMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, beza kulikhangela ingcwaba." 
Matthew28:2 Kwasuka kwabakho unyikimo olukhulu; kuba kwakuhle isithunywa seNkosi emazulwini, seza saliqengqa ilitye lesuka emnyango, sahlala phezu kwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Ukubonakala kwaso ke kwaye kunjengombane, nesambatho saso saye simhlophe njengekhephu." 
Matthew28:4 Ngokoyika sona ke bangcangcazela abalindi, baba njengabafileyo." 
Matthew28:5 Saphendula ke isithunywa sathi kubafazi abo, Musani ukoyika nina; kuba ndiyazi ukuba nifuna uYesu, lowo ubebethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew28:6 Akakho apha; kuba uvukile, njengoko watshoyo; yizani niyibone indawo apho ibilele khona iNkosi." 
Matthew28:7 Yiyani ngokukhawuleza, nibaxelele abafundi bakhe ukuthi uvukile kwabafileyo; niyabona, uyanandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili; nombona khona apho. Yabonani, ndinixelele." 
Matthew28:8 Bephume kamsinya engcwabeni, benokoyika nokuvuya okukhulu, bagidima baya kubabikela abafundi bakhe." 
Matthew28:9 Ke kaloku, xa baya kubabikela abafundi bakhe, wathi thu uYesu, wabahlangabeza, esithi, Vuyani. Beza ke bambamba ngeenyawo, baqubuda kuye." 
Matthew28:10 Aze athi uYesu kubo, Musani ukoyika; yiyani kubatyela abazalwana bam ukuba baye eGalili; bondibona khona apho." 
Matthew28:11 Bakubon ukuba bayaya ke, kwesuka kwafika abathile babalindi kuwo umzi, bababikela ababingeleli abakhulu zonke izinto ezenzekileyo." 
Matthew28:12 Bathe bona, bakuhlanganisana namadoda amakhulu, bakubhunga, bawanika imali eninzi amasoldati lawo," 
Matthew28:13 besithi, Ze nithi, Abafundi bakhe beza ngobusuku, bamba silele." 
Matthew28:14 Nokuba ithe yavakala le nto kwirhuluneli, thina soyithomalalisa, senze ningabi naxhala nina." 
Matthew28:15 Ayithabatha ke imali leyo, enza njengoko abexelelwe ngako.Laza elo zwi laduma kumaYuda, kwada kwanamhlanje." 
Matthew28:16 Bahamba ke abafundi abalishumi eli namnye, baya kwelaseGalili, kuloo ntaba wayebayalele yona uYesu." 
Matthew28:17 Baza bakumbona baqubuda kuye; ke inxenye yathandabuza. 
Matthew28:18 Weza uYesu wathetha kubo, esithi, Linikwe mna lonke igunya emazulwini nasehlabathini." 
Matthew28:19 Hambani ngoko niye kuzenza abafundi zonke iintlanga, nibabhaptizela egameni loYise, loNyana, loMoya oyiNgcwele;" 
Matthew28:20 nibafundisa ukuba bazigcine zonke izinto endiniwisele umthetho ngazo. Niyabona, mna ndinani yonke imihla, kude kube sekuphelisweni kwephakade eli. Amen." 
Mark1:1 Ukuqaleka kwayo ivangeli kaYesu Kristu, uNyana kaThixo." 
Mark1:2 Njengoko kubhaliweyo ebaprofetini, kwathiwa, Yabona, mna ndithuma umthunywa wam ngaphambi kobuso bakho, Oya kuyilungisa indlela yakho phambi kwakho." 
Mark1:3 Izwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Wulungiseni umendo weNkosi; Zityenenezeni iindlela zayo!" 
Mark1:4 Kwaye kukho uYohane, ebhaptiza entlango, evakalisa ubhaptizo lwenguquko, ukuze kuxolelwe izono." 
Mark1:5 Laye liphuma lisiya kuye lonke ilizwe lakwaYuda nabaseYerusalem; baye bonke bebhaptizwa nguye eYordan emlanjeni, bezixela izono zabo." 
Mark1:6 Waye ke kaloku uYohane ambethe uboya benkamela, enombhinqo wentlonze esinqeni sakhe, abe ke esidla iinkumbi nobusi basendle." 
Mark1:7 Wayememeza esithi, Emva kwam kuza lowo unamandla kunam, endingafanelekileyo ukuba ndithobe phantsi, ndiwuthukulule nomtya weembadada zakhe." 
Mark1:8 Mna okunene ndanibhaptiza ngamanzi, ke yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Mark1:9 Kwathi ngaloo mihla kweza uYesu, evela eNazarete yelaseGalili, wabhaptizwa nguYohane eYordan apho." 
Mark1:10 Uthe kwaoko, akuba enyuka ephuma emanzini, walibona izulu likrazulwe, noMoya enjengehobe, esihla phezu kwakhe." 
Mark1:11 Kwabakho nezwi eliphuma ezulwini, lisithi, Wena unguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo nguye." 
Mark1:12 Uthi kwaoko uMoya amkhuphele entlango. 
Mark1:13 Waye esentlango apho iintsuku ezimashumi mane, ehendwa nguSathana; waye endawonye namarhamncwa; zaye izithunywa zezulu zimlungiselela." 
Mark1:14 Ke kaloku emveni kokufakwa kukaYohane entolongweni, weza uYesu kwelaseGalili, evakalisa iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukaThixo," 
Mark1:15 esithi, Lizalisekile ixesha, nobukumkani bukaThixo busondele; guqukani, nikholwe kuzo iindaba ezilungileyo ezi." 
Mark1:16 Uthe ke, ehamba ngaselwandle lwaseGalili, wabona uSimon, noAndreya umzalwana wakhe, bephosa umnatha elwandle; ngokuba babengababambisi beentlanzi." 
Mark1:17 Wathi kubo uYesu, Yizani apha nindilandele; ndonenza nibe ngababambisi babantu." 
Mark1:18 Bayishiya kwaoko iminatha yabo, bamlandela." 
Mark1:19 Uhambele phambili kancinane esuka apho, wabona uYakobi, lo kaZebhedi, noYohane, umzalwana wakhe, besemkhombeni wabo, beyilungisa iminatha yabo." 
Mark1:20 Wababiza kwaoko; bamshiya uyise uZebhedi emkhombeni enabaqeshwa, besuka bamlandela." 
Mark1:21 Bangena eKapernahum. Engene kwaoko ngesabatha endlwini yesikhungu, wafundisa." 
Mark1:22 Bakhwankqiswa kukufundisa kwakhe; ngokuba ebebafundisa njengonegunya, engafundisi njengabo ababhali." 
Mark1:23 Kwaye kukho endlwini yabo yesikhungu umntu onomoya ongcolileyo; wakhala," 
Mark1:24 esithi, Yoo! Yini na enathi nawe, Yesu waseNazarete? Uze kusitshabalalisa na? Ndiyakwazi wena, lowo unguye;ungoyiNgcwele kaThixo." 
Mark1:25 Wawukhalimela uYesu, esithi, Yithi tu, uphume kuye." 
Mark1:26 Uthe umoya ongcolileyo wambetha wee xhwenene; wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, waphuma kuye." 
Mark1:27 Baqhiphuka umbilini bonke, ngokokude babuzisane, besithi, Yintoni na le nto? Le mfundiso intsha yiyiphi na, le nto noomoya abangcolileyo aba abathethela ngegunya, bamlulamele?" 
Mark1:28 Lwaphuma ke kwaoko udumo lwakhe; lwaya kuwo wonke ummandla welaseGalili. 
Mark1:29 Kwaoko, bakuphuma endlwini yesikhungu, bangena endlwini kaSimon noAndreya, benoYakobi noYohane." 
Mark1:30 Ke kaloku umkhwekazi kaSimon wayelele, esifa yicesina;bamxelela ngaye kwaoko." 
Mark1:31 Weza ke kuye, wamvusa embambe ngesandla; yamyeka kwaoko icesina, wabalungiselela." 
Mark1:32 Ke kaloku, kwakuhlwa, xa litshonayo ilanga, bazisa kuye bonke ababesifa, nababephethwe ziidemon." 
Mark1:33 Waye umzi wonke uhlanganisene ndawonye emnyango apho. 
Mark1:34 Waphilisa babaninzi ababesifa zizifo ngezifo; wakhupha needemon ezininzi; waye engazivumeli iidemon ukuba zithethe, kuba bezimazi." 
Mark1:35 Uthe kusasa, kusemnyama kakhulu, wavuka, waphuma waya endaweni eyintlango, wathandaza khona apho." 
Mark1:36 Bamphuthuma ooSimon nabo babenaye. 
Mark1:37 Bemfumene bathi kuye, Bonke bayakufuna." 
Mark1:38 Athi kubo, Masihambe siye emizini ekufuphi, ukuze nakhona ndivakalise iindaba ezilungileyo, kuba ndiphumele oko." 
Mark1:39 Wayevakalisa ke ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu kulo lonke elaseGalili, ezikhupha needemon." 
Mark1:40 Kweza kuye oneqhenqa, embongoza, esiwa ngamadolo phambi kwakhe, esithi kuye, Ukuba uyathanda, unako ukundihlambulula." 
Mark1:41 UYesu, esikwe yimfesane ke, wasolula isandla, wamchukumisa, wathi kuye, Ndiyathanda; hlambuluka." 
Mark1:42 Akutsho, lemka kwaoko kuye iqhenqa, wahlambuluka." 
Mark1:43 Akuba emyalile kalukhuni, wamkhupha kwaoko." 
Mark1:44 Athi kuye, Lumka ungaxeleli bani nento le; hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, usondeze ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwakho ezo zinto wamisa zona uMoses, zibe bubungqina kubo." 
Mark1:45 Ke yena, akuphuma, waqala ukuyivakalisa kakhulu nokuyibhengeza loo ndawo, ngokokude angabi saba nako uYesu ukungena mzini ekuhleni; waba ngaphandle ezindaweni eziziintlango; babesithi beze kuye bevela ngeenxa zonke." 
Mark2:1 Kwakuba ntsuku, wabuya wangena eKapernahum; kwavakala ukuba usekhaya," 
Mark2:2 Kwaoko kwahlanganisana into eninzi yabantu, ngokokude kungabi sabakho kukhwelelana, nakule mimandla isemnyango;wayelithetha ke kubo ilizwi." 
Mark2:3 Kuthi kufike kuye abantu bezisa onedumbe, ethwelwe ngabane." 
Mark2:4 Bakuba bengenakusondela kuye ngenxa yendimbane, banqika entungo apho abekhona; bakuba begqobhozile, baluhlisa ukhuko abelele kulo lowo unedumbe." 
Mark2:5 Akulubona ke uYesu ukholo lwabo, wathi konedumbe, Mntwana wam, uzixolelwe izono zakho." 
Mark2:6 Kwaye ke kukho apho ababhali abathile behleli, becamanga ezintliziyweni zabo, besithi," 
Mark2:7 Yini na ukuba lo enjenje ukuthetha izinyeliso? Ngubani na onako ukuxolela izono, mnye kwaphela, nguThixo?" 
Mark2:8 Eqiqe kwaoko uYesu ngomoya wakhe, ukuba benjenjalo ukucamanga ngaphakathi kwabo, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nicamange ezi zinto ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Mark2:9 Okhona kulula kukuphi na: kukho ukuthi konedumbe, Uzixolelwe izono; kukho nokuthi, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe?" 
Mark2:10 Ke ukuze nazi ukuba unalo igunya uNyana woMntu lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha (uthi konedumbe)," 
Mark2:11 Ndithi kuwe, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uye endlwini yakho." 
Mark2:12 Wavuka kwaoko, waluthabatha ukhuko, waphuma phambi kwabo bonke, ngokokude bathi nqa bonke, bamzukise uThixo, besithi, Asizanga sikubone okunje." 
Mark2:13 Wabuya waphuma waya ngaselwandle, saye sonke isihlwele sisiza kuye; wayebafundisa." 
Mark2:14 Wathi edlula, wabona uLevi, lo ka-Alifeyu, ehleli endaweni yerhafu; athi kuye, Ndilandele. Wesuka wamlandela." 
Mark2:15 Kwathi ekuhlaleni kwakhe ngasesithebeni endlwini yakhe, kwahlala nento eninzi yababuthi berhafu naboni ndawonye noYesu nabafundi bakhe; kuba babebaninzi, baye ke bemlandela." 
Mark2:16 Baye ababhali kwanabaFarisi, bakumbona esidla ndawonye nababuthi berhafu naboni, besithi kubafundi bakhe. Yini na ukuba adle asele nababuthi berhafu naboni?" 
Mark2:17 Ekuvile ke oko uYesu, wathi kubo, Akufuneki gqirha kwabaphili leyo lifuneka kwabafayo. Andize kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni, ukuba baguquke." 
Mark2:18 Baye abafundi bakaYohane nababaFarisi bezila ukudla; beze bathi kuye, Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakaYohane nababaFarisi bazile ukudla, kanti ke abakho abafundi abakuzili bona?" 
Mark2:19 Wathi uYesu kubo, Banako yini na abegumbi lomtshakazi ukuzila ukudla, xa anabo umyeni? Lo gama wonke asekubo umyeni, abanako ukuzila ukudla." 
Mark2:20 Ke kofika mihla awoza asuswe kubo umyeni; baya kwandula ke ukuzila ngaloo mihla. 
Mark2:21 Akukho uthungela isiziba somchako omtsha engutyeni endala;okanye ke eso sifakiweyo, sitsha, sokrazula kuyo endala, sibe sibi ngokunye isikroba." 
Mark2:22 Kanjalo akukho utha iwayini entsha ezintsubeni ezindala;okanye iwayini, leyo intsha, yozigqabhuza iintsuba, iphalale iwayini, zitshabalale neentsuba; yona iwayini entsha imelwe kukuthiwa ezintsubeni ezintsha." 
Mark2:23 Kwathi ehamba ecanda emasimini ngesabatha, baqala abafundi bakhe ukuhamba besikha izikhwebu." 
Mark2:24 Baye besithi kuye abaFarisi, Khangela, yini na ukuba benze ngemini yesabatha oko kungavumelekileyo?" 
Mark2:25 Wathi yena kubo; Anizanga niyilese na into awayenzayo uDavide, oko wayeswele, elambile nokulamba, yena nabo babenaye?" 
Mark2:26 Okokuba wangena endlwini kaThixo ngexesha lika-Abhiyatare umbingeleli omkhulu, wazidla izonka ezibekwe phambi koThixo, ezo kungavumelekileyo ukuba zidliwe ngabo bangebabingeleli, wanika nabo babenaye?" 
Mark2:27 Wayesithi kubo, Isabatha le yabakho ngenxa yomntu, asingumntu owabakhoyo ngenxa yesabatha." 
Mark2:28 Ngoko ke uNyana woMntu lo uyiNkosi yayo nesabatha. 
Mark3:1 Wabuya wangena endlwini yesikhungu. Kwaye kukho apho umntu onesandla esomileyo. 
Mark3:2 Baye bemlalele, ukuba womphilisa na ngesabatha, ukuze bammangalele." 
Mark3:3 Athi kuloo mntu unesandla esomileyo, Phakama uze phakathi." 
Mark3:4 Athi kubo, Okuvumelekileyo ngesabatha kukwenza okulungileyo, kukwenza okubi, kusini na? Kukusindisa, kukubulala, kusini na?Ke bahlala bathi tu." 
Mark3:5 Akuba ebasingasingile ngengqumbo, ebuhlungu ngenxa yokuqaqadeka kwentliziyo yabo, uthi kumntu lowo, Solule isandla sakho. Wasolula, sabuya saphila ke isandla sakhe, saba kwanjengesinye." 
Mark3:6 Baphuma abaFarisi, benza kwaoko ibhunga namaHerode ngaye, lokuba bamtshabalalise." 
Mark3:7 Wemka uYesu nabafundi bakhe, waya elwandle; yamlandela inkitha eninzi, ivela kwelaseGalili, nakwelakwaYuda," 
Mark3:8 naseYerusalem, nakwelakwaIdume, naphesheya kweYordan; nabo bangaseTire nabaseTsidon, inkitha eninzi; bathi, bakuva izinto ezinkulu abezenza, beza kuye." 
Mark3:9 Wathi kubafundi bakhe, umkhonjana mawuhlale umlindile ngenxa yezihlwele, ukuze bangamxini." 
Mark3:10 Kuba waphilisa babaninzi, ngokokude bathi ngunga phezu kwakhe, ukuze bamchukumise bonke ababenezibetho;" 
Mark3:11 nabo oomoya abangcolileyo babesithi, xa sukuba bembona, bawe phantsi kuye, bakhale, besithi, Unguye wena uNyana kaThixo." 
Mark3:12 Wayebakhalimela kakhulu ukuba bangamtyhili. 
Mark3:13 Uthi ke anyuke intaba, abizele kuye abo abethanda ukubabiza yena ngokwakhe; besuka beza kuye." 
Mark3:14 Wadala balishumi elinababini, ukuze babe naye, nokuze abathume baye kuvakalisa ubukumkani bukaThixo," 
Mark3:15 babe negunya lokuziphilisa izifo, nelokuzikhupha iidemon." 
Mark3:16 YanguSimon, awamthiya igama elinguPetros;" 
Mark3:17 yanguYakobi lo kaZebhedi, noYohane umzalwana kaYakobi, awathi bona wabathiya amagama okuba ngooBhowanerges, oko kukuthi, ngabeendudumo;" 
Mark3:18 yanguAndreya, noFilipu, noBhartolomeyu, noMateyu, noTomas, noYakobi, lo ka-Alifeyu, noTadeyu, noSimon Kanan," 
Mark3:19 noYuda Sikariyoti, owamngcatshayo nokumngcatsha." 
Mark3:20 Bathi beze ekhaya; kubuye kubuthelane izihlwele, ngokokude bangabi nako nokudla isonka." 
Mark3:21 Bevile abakowabo, baphuma beya kumbamba; kuba babesithi, Uyageza." 
Mark3:22 Baye bona ababhali, ababehle bevela eYerusalem, besithi, UnoBhelezebhule; besithi, Iidemon ezi uzikhupha ngaye umphathi weedemon." 
Mark3:23 Uthe ebabizele kuye, wathetha nabo ngemizekeliso, esithi, Angathini na uSathana ukukhupha uSathana?" 
Mark3:24 Nobukumkani, ukuba buthe bahlulelana bodwa, abunako ukuma obo bukumkani;" 
Mark3:25 nendlu, ukuba ithe yahlulelana yodwa, ayinako ukuma loo ndlu;" 
Mark3:26 noSathana, ukuba uthe wazichasa ngokwakhe, wahlulelana yedwa, akanako ukuma, uphelile." 
Mark3:27 Akukho unako ukuthi impahla yegorha angene endlwini yalo ayiphange, ukuba akathanga tanci alibophe igorha elo, andule ukuyiphanga indlu yalo." 
Mark3:28 Inene ndithi kuni, Zonke izono baya kuzixolelwa oonyana babantu, kwanezinyeliso abasukuba benyelisa ngazo;" 
Mark3:29 ke yena othe wanyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele, akanako ukuxolelwa naphakade; unetyala lokugwetywa okungunaphakade." 
Mark3:30 Watsho kuba besithi, Unomoya ongcolileyo." 
Mark3:31 Bafika ke kaloku abazalwana bakhe nonina; bathi, bemi ngaphandle, bathumela kuye bembiza." 
Mark3:32 Zaye izihlwele zihleli zimphahlile; bathi kuye, Nanku unyoko nabazalwana bakho ngaphandle, bekufuna." 
Mark3:33 Wabaphendula esithi, Ngubani na uma? Ngoobani na nabazalwana bam?" 
Mark3:34 Akuba ebasingasingile ngeenxa zonke ababehleli bemphahlile, uthi, Nanku uma nabazalwana bam." 
Mark3:35 Kuba othe wakwenza ukuthanda kukaThixo, lowo ngumzalwana wam, nodade wethu, noma." 
Mark4:1 Wabuya waqala ukufundisa ngaselwandle. Kwahlanganisana kuye isihlwele esikhulu, ngokokude aye kungena emkhombeni, ahlale elwandle yena; sabe sonke isihlwele sisemhlabeni, sibheke elwandle apho." 
Mark4:2 Wayebafundisa iindawo ezininzi ngemizekeliso. Ubesithi kubo ekubafundiseni kwakhe," 
Mark4:3 Phulaphulani; yabonani, umhlwayeli waphuma waya kuhlwayela;" 
Mark4:4 kwathi ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe, inxalenye yembewu yawa ngasendleleni, zeza iintaka zezulu zayidla zayigqiba." 
Mark4:5 Enye yawa endaweni elulwalwa, apho ibingenamhlaba mninzi;yantshula ke kwaoko, ngenxa yokuba ibingenabunzulu bamhlaba;" 
Mark4:6 ithe ke, lakuphuma ilanga, yatsha, yathi ngenxa yokuba ingenangcambu, yoma kwaphela." 
Mark4:7 Yimbi yawa emithaneni enameva; yakhula imithana enameva yayiminxa; ayanika siqhamo. 
Mark4:8 Yimbi yawa kuwo wona umhlaba omhle, yanika isiqhamo esakhulayo sachuma; yathwala amashumi amathathu enye, namashumi amathandathu enye, nekhulu enye." 
Mark4:9 Wathi kubo, Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve." 
Mark4:10 Ke kaloku, xa abeyedwa, abo babemphahlile, ndawonye nabalishumi elinababini, bambuza umzekeliso lowo." 
Mark4:11 Wathi kubo, Nikuphiwe nina ukuyazi imfihlelo yobukumkani bukaThixo; ke kwabo bangaphandle zonke izinto ezi zibakho ngemizekeliso;" 
Mark4:12 ukuze bebona nje, babone bangaqiqi; besiva nje, beve bangaqondi; hleze babuye, zebaxolelwe izono zabo." 
Mark4:13 Athi kubo, Aniwazi na lo mzekeliso? Nothini na ke ukuyazi imizekeliso yonke?" 
Mark4:14 Umhlwayeli lo uhlwayela ilizwi. 
Mark4:15 Abo ke bangasendleni, apho ilizwi lihlwayelwa khona, ngaba kuthi, xa bathe beva, afike kwaoko uSathana, alithabathe ilizwi elihlwayelweyo ezintliziyweni zabo." 
Mark4:16 Ngokunjalo abo bahlwayelwayo ezindaweni ezilulwalwa ngabathi, xa bathe baliva ilizwi, balamkele kwaoko bevuya;" 
Mark4:17 babe bengenangcambu ngaphakathi kwabo, beme umzuzwana kodwa; bathi kamva, kwakuhla imbandezelo, nokuba yintshutshiso, ngenxa yelizwi, bakhutyekiswe kwaoko." 
Mark4:18 Abo bahlwayelwayo emithaneni enameva ngaba, bathi balive ilizwi;" 
Mark4:19 aze amaxhala eli phakade, nokulukuhla kobutyebi, neenkanuko zezinye izinto, zingene ziliminxe ilizwi, lisuke lingabi nasiqhamo." 
Mark4:20 Abo bahlwayelweyo kuwo umhlaba omhle ngaba, basakuthi balive ilizwi, balamkele, baxakathe isiqhamo, omnye amashumi amathathu, omnye amashumi amathandathu, nomnye ikhulu." 
Mark4:21 Wayesithi kubo, Isibane esi sikha siziswe ukuze sibekwe ngaphantsi kwesitya yini na, nokuba kuphantsi kwesingqengqelo?Asiziswa na ukuze sibekwe esiphathweni saso?" 
Mark4:22 Kuba akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kubonakaliswa;kananjalo akubangakho nto ifihliweyo ingafihlelwa ukuba ize ekuhleni. 
Mark4:23 Ukuba ubani uneendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Mark4:24 Wayesithi kubo, Yilumkeleni into eniyivayo; umlinganiselo enilinganisela ngawo, niya kulinganiselwa ngawo nani, kongezwe kuni nina nivayo." 
Mark4:25 Kuba osukuba enako uya kunikwa, nongenako uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako." 
Mark4:26 Wayesithi, Ubukumkani bukaThixo bunjengokuba abengathi umntu aphose imbewu emhlabeni;" 
Mark4:27 aze alale, avuke, ubusuku nemini, ibe imbewu intshula ikhula ngohlobo angalwaziyo." 
Mark4:28 Kuba umhlaba uvelisa iziqhamo ngokwawo, kuqala ibe likhaba, ize ibe sisikhwebu, ize ibe yingqolowa ezalisekileyo esikhwebini;" 
Mark4:29 athi ke, xa sithe savuthwa isiqhamo, alifake kwaoko irhengqa, ngokuba kusekusondele ukuvuna." 
Mark4:30 Wayesithi, Siya kubufanekisa nantoni na ubukumkani bukaThixo? Siya kubuzekelisa ngamzekeliso mni na?" 
Mark4:31 Bunjengokhozo lwemostade; lona luthi, xa sukuba luhlwayelwa emhlabeni, lube luloluncinane kuzo zonke iimbewu ezisemhlabeni;" 
Mark4:32 luthi ke, xa luthe lwahlwayelwa, lukhule lube lukhulu kuyo yonke imifuno, lwenze amasebe amakhulu, ngokokude iintaka zezulu zibe nako ukuhlala phantsi komthunzi walo." 
Mark4:33 Wayelithetha kubo ilizwi ngemizekeliso emininzi enjalo, njengoko baye benako ukuva." 
Mark4:34 Ubengathethi ke kubo kungengamzekeliso; ke ubesithi, bakuba bodwa, abacombululele iindawo zonke abafundi bakhe." 
Mark4:35 Athi kubo kwangaloo mini, kwakuhlwa, Masiwele siye ngaphesheya." 
Mark4:36 Besindulule isihlwele, bamthabatha esemkhombeni njalo;kwaye ke kukho eminye imikhonjana inaye." 
Mark4:37 Kwabakho uqhwithela olukhulu lomoya; aye ke amaza ephoseka emkhombeni, abetha wafuna ukuzala kwangoku." 
Mark4:38 Waye yena esesinqeni somkhombe, elele ubuthongo phezu komqamelo; bamvuse, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, akukhathali na, sitshabalala nje?" 
Mark4:39 Wavuka, wawukhalimela umoya, wathi kulo ulwandle, Hlala uthi tu, uthi cwaka! Wadamba umoya, kwabakho ukuzola okukhulu." 
Mark4:40 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nibe nje, ukuba ngamagwala?Kutheni na, le nto ningenalukholo?" 
Mark4:41 Boyika ngoloyiko olukhulu, batshono ukuthi, Ngubani na ke lo, le nto alulanyelwa nangumoya nalulwandle?" 
Mark5:1 Bafika phesheya kolwandle kummandla wabaseGadara. 
Mark5:2 Akuba ephumile emkhombeni, wahlangatyezwa kwaoko ngumntu onomoya ongcolileyo, ephuma emangcwabeni," 
Mark5:3 obehlala emangcwabeni apho. Kwaye kungekho bani unako ukumbopha nangemixokelelwane; 
Mark5:4 ngenxa yokuba wayebotshwe futhi ngamakhamandela nangemixokelelwane, asuke ayijace yena imixokelelwane, awakroboze namakhamandela; kwaye kungekho bani unamandla okumdambisa." 
Mark5:5 Ube ehlala ubusuku nemini esezintabeni nasemangcwabeni, ekhala, ezijeca ngamatye." 
Mark5:6 Uthe ke akumbona UYesu ekude, wagidima, waya waqubuda kuye," 
Mark5:7 wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Yini na enam nawe, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo Osenyangweni? Ndiya kufungisa uThixo ukuba ungandithuthumbisi." 
Mark5:8 Kuba ebethe kuye, Phuma emntwini apho, moyandini ungcolileyo." 
Mark5:9 Wayembuza esithi, Ungubani na wena igama? Waphendula esithi, NguMkhosi igama lam; kuba sibaninzi." 
Mark5:10 Waye ke embongoza kakhulu ukuba angabandululi bemke kwelo zwe. 
Mark5:11 Bekukho ke apho ngasezintabeni ugxuba olukhulu lweehagu lusidla. 
Mark5:12 Zambongoza zonke iidemon, zisithi, Sithumele ezihagwini, ukuze singene kuzo." 
Mark5:13 Wazivumela kwaoko uYesu. Baphuma ke oomoya abangcolileyo, baya kungena ezihagwini; lwaza ugxuba lwaphaphatheka, lwehla eweni, lwela elwandle; zaye ke iihagu ezo ngathi zimawaka mabini; zarhaxwa elwandle apho." 
Mark5:14 Bathe ke abo babezalusa iihagu basaba, babika ekhaya nasemaphandleni. Baphuma ke baya kuyibona loo nto ihlileyo, ukuba iyintoni na." 
Mark5:15 Bafike kuYesu, bambone obephethwe ziidemon, lowo ke wayenomkhosi, ehleli, ambathisiwe, enengqondo ephilileyo; baza boyika." 
Mark5:16 Abo babeyibonile le nto babacokisela, ukuba kuthekeni na kobephethwe ziidemon; kwanokweehagu." 
Mark5:17 Baqala ukumbongoza ukuba emke emideni yabo. 
Mark5:18 Akubon ukuba ungene emkhombeni, wathi lowo ubephethwe ziidemon wambongoza ukuba abe naye." 
Mark5:19 Kodwa uYesu akamvumelanga. Usuke wathi kuye, Hamba, uye endlwini yakho kwabakowenu, ubabikele oko zingako ukuba zinkulu izinto ekwenzele zona iNkosi, yaba nenceba engaka kuwe." 
Mark5:20 Wemka, waqala ukuzivakalisa eDekapoli oko zingako ukuba zinkulu izinto uYesu abemenzele zona; bamangaliswa bonke." 
Mark5:21 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba uYesu uwelile ngomkhombe, wabuya weza kwelinye icala, kwahlanganisana kuye isihlwele esikhulu;waye engaselwandle apho." 
Mark5:22 Kubonakele kusiza omnye wakubaphathi bendlu yesikhungu, ogama linguYayiro; athi akumbona, awe ezinyaweni zakhe," 
Mark5:23 ambongoze kunene, esithi, Intombazana yam isindekile;khawuze uzibeke izandla phezu kwayo, ukuze isindiswe; yophila." 
Mark5:24 Wesuka wahamba naye; yaye indimbane enkulu imlandela, imxinile." 
Mark5:25 Intokazi ethile, eyayinethombo legazi iminyaka elishumi elinamibini," 
Mark5:26 eyayive ubunzima obuninzi kumagqirha amaninzi, eyayidleke konke ebinako, ingasizakali lutho, imana ukuba mandundu:" 
Mark5:27 yathi yakuva ngaye uYesu, yeza phakathi kwesihlwele ngasemva, yayichukumisa ingubo yakhe;" 
Mark5:28 kuba ibisithi, Ukuba ndithe ndachukumisa neengubo zakhe ezi, ndosindiswa." 
Mark5:29 Watsha kwaoko umthombo wegazi layo; yeva emzimbeni wayo ukuba iphilisiwe kweso sibetho. 
Mark5:30 UYesu, ethe kwaoko wawazi ngaphakathi kwakhe amandla aphume kuye, wajika esendimbaneni, wathi, Ngubani na ochukumise iingubo zam?" 
Mark5:31 Bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Ubona nje ukuba isihlwele sikuxinile, utsho na ukuthi, Ngubani na ondichukumisileyo?" 
Mark5:32 Wasingasinga, ukuba ambone lowo uyenzileyo le nto." 
Mark5:33 Ithe ke intokazi leyo, isoyika, igubha, ikwazi oko kwenzekileyo kuyo, yeza yawa phantsi kuye, yamxelela inyaniso yonke." 
Mark5:34 Wathi ke kuyo, Ntombi yam, ukholo lwakho lukusindisile;hamba unoxolo, phila kweso sibetho sakho." 
Mark5:35 Kuthi esathetha yena, kufike abakulomphathi wendlu yesikhungu, besithi, Intombi yakho ifile; usamkhathazelani na uMfundisi?" 
Mark5:36 Aze kwaoko uYesu, elivile elo zwi lithethwa, athi kumphathi wendlu yesikhungu, Musa ukoyika, kholwa kodwa wena." 
Mark5:37 Akavumela mntu ukuba alandelane naye, kwakuphela nguPetros noYakobi noYohane, umzalwana kaYakobi." 
Mark5:38 Afike endlwini yomphathi wendlu yesikhungu, abone isiphithiphithi, abalilayo nabenza isijwili esikhulu." 
Mark5:39 Akungena uthi kubo, Yini na ukuba niphithizele nilile?Akafile umntwana, ulele." 
Mark5:40 Basuka bamwa ngentsini. Athi akubakhupha bona bonke, amthabathe uyise womntwana nonina, nabo babenaye, angene apho wayelele khona umntwana." 
Mark5:41 Ambambe ngesandla umntwana, athi kuye, Talita, kumi; oko kukuthi, ngentetho evakalayo, Ntombazana, ndithi kuwe, Vuka!" 
Mark5:42 Yavuka kwaoko intombazana leyo, yahambahamba; kuba ibiminyaka ilishumi elinamibini izelwe. Bathi nqa ngokuthi nqa okukhulu." 
Mark5:43 Wabayala kakhulu ukuba kungaziwa mntu oku; watsho nokuthi, mayiphiwe idle." 
Mark6:1 Waphuma apho ke weza kwelakowabo; bamlandela abafundi bakhe. 
Mark6:2 Uthe kwakubakho isabatha, waqala ukufundisa endlwini yesikhungu; baza abaninzi, bakuva, bakhwankqiswa, besithi, Lo uzizuze phi na ezi zinto? Bubulumko buni na obu abunikiweyo, le nto nemisebenzi yamandla enjengale yenzekayo ngezandla zakhe?" 
Mark6:3 Lo akayiyo na ingcibi yokwakha, unyana kaMariya, umzalwana ke kaYakobi noYose noYuda noSimon? Noodade babo abakuthi apha na? Baye bekhubeka kuye." 
Mark6:4 Wayesithi ke uYesu kubo, Umprofeti akasweli mbeko, kungaba kukowabo, nakwizizalwana zakhe, nakokwabo." 
Mark6:5 Wayengenako ukwenza na mnye umsebenzi wamandla khona apho, kwakuphela ukubeka izandla phezu kwemilwelwe embalwa, wayiphilisa." 
Mark6:6 Wamangaliswa kukungakholwa kwabo. Wayeyihambahamba imizana ejikeleza, efundisa." 
Mark6:7 Ubabizele kuye abalishumi elinababini, waqala ukubathuma ngababini, ngababini; wayebanika igunya koomoya abangcolileyo;" 
Mark6:8 wabathethela ngelithi, mabangaphathi nto yandlela, ibe ngumsimelelo wodwa; bangaphathi ngxowa, nasonka, namali embhinqweni;" 
Mark6:9 bathi kodwa banxibe izixathula; bangambathi neengubo zangaphantsi ngambini. 
Mark6:10 Wayesithi kubo, Apho nithe nangena endlwini, hlalani khona nide nimke kuloo ndawo." 
Mark6:11 Abo sukuba benganamkeli, benganiva nokuniva, nakuphuma kuloo ndawo, vuthululani uthuli oluphantsi kweenyawo zenu, kube bubungqina oko kubo. Inene ndithi kuni, Koba nokunyamezeleka okweSodom nokweGomora ngomhla womgwebo, kunokwaloo mzi." 
Mark6:12 Baphuma bavakalisa ukuba mabaguquke abantu. 
Mark6:13 Bakhupha needemon ezininzi, bayithambisa ngeoli imilwelwe emininzi, beyiphilisa." 
Mark6:14 Ke kaloku wakuva oko ukumkani uHerode (kuba igama lakhe lalithe laduma); wayesithi, Uvukile kwabafileyo uYohane umbhaptizi; ngenxa yoko le misebenzi yamandla iyenzeka ngaye." 
Mark6:15 Baye abanye besithi, NguEliya; baye ke abanye besithi, Ngumprofeti, nokuba ufana nomnye wakubaprofeti." 
Mark6:16 Ekuvile ke oko uHerode, wathi, Lo nguYohane, lowa ndamnqamla intloko mna; uvukile kwabafileyo." 
Mark6:17 Kuba uHerode ngokwakhe wabethe wathuma, wambamba uYohane, wambopha entolongweni, ngenxa kaHerodiya, umfazi kaFilipu umzalwana wakhe; kuba ebemzekile." 
Mark6:18 Kuba wayesithi uYohane kuHerode, Akuvumelekile ukuba ube nomfazi womzalwana wakho." 
Mark6:19 Ke kaloku uHerodiya waba nenqala ngakuye, wafuna ukumbulala; kodwa akabanga nako;" 
Mark6:20 kuba uHerode wayemoyika uYohane, emazi ukuba uyindoda elilungisa, engcwele, wayemgcinile; wayesithi ke akumva, enze iindawo ezininzi, amve kamnandi." 
Mark6:21 Kwathi, kwakufika umhla owamlungelayo uHerodiya, xeshikweni uHerode ngemini yokuzalwa kwakhe wayezenzela isidlo izidwangube zakhe, nabathetheli-waka, namanene elaseGalili," 
Mark6:22 yakubon ukuba ingene intombi kaHerodiya lowo, yangqungqa, yamkholisa uHerode nabo babehleli ndawonye naye. Wathi ukumkani kwintombazana leyo, Ndicele into osukuba uyithanda; ndokupha." 
Mark6:23 Wayifungela ngelithi, Into othe wayicela kum ndokupha, kude kube kwisiqingatha sobukumkani bam." 
Mark6:24 Iphumile ke yathi kunina, Ndicele ntoni na? Wathi ke yena, Intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi." 
Mark6:25 Yeza kungena kwaoko ngokungxama kuye ukumkani, yacela, isithi, Ndithanda ukuba undinike kalokunje ngesitya intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi." 
Mark6:26 Waba buhlungu kakhulu ukumkani; noko, ngenxa yezifungo zakhe, nangenxa yabo babehleli ndawonye naye, akathandanga kuyilandulela." 
Mark6:27 Uthe kwaoko ukumkani wasusa umsiki, wamthethela ngelithi, mayiziswe intloko yakhe. Wesuka waya ke lowo, wamnqumla intloko entolongweni." 
Mark6:28 Wayizisa intloko yakhe ngesitya, wayinika intombazana leyo;yaza intombazana yayinika unina." 
Mark6:29 Bekuvile oko abafundi bakhe, beza basithabatha isidumbu sakhe, basibeka engcwabeni." 
Mark6:30 Bathi bahlanganisana abapostile kuYesu, bambikela iinto zonke, ezo babezenzile, kwanezo babezifundisile." 
Mark6:31 Wathi kubo, Yizani nina ngasese kwindawo eyintlango, niphumle kancinane; kuba bebaninzi abezayo nabemkayo;babengenalo ke nethutyana lokuba badle." 
Mark6:32 Bemka ngomkhombe ngasese, baya kwindawo eyintlango." 
Mark6:33 Isihlwele sababona bemka bathi abaninzi bamazi, babalekela khona ngeenyawo, bevela kuyo yonke imizi; babaphangela, bathuthelana kuye." 
Mark6:34 Uthe ke akuphuma uYesu, wabona isihlwele esikhulu; wasikwa yimfesane ngabo, ngokuba babenjengezimvu ezingenamalusi; waqala ukubafundisa iindawo ezininzi." 
Mark6:35 Kuthi kwakubon ukuba seyihambile kakhulu imini, beze kuye abafundi bakhe, bathi, Le ndawo iyintlango, nemini seyihambile kakhulu;" 
Mark6:36 bandulule bemke, baye emaphandleni ajikelezileyo nasemizaneni, bazithengele izonka; kuba bengenanto bangayidlayo." 
Mark6:37 Waphendula wathi kubo, Bapheni nina badle. Bathi kuye, Simke na siye kuthenga izonka ngeedenariyo ezimakhulu mabini, sibaphe badle?" 
Mark6:38 Uthi ke yena kubo, Izonka eninazo zingaphi na? Hambani niye kukhangela. Besazi, bathi, Zihlanu, neentlanzi ezimbini." 
Mark6:39 Wabathethela ngelithi, mababangqengqise bonke, babe ziziqhu ngeziqhu engceni eluhlaza." 
Mark6:40 Bahlala phantsi beziingcamba ngeengcamba ngamakhulu, nangamashumi ngamahlanu." 
Mark6:41 Wazithabatha izonka zozihlanu neentlanzi zombini, wathi ekhangele ezulwini wasikelela, waziqhekeza izonka, wanika abafundi bakhe, ukuba babeke phambi kwabo; wathi neentlanzi zombini wazabela bona bonke." 
Mark6:42 Badla ke bonke bahlutha. 
Mark6:43 Baza basusa izitya zizele ngamaqhekeza zalishumi elinazibini, basusa nakwiintlanzi." 
Mark6:44 Baye abo babezidla izonka ezo bekumawaka omahlanu amadoda. 
Mark6:45 Wabanyanzela kwaoko abafundi bakhe ukuba bangene emkhombeni, bamandulele baye ngaphesheya eBhetesayida, lo gama asindululayo isihlwele yena."
