Mark6:46 Akuba ebulisene nabo, wemka waya kuthandaza entabeni." 
Mark6:47 Ke kaloku, kwakuhlwa, umkhombe ubuphakathi elwandle, waye yena eyedwa emhlabeni." 
Mark6:48 Wababona bebulaleka ekuqhubeni; kuba umoya ububavele ngaphambili. Athi ngolwesine ulindo lobusuku eze kubo, ehamba phezu kolwandle; wanga uza kugqitha kubo." 
Mark6:49 Bathi ke, bakumbona ehamba phezu kolwandle, baba ngumshologu, bakhala;" 
Mark6:50 kuba bonke bambona, bakhathazeka. Wathetha kwaoko nabo, wathi kubo, Yomelelani; ndim; musani ukoyika." 
Mark6:51 Wenyuka waya kubo emkhombeni, wadamba umoya. Bathi nqa ngaphakathi kwabo ngokuncamisileyo kunene, bamangaliswa;" 
Mark6:52 kuba bengakuqondanga okwezonka; kuba intliziyo yabo yabe iqaqadekile. 
Mark6:53 Bakuphumela, bafika ezweni laseGenesarete, batsalela elunxwemeni." 
Mark6:54 Bakuphuma emkhombeni, bamazi kwaoko abantu;" 
Mark6:55 bawubaleka wonke loo mmandla, baqala ukubathwala ngeenkuko abafayo, bebasa apho babemva ukuba ukhona." 
Mark6:56 Nalapho sukuba ebengena khona, nokuba kusemzaneni, nokuba kusemzini, nokuba kusemaphandleni, babesithi, bababeke abafayo ezindaweni zembutho, bambongoze ukuba khe bachukumise intshinga yengubo yakhe. Baye ke besindiswa abasukuba bemchukumisa." 
Mark7:1 Kwahlanganisana kuye abaFarisi, nabathile kubabhali, bevela eYerusalem;" 
Mark7:2 bathi, bakubona abathile kubafundi bakhe besidla isonka ngezandla eziziinqambi, oko kukuthi ngezingahlanjwanga, basuka basola." 
Mark7:3 Kuba abaFarisi namaYuda onke abadli, ukuba abakhanga bazihlambe izandla kunene, bebambe isithethe samanyange." 
Mark7:4 Nokuba bavela endaweni yembutho, abadli bengakhanga bahlambe; zikho nezinye izinto ezininzi, abazamkele ukuba bazibambe, ezinjengeentlambo zeendebe, neebhekile, nezitya zobhedu, nezingqengqelo." 
Mark7:5 Bandula bambuza abaFarisi nababhali, besithi, Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakho bangahambi ngokwesithethe samanyange, le nto badla isonka ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?" 
Mark7:6 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Watyapha uIsaya ukuprofeta ngani, bahanahanisi, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Aba bantu bandibeka ngomlomo, Kanti yona intliziyo yabo ikude lee kum." 
Mark7:7 Bafumana ke bendihlonela, Befundisa iimfundiso eziyimithetho yabantu." 
Mark7:8 Kuba nithi, niwuyeka okaThixo umthetho, nibambe isithethe sabantu esinjengeentlambo zeebhekile neendebe; naye nizenza nezinye izinto ezininzi ezinjengezo." 
Mark7:9 Wayesithi kubo, Natyapha kambe niwutshitshise umthetho kaThixo, ukuze nisigcine isithethe senu." 
Mark7:10 Kuba uMoses wathi, Beka uyihlo nonyoko; wathi kanjalo, Omthethela kakubi uyise, nokuba ngunina, makafe ukufa;" 
Mark7:11 ke nina nithi, Ukuba umntu uthe kuyise nokuba kukunina, Ingumsondezo, oko kukuthi, ingumnikelo kuThixo into ongewuba uncedwa ngayo ndim, ukholisile;" 
Mark7:12 ningabi samvumela ukuba amenzele nto, nokuba nguyise nokuba ngunina;" 
Mark7:13 niliphanga igunya ilizwi likaThixo ngesithethe senu enasinikelayo, naye nizenza izinto ezininzi ezinjengezo." 
Mark7:14 Wayibizela kuye yonke indimbane, wathi kubo, Phulaphulani kum nonke, niqonde:" 
Mark7:15 akukho nto ingaphandle komntu ethi ingena kuye ibe nako ukumenza inqambi; zizinto eziphumayo kuye ezimenza inqambi umntu. 
Mark7:16 Ukuba ubani uneendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Mark7:17 Baye ke, xa ebengene endlwini, evela kuyo indimbane, bembuza abafundi bakhe umzekeliso lowo." 
Mark7:18 Athi kubo, Nikwanje nani na ukuswela ingqondo? Aniqiqi na, ukuba konke okungaphandle, okuthi kungene emntwini, akunako ukumenza inqambi?" 
Mark7:19 Ngokuba akungeni khona entliziyweni yakhe; kungena esiswini; ize kuphume kuye endaweni esese, ezihlambululayo zonke izidlo." 
Mark7:20 Wayesithi ke, Into ephumayo emntwini, yiyo leyo emenza inqambi umntu;" 
Mark7:21 kuba ngaphakathi, kuyo intliziyo yomntu, kuphuma izicamango ezibi, ookukrexeza, oomibulo, ookubulala," 
Mark7:22 oobusela, ookubawa, okungendawo, iinkohliso, uburheletyo, umona, ukunyelisa, ukukratsha, ukuswela kuqonda;" 
Mark7:23 zonke ezi zinto zingendawo ziphuma ngaphakathi, zimenze inqambi umntu." 
Mark7:24 Esukile apho ke, waya emideni yaseTire neyaseTsidon.Wangena endlwini, wanga akungaziwa mntu; akaba nako ukufihlakala noko." 
Mark7:25 Kuba yathi yakumva intokazi entombazana ibinomoya ongcolileyo, yafika yawa ezinyaweni zakhe;" 
Mark7:26 yaye ke kaloku intokazi leyo ingumGrikekazi, umSirofenikikazi ngokuzalwa. Yacela kuye ukuba ayikhuphe idemon entombini yayo." 
Mark7:27 Uthe ke uYesu kuyo, Khawuyeke kuhluthe abantwana kuqala;kuba akukuhle ukusithabatha isonka sabantwana, siphoswe ezinjaneni." 
Mark7:28 Yaphendula ke yathi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi; kuba nazo iinjana phantsi kwetafile zidla kwiimvuthuluka zabantwana." 
Mark7:29 Wathi kuyo, Ngenxa yelo zwi, hamba; idemon iphumile entombini yakho." 
Mark7:30 Yesuka yaya endlwini yayo, yafumana iphumile idemon, intombi ilele phezu kwesi ngqengqelo." 
Mark7:31 Uthe wabuya waphuma emideni yaseTire neyaseTsidon, weza kulwandle lwaseGalili, ecanda phakathi kwemida yaseDekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Bazisa ke isithulu esithintithayo, bambongoza ukuba abeke isandla phezu kwaso." 
Mark7:33 Wasishenxisa esihlweleni sasodwa, wafaka iminwe yakhe ezindlebeni zaso, wathi etshicile, wachukumisa ulwimi lwaso," 
Mark7:34 wakhangela ezulwini, wancwina, wathi kuso, Efata, oko kukuthi, Vuleka." 
Mark7:35 Zavuleka kwaoko iindlebe zaso, zacombuluka iingqambu zolwimi lwaso, sathetha salungisa." 
Mark7:36 Wabayala ukuba mabangaxeleli bani; kodwa okukhona wabayalayo, kwaba kukhona bakuvakalisa ngakumbi." 
Mark7:37 Bakhwankqiswa ngokuncamisileyo kanye, besithi, Uzenze iinto zonke kakuhle; uzenza nezithulu zive, nabangenakuthetha bathethe." 
Mark8:1 Ngaloo mihla, sakuba sikhulu kakhulu isihlwele, singenanto singayidlayo, wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe uYesu, athi kubo," 
Mark8:2 Ndisikwa yimfesane ngenxa yesihlwele; ngokuba sekuntsuku ntathu behleli nam, bengenanto bangayidlayo;" 
Mark8:3 ukuba ndithe ndabandulula baya emakhayeni abo bengadlanga, botyhafa endleleni; kuba inxenye yabo ivela kude." 
Mark8:4 Bamphendula abafundi bakhe, besithi, Wokuzuza phi na umntu ukuba nako ukubahluthisa aba ngezonka, entlango apha?" 
Mark8:5 Wayebabuza esithi, Zingaphi na izonka eninazo? Bathi ke bona, Zisixhenxe." 
Mark8:6 Wasithethela isihlwele ukuba sihlale phantsi emhlabeni.Wazithabatha izonka zosixhenxe, wabulela, waqhekeza, wanika abafundi bakhe, ukuze babeke phambi kwabo; babeka ke phambi kwaso isihlwele." 
Mark8:7 Baye beneentlanzana ezimbalwa; akuba esikelele, wathi mazibekwe phambi kwabo nazo." 
Mark8:8 Badla ke bahlutha; basusa amaqhekeza aseleyo, iingobozi zasixhenxe." 
Mark8:9 Ke kaloku abo babesidla ngathi babemawaka mane; wabandulula. 
Mark8:10 Wangena kwaoko emkhombeni, nabafundi bakhe, weza emacaleni aseDalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Baphuma abaFarisi baqala ukubuzana naye, befuna kuye umqondiso ovela emazulwini, bemlinga." 
Mark8:12 Encwinile kanzulu ngomoya wakhe, athi, Yini na ukuba esi sizukulwana singxamele umqondiso? Inene ndithi kuni, Unakanye ukuba sinikwe umqondiso esi sizukulwana singxamele umqondiso?Inene ndithi kuni, Unakanye ukuba sinikwe umqondiso esi sizukulwana." 
Mark8:13 Wabashiya, wabuya wangena emkhombeni, wemka waya ngaphesheya." 
Mark8:14 Baye belibele ukuphatha izonka; babengenanto banayo emkhombeni, ngaphandle kwesonka esinye." 
Mark8:15 Wabayala esithi, Ligqaleni, nililumkele, igwele labaFarisi, negwele likaHerode." 
Mark8:16 Baye becamanga besitshono ukuthi, Kungokuba singenazonka." 
Mark8:17 Ekwazi oko uYesu, athi kubo, Yini na ukuba nicamange, ngokuba ningenazonka? Anikaqiqi na, anikaqondi na?Isaqaqadekile na intliziyo yenu?" 
Mark8:18 Ninamehlo nje, aniboni na? Nineendlebe nje, aniva na?Anikhumbuli na?" 
Mark8:19 Okuya ndaqhekezela amawaka amahlanu izonka ezihlanu, zaye zingaphi na izitya ezizele ngamaqhekeza enazisusayo? Bathi kuye, Zazilishumi elinazibini." 
Mark8:20 Okuya ke ezisixhenxe ndaziqhekezela amawaka amane, zazingaphi na iingobozi zizele ngamaqhekeza enazisusayo? Bathi ke, Zazisixhenxe." 
Mark8:21 Wayesithi kubo, Phofu yini na ukuba ningaqondi?" 
Mark8:22 Uthi aze kufika eBhetesayida; bazise imfama kuye, bambongoze ukuba ayichukumise." 
Mark8:23 Uthe, eyibambe ngesandla imfama, wayirholela ngaphandle komzi; watshica emehlweni ayo, wabeka izandla phezu kwayo, wayibuza ukuba ibona nto na?" 
Mark8:24 Yaza yakhangela phezulu yathi, Ndiyababona abantu; kuba ndibanakana behamba, ngathi yimithi." 
Mark8:25 Wabuya wazibeka izandla phezu kwamehlo ayo, wayikhangelisa phezulu; yabuya yaphila, yababona bonke kakuhle." 
Mark8:26 Uthi ayithumele endlwini yayo, esithi, Uze ungangeni kuwo umzi, ungathethi nakubani kuwo umzi." 
Mark8:27 Waphuma uYesu nabafundi bakhe, waya emizini yaseKesareya kaFilipu; waye endleleni ebabuza abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo, Kuthiwa ngabantu ndingubani na mna?" 
Mark8:28 Baphendula ke bona ngokuthi, Bathi unguYohane umbhaptizi;abanye bathi unguEliya; bambi ke bathi ungomnye wabaprofeti." 
Mark8:29 Athi yena kubo, Ke nina nithi ndingubani na? Aphendule ke uPetros athi kuye, Wena unguye uKristu." 
Mark8:30 Wabakhalimela ukuba bangaxeleli bani ngaye. 
Mark8:31 Waqala ukubafundisa, okokuba uNyana woMntu umelwe kukuba eve ubunzima obukhulu, alahlwe ngawo amadoda amakhulu nababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, abulawe, athi emveni kweentsuku ezintathu abuye avuke." 
Mark8:32 Elo zwi wayelithetha ngokungafihlisiyo. UPetros wamthabathela kuye, waqala ukumkhalimela." 
Mark8:33 Uthe ke yena, ejikile, wabakhangela abafundi bakhe, wamkhalimela uPetros, esithi, Suka uye emva kwam, Sathana;ngokuba ungazinyamekeli ezikaThixo izinto, unyamekele ezabantu." 
Mark8:34 Esibizele kuye isihlwele, kwanabafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Osukuba ethanda ukundilandela, makazincame, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele ke." 
Mark8:35 Kuba othe wathanda ukuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; ke yena othe wawulahla umphefumlo wakhe ngenxa yam, nangenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo ezi, wowusindisa." 
Mark8:36 Kuba komnceda ntoni na umntu, ukuba uthe walizuza ihlabathi liphela, waza wonakalelwa ngumphefumlo wakhe?" 
Mark8:37 Okanye worhola ntoni na umntu, ibe sisananelo somphefumlo wakhe?" 
Mark8:38 Kuba othe waneentloni ngam nangamazwi am, kwesi sizukulwana sikrexezayo, sonayo, naye uNyana woMntu woba neentloni ngaye, xa athe weza esebuqaqawulini boYise, enezithunywa ezingcwele." 
Mark9:1 Wayesithi kubo, Inene ndithi kuni, Kukho abathile kwabemiyo apha, abangayi kukha beve kufa bona, bade babubone ubukumkani bukaThixo busiza ngamandla." 
Mark9:2 Uthi uYesu, emveni kweentsuku ezintandathu, athabathe uPetros noYakobi noYohane, abanyuse baye entabeni ende ngasese, bebodwa. Waza wenziwa wakumila kumbi phambi kwabo." 
Mark9:3 Zasuka neengubo zakhe zabengezela, zamhlophe kunene njengekhephu, ekungekho mchazi wangubo emhlabeni apha unako ukuzenza mhlophe kangako." 
Mark9:4 Kwabonakala kubo uEliya enoMoses; baye bethetha noYesu. 
Mark9:5 Uthi aphendule uPetros athi kuYesu, Rabhi, kuhle ukuba sibe lapha; masenze iminquba ibe mithathu, omnye ube ngowakho, omnye ube ngokaMoses, omnye ube ngokaEliya." 
Mark9:6 Kuba ubengayazi into abengayithethayo; kuba bebesoyika kakhulu. 
Mark9:7 Kwabakho ilifu elibenzela ithinzi; kweza nezwi liphuma efini apho, lisithi, Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda; mveni yena." 
Mark9:8 Bakuthi ukusingasinga, ababa sabona mntu, babona selinguYesu yedwa onabo." 
Mark9:9 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba bayehla entabeni apho, wabayala ukuba bangazityeli bani ezo zinto bazibonileyo, kungaba kude kube kuxa athe wavuka kwabafileyo uNyana woMntu." 
Mark9:10 Elo zwi balibamba lakubo bodwa bebuzana ukuba ukuvuka kubo abafileyo kukuthini na. 
Mark9:11 Baye bembuza besithi, Bathini na ababhali, ukuthi uEliya umelwe kukufika tanci?" 
Mark9:12 Uphendule ke wathi kubo, UEliya okunene, efike tanci, wobuya azimise zonke izinto; wabaxelela nokokuba kuthiweni na ukubhalwa ngaye uNyana woMntu, ukuba ufanele ukuva ubunzima obukhulu, enziwe into engento yanto." 
Mark9:13 Ke ndithi kuni, Ufikile uEliya, baza benza kuye konke abakuthandayo, kwanjengoko kubhaliweyo ngaye." 
Mark9:14 Akufika kubafundi, wabona isihlwele esikhulu sibaphahlile, nababhali bebuzana nabo." 
Mark9:15 Sathi kwaoko sonke isihlwele sakumbona saqhiphuka umbilini;beza kuye ngokubaleka, bambulisa." 
Mark9:16 Wababuza ababhali, esithi, Nibuzana ntoni na nabo?" 
Mark9:17 Waphendula omnye wasesihlweleni wathi, Mfundisi, bendizise unyana wam kuwe, enomoya ongathethiyo;" 
Mark9:18 apho uthe wamqubula khona, uyamntlala, aze alephuze amagwebu, atshixize amazinyo akhe, asuke ome; ndithethe kubafundi bakho ukuba bawukhuphe; bakhohlwa." 
Mark9:19 Amphendule ke yena athi, Sizukulwanandini singakholwayo, koda kube nini na ndikuni? Koda kube nini na ndininyamezele?Mziseni kum." 
Mark9:20 Bamzisa kuye. Akumbona, wesuka kwaoko umoya, wambetha wee xhwenene; wawa emhlabeni, wamana eqikaqikeka, elephuza amagwebu." 
Mark9:21 Wabuza kuyise, ukuba kumgama ungakanani na imhlile le nto.Wathi ke yena, Kwaesengumntwana;" 
Mark9:22 umphose futhi emlilweni, kwanasemanzini, ukuba umtshabalalise; ukuba unako ukwenza into, sisize, usikwe yimfesane sithi." 
Mark9:23 Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Ewe, ukuba unokukholwa! Zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kuye okholwayo." 
Mark9:24 Wakhala kwaoko uyise womntwana lowo, wathi eneenyembezi, Ndiyakholwa, Nkosi; siza, ususe ukungakholwa kwam." 
Mark9:25 Uthe ke uYesu, ebone ukuba isihlwele sibalekela ndaweni-nye, wawukhalimela umoya ongcolileyo, esithi kuwo, Moyandini ungathethiyo usithulu, mna ndiyakuthethela, phuma kuye, ungabi sangena kuye." 
Mark9:26 Wakhala wona, wambetha wee xhwenene kunene, waphuma; waba njengofileyo, bada abaninzi bathi, Ufile." 
Mark9:27 Uthe ke uYesu wambamba ngesandla, wamvusa; wesuka wema." 
Mark9:28 Eye kungena endlwini, bambuza abafundi bakhe ngasese, besithi, Yayiyini na ukuba singabi nako ukuwukhupha thina?" 
Mark9:29 Wathi kubo, Olu lona uhlobo alunako ukuphuma nganto, kungengako ukuthandaza nokuzila ukudla." 
Mark9:30 Bephumile apho, babehamba becanda kwelaseGalili;wayengathandi ukuba kwazi bani;" 
Mark9:31 kuba wayebafundisa abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo, UNyana woMntu unikelwa ezandleni zabantu; baya kumbulala; uya kuthi ebulewe, abuye avuke ngomhla wesithathu." 
Mark9:32 Baye bengakuqondi oko kuthetha; baye besoyika nokumbuza. 
Mark9:33 Weza kufika eKapernahum. Akuba esekhaya, wayebabuza esithi, Nibe nicamanga ntoni na phakathi kwenu endleleni?" 
Mark9:34 Bahlala ke bathi tu; kuba endleleni babephikisene ngokuthi, Ngubani na omkhulu kunabanye?" 
Mark9:35 Akuba ehleli phantsi, wababiza abalishumi elinababini, wathi kubo, Ukuba ubani uthanda ukuba ngowokuqala, woba ngowokugqibela kwabo bonke, nomlungiseleli wabo bonke." 
Mark9:36 Uthabathe umntwana, wammisa phakathi kwabo; emwolile, wathi kubo," 
Mark9:37 Othe wamkela noko amnye wabantwana abanje, egameni lam, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, akamkeli mna, wamkela lowo wandithumayo." 
Mark9:38 Ke kaloku uYohane wamphendula, esithi, Mfundisi, sabona umntu ekhupha iidemon egameni lakho, ongasilandeliyo thina;samalela ke, ngokuba engasilandeli thina." 
Mark9:39 Wathi ke uYesu, Musani ukumalela; kuba akukho namnye uya kwenza umsebenzi wamandla egameni lam, aze ahle abe nako ukuthetha kakubi ngam." 
Mark9:40 Kuba ongachaseneyo nathi, ungecala lethu." 
Mark9:41 Kuba othe waniseza nendebe le yamanzi egameni lam, ngokuba ningabakaKristu, inene ndithi kuni, akasayi kuphulukana nomvuzo wakhe." 
Mark9:42 Nothe wakhubekisa noko amnye wabancinane abakholwayo kum, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba ubegangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni yakhe, waphoswa elwandle." 
Mark9:43 Nokuba ke isandla sakho sithe sakukhubekisa, sinqamle sona;kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisilima, kunokuba uthi, unezandla zozibini, umke uye esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimekiyo," 
Mark9:44 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:45 Nokuba unyawo lwakho luthe lwakukhubekisa, lunqamle lona;kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqhwala, kunokuba uthi, uneenyawo zombini, uphoswe esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimekiyo," 
Mark9:46 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:47 Nokuba iliso lakho lithe lakukhubekisa, likhuphe lona;kukulungele kanye ukungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo unaliso linye, kunokuba uthi, unamehlo amabini, uphoswe esihogweni somlilo," 
Mark9:48 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:49 Kuba bonke baya kugalelwa ityuwa ngomlilo, athi onke amadini agalelwe ityuwa ngetyuwa." 
Mark9:50 Ityuwa ilungile yona; ke ukuba ithe ityuwa ayaba nabutyuwa, noyivakalisa ngantoni na? Yibani netyuwa phakathi kwenu, nihlale ninoxolo omnye komnye." 
Mark10:1 Esukile apho, uze kungena emideni yakwaYuda, ecanda kweliphesheya kweYordan. Kubuya kuhlanganiselane izihlwele kuye; ubesithi ke, njengoko ebeqhele ngako, abuye azifundise." 
Mark10:2 Bafika abaFarisi, bambuza ukuba kuvumelekile na ukuba indoda imale umfazi wayo; batsho bemlinga." 
Mark10:3 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, UMoses waniwisela mthetho mni na?" 
Mark10:4 Bathi bona, UMoses wakuvumela ukubhala incwadi yokwahlukana, nokumala." 
Mark10:5 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Ngokuba lukhuni kwentliziyo yenu, wanibhalela loo mthetho;" 
Mark10:6 kodwa kwasekuqalekeni kokudalwa, uThixo wabenza bayindoda nenkazana." 
Mark10:7 Ngenxa yoko umntu uyakushiya uyise nonina, anamathele emfazini wakhe;" 
Mark10:8 baze abo babini babe nyama-nye. Ngako oko, abasebabini, banyama-nye." 
Mark10:9 Oko ke ngoko uThixo akumanyileyo, makungahlulwa mntu." 
Mark10:10 Endlwini abafundi bakhe babuya bambuza ngayo loo nto. 
Mark10:11 Athi kubo, Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, wazeka omnye, uyakrexeza kulowa." 
Mark10:12 Nokuba umfazi uthe wayala indoda yakhe, wendela kwenye, uyakrexeza." 
Mark10:13 Baye bezisa abantwana kuye ukuze abachukumise; basuka abafundi babakhalimela abo babazisayo. 
Mark10:14 Ke kaloku ekubonile oku uYesu, wacaphuka, wathi kubo, Bavumeleni abantwana beze kum, ningabaleli: ngokuba ubukumkani bukaThixo bubobabo banjalo." 
Mark10:15 Inene ndithi kuni, Othe akabamkela ubukumkani bukaThixo njengomntwana, akayi kukha angene kubo." 
Mark10:16 Waza wabawola, wazibeka izandla phezu kwabo, wamana ebasikelela." 
Mark10:17 Akubon ukuba uyaphuma, uya endleleni, kweza othile ngokubaleka, wawa ngamadolo kuye, wambuza esithi, Mfundisi ulungileyo, ndenze ntoni na, ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?" 
Mark10:18 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Yini na ukuba uthi ndilungile? Akukho ulungileyo, mnye kwaphela-nguThixo." 
Mark10:19 Uyayazi imithetho: Musa ukukrexeza, musa ukubulala, musa ukuba, musa ukungqinela ubuxoki, musa ukulumkisa, beka uyihlo nonyoko." 
Mark10:20 Uphendule ke yena wathi kuye, Mfundisi, zonke ezo zinto ndazigcina, kwasebuncinaneni bam." 
Mark10:21 Uthe ke uYesu, ondele kuye, wamthanda, wathi kuye, Kukho nto-nye uyisweleyo: hamba uye kuthengisa ngeento zonke onazo, uphe amahlwempu, woba nobutyebi ke emazulwini; yiza ke undilandele, uwuthwele umnqamlezo." 
Mark10:22 Wathi ke khunubembe ngelo zwi, wemka ebuhlungu; kuba ebenemfuyo eninzi." 
Mark10:23 UYesu esingasingile, wathi kubafundi bakhe, Hayi, ukuba ngenkankulu ukuya kungena kwabo banobutyebi ebukumkanini bukaThixo!" 
Mark10:24 Ke bathi qhiphu umbilini abafundi ngamazwi akhe. Aphinde ke uYesu, aphendule athi kubo, Bantwana, hayi, ukuba ngenkankulu ukuthi abo bakholose ngobutyebi bangene ebukumkanini bukaThixo!" 
Mark10:25 Kulula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukaThixo." 
Mark10:26 Baye bekhwankqiswa ke ngokuncamisileyo, besitshono ukuthi, Ngubani na ongasindiswayo?" 
Mark10:27 Ondele ke kubo uYesu, uthi, Kubantu akunakwenzeka; kuye yena uThixo akunakuba kungenzeki; kuba zonke izinto zinako ukwenzeka kuye uThixo." 
Mark10:28 Waqala uPetros ukuthi kuye, Uyabona, thina sishiye iinto zonke, sakulandela." 
Mark10:29 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Inene ndithi kuni, akukho namnye ushiye indlu, nokuba ngabazalwana, nokuba ngoodade, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngunina, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yam nangenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo ezi," 
Mark10:30 ongayi kuthi amkeliswe kalikhulu: ngoku ngeli xesha, izindlu, nabazalwana, noodade, noonina, nabantwana, namasimi, ndawonye neentshutshiso; nakwelizayo iphakade, ubomi obungunaphakade." 
Mark10:31 Ke baninzi abokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela, nabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala." 
Mark10:32 Ke kaloku babesendleleni, benyuka besiya eYerusalem; waye uYesu ehamba phambi kwabo; baye bethe qhiphu umbilini, balandela besoyika. Wabuya wabathabatha abalishumi elinababini waqala ukubaxelela izinto eziza kumhlela, esithi," 
Mark10:33 Niyabona, siyenyuka siya eYerusalem; waye uNyana woMntu eya kunikelwa kubabingeleli abakhulu, nakubabhali; baya kumgweba ukuba afe, bamnikele kuzo iintlanga." 
Mark10:34 Ziya kudlala ngaye, zimtyakatye, zimtshicele, zimbulale;aze athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke." 
Mark10:35 Kuthi kuze kuye uYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, besithi, Mfundisi, sithanda ukuba usenzele into esothi siyicele." 
Mark10:36 Wathi ke yena kubo, Nithanda ukuba ndinenzele ntoni na?" 
Mark10:37 Bathi ke bona kuye, Siphe ukuhlala, omnye ngasekunene kwakho, nomnye ngasekhohlo kwakho, ebuqaqawulini bakho." 
Mark10:38 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Aniyazi into eniyicelayo: ninako na ukuyisela indebe endiyiselayo mna, nibhaptizwe ngobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna? Bathi ke bona kuye, Sinako." 
Mark10:39 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Okunene indebe endiyiselayo mna, niya kuyisela; nobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna, niya kubhaptizwa kwangalo;" 
Mark10:40 kodwa kona ukuhlala ngasekunene kwam nangasekhohlo kwam, asikwam ukupha ngako, ngaphandle kokupha abo kulungiselwe bona." 
Mark10:41 Bevile abalishumi, baqala ukubacaphukela ooYakobi noYohane." 
Mark10:42 Ke kaloku, uYesu ebabizele kuye, uthi kubo, Niyazi ukuba abo kuthiwa balawula iintlanga, bayazigagamela; nabo bazizikhulu zazo benza ngegunya kuzo." 
Mark10:43 Ze kungabi njalo ke phakathi kwenu nina; osukuba efuna ukuba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu;" 
Mark10:44 nosukuba efuna ukuba ngowokuqala, makabe ngumkhonzi wabo bonke;" 
Mark10:45 kuba noNyana woMntu engezanga kulungiselelwa; weza kulungiselela, nokuncama ubomi bakhe, bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi." 
Mark10:46 Baza kufika eYeriko. Ekuphumeni kwakhe eYeriko apho, nabafundi bakhe nendimbane elingeneyo, unyana kaTimeyu, uBhartimeyu, imfama, waye ehleli ngasendleleni engqiba." 
Mark10:47 Wathi akuva ukuba nguYesu waseNazarete, waqala ukudanduluka wathi, Yesu nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba." 
Mark10:48 Baye abaninzi bemkhalimela ukuba athi tu; kwaba kokukhona ke wadandulukayo ngakumbi, esithi, Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba." 
Mark10:49 Wema uYesu wathi, Makabizwe. Bayibiza ke imfama, besithi kuyo, Yomelela, suk ume; uyakubiza." 
Mark10:50 Ithe ke yona, ilahle ingubo yayo, yesuka yeza kuYesu." 
Mark10:51 Aphendule athi kuyo uYesu, Uthanda ukuba ndikwenzele ntoni na? Yathi ke imfama kuye, Rabhoni, ndithanda ukuba ndibone." 
Mark10:52 Wathi ke uYesu kuyo, Hamba uhambe; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile. Yabona kwaoko, yamlandela uYesu endleleni apho." 
Mark11:1 Ke kaloku, xa basondelayo eYerusalem, eBhetefage naseBhetani, besingisa eNtabeni yemiNquma, ususa babe babini kubafundi bakhe," 
Mark11:2 athi kubo, Hambani niye emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani; nothi ningena kuwo, nibe senifumana ithole le-esile libotshelelwe, ekungazanga kuhlale namnye umntu phezu kwalo; likhululeni nilizise." 
Mark11:3 Nokuba ubani uthe kuni, Yini na ukuba nikwenze oko? nothi, Liyafuneka eNkosini; wothi kwaoko ke alithumele apha." 
Mark11:4 Basuka ke baya, balifumana ithole libotshelelwe ngasemnyango ngaphandle, ekuhlanganeni kweendlela; balikhulula." 
Mark11:5 Baye abathile kwababemi khona besithi kubo, Nenza ntoni na, nilikhulula nje ithole?" 
Mark11:6 Bathetha ke kubo njengoko uYesu ebebawisele umthetho ngako;baza babayeka. 
Mark11:7 Balizisa ithole kuYesu; baziphosa iingubo zabo phezu kwalo;wahlala phezu kwalo. 
Mark11:8 Ke kaloku abaninzi bazandlala iingubo zabo endleleni; baye ke abanye bexhuzula amahlamvu emithini, bewandlala endleleni." 
Mark11:9 Baye abo babehamba ngaphambili, nabo babelandela, bedanduluka, besithi, Hosana; makabongwe lo uzayo egameni leNkosi." 
Mark11:10 Mabubongwe ubukumkani bobawo wethu uDavide, obo buzayo egameni leNkosi! Hosana enyangweni!" 
Mark11:11 Uthe ke uYesu wangena eYerusalem nasetempileni;ezisingasingile izinto zonke, wathi, kuba bekusekuhlwile, waphuma waya eBhetani, enabalishumi elinababini." 
Mark11:12 Uthe ngengomso, bakubon ukuba baphumile eBhetani, walamba." 
Mark11:13 Wathi, ebone umkhiwane ukude, unamagqabi, waya kukhangela ukuba angafumana nto na kuwo; akufika kuwo, akafumana nto, kwakuphela ngamagqabi; kuba belingelilo ixesha lamakhiwane." 
Mark11:14 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuwo, Makungaze kudle mntu siqhamo kuwe naphakade. Baye besiva ke abafundi bakhe." 
Mark11:15 Bafika eYerusalem. Waza uYesu, eye kungena etempileni, waqala wabakhupha ababethengisa nababethenga etempileni; wathi neetafile zabanani bemali nezihlalo zabathengisa ngamahobe wazibhukuqa." 
Mark11:16 Wayengavumi ukuba kubekho ucanda etempileni ethwele isitya. 
Mark11:17 Wayefundisa, esithi kubo, Akubhaliwe na kwathiwa, Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu yokuthandaza iintlanga zonke? Ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange." 
Mark11:18 Beva ababhali nababingeleli abakhulu; baye befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumtshabalalisa; kuba babemoyika yena, ngokuba indimbane yonke ibikhwankqisiwe yimfundiso yakhe." 
Mark11:19 Uthe ke kwakuhlwa waphuma, waya ngaphandle komzi." 
Mark11:20 Bathi bedlula kusasa, bawubona umkhiwane lowo womile, uthabathele kwasezingcanjini." 
Mark11:21 Ekhumbule uPetros, uthi kuye, Rabhi, khangela umkhiwane obuwuqalekisile womile." 
Mark11:22 Uphendule uYesu wathi kubo, Yibani nokukholwa kuThixo." 
Mark11:23 Kuba inene ndithi kuni, Othe kule ntaba, Funquleka, uphoseke elwandle, angathandabuzi entliziyweni yakhe, asuke akholwe ukuba ezo zinto azithethayo zinokwenzeka, wokuzuza oko athe wakuthetha." 
Mark11:24 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni izinto enisukuba nizicela, nithandaza, kholwani ukuba ninokuzamkela; noba nazo." 
Mark11:25 Naxa sukuba nimi nithandaza, ukuba ninendawo ngakothile, mxoleleni, ukuze noYihlo osemazulwini anixolele iziphoso zenu." 
Mark11:26 Ke, ukuba anixoleli nina, naye uYihlo osemazulwini akasayi kunixolela iziphoso zenu." 
Mark11:27 Babuya beza eYerusalem; kuthi, akubon ukuba uyahamba etempileni, kuze kuye ababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, namadoda amakhulu;" 
Mark11:28 bathi kuye, Uzenza ezi zinto ngagunya lini na? Kanjalo ngubani na okunike eli gunya lokuze ezi zinto uzenze?" 
Mark11:29 Waphendula ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kunibuza zwi-nye, ze nindiphendule; ndonixelela ke, ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Mark11:30 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma emazulwini, lwaluphuma ebantwini, sini na? Ndiphenduleni." 
Mark11:31 Baye becamanga phakathi kwabo, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaluphuma emazulwini, wothi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?" 
Mark11:32 Kodwa ukuba sithe, Lwaluphuma ebantwinibabesoyika abantu; kuba bonke babebambe ukuthi uYohane ubengumprofeti inene." 
Mark11:33 Baphendula bathi kuYesu, Asazi. Aphendule uYesu athi kubo, Nam andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Mark12:1 Waqala ukuthi kubo ngemizekeliso, Umntu watyala isidiliya, wasibiyela ngothango, wemba isixovulelo seediliya, wakha inyango, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye." 
Mark12:2 Wathi ngelona xesha, wathuma umkhonzi kubalimi abo, ukuba amkele kubalimi esiqhameni sesidiliya eso." 
Mark12:3 Basuka bona bambamba, bamtyabula, bamndulula elambatha." 
Mark12:4 Wabuya wathuma kubo omnye umkhonzi; lowo bamgibisela ngamatye, bamngxwelerha entloko, bamndulula bemhlazisile." 
Mark12:5 Wabuya wathuma omnye; lowo bambulala. Wathuma nabanye babaninzi, inxenye beyityabula, inxenye beyibulala." 
Mark12:6 Uthe ngoko, esenaye unyana emnye, intanda yakhe, wamthuma naye kubo ukugqibela, esithi, Baya kumhlonela yena unyana wam." 
Mark12:7 Ke bona abo balimi bathi phakathi kwabo, Yindlalifa lo;yizani simbulale, ilifa libe lelethu." 
Mark12:8 Bamthabatha ke, bambulala, bamphosa ngaphandle kwesidiliya." 
Mark12:9 Uya kwenza ntoni na ke ngoko umninisidiliya? Wofika abatshabalalise abo balimi, asinikele kubambi isidiliya eso." 
Mark12:10 Anisilesanga na esi sibhalo sithi, Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo;" 
Mark12:11 Kwavela eNkosini oku, Kungummangaliso emehlweni ethu?" 
Mark12:12 Baya befuna ukumbamba, basuka boyika izihlwele, kuba baqonda ukuba uwuthethe ngabo lo mzekeliso. Bamshiya bemka." 
Mark12:13 Bathi bathumela kuye abathile bakubaFarisi bakumaHerode, ukuze bambambise ngokuthetha." 
Mark12:14 Befikile ke bona, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uyinene, kanjalo akukhathali nangubani; kuba akukhethi buso bamntu, indlela kaThixo uyifundisa ngenene. Kuvumelekile na ukumnika irhafu uKesare, akuvumelekile, kusini na? Sinikele, singanikeli, kusini na?" 
Mark12:15 Ke kaloku yena, ekwazi ukuhanahanisa kwabo, wathi kubo, Nindilingelani na? Ndiziseleni idenariyo, ndiyibone." 
Mark12:16 Bayizisa ke. Athi kubo, Ngokabani na lo mfanekiso nombhalo?" 
Mark12:17 Bathi ke kuye, NgokaKesare. Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Nikelani izinto zikaKesare kuKesare, nezinto zikaThixo kuThixo.Bamangaliswa nguye." 
Mark12:18 Kweza kuye nabaSadusi, bona abo bathi akukho luvuko;babuza kuye besithi," 
Mark12:19 Mfundisi, uMoses wasibhalela, wathi, Ukuba umzalwana kathile uthe wafa, washiya umfazi, akashiya bantwana, makathi umzalwana wakhe amzeke umfazi wakhe, amvelisele imbewu umzalwana wakhe." 
Mark12:20 Ke kaloku bekukho abazalwana abasixhenxe. Wathi owokuqala wazeka umfazi; waza akufa akashiya mbewu. 
Mark12:21 Uthe owesibini wamzeka, wafa, akashiya mbewu. Wenjenjalo nowesithathu." 
Mark12:22 Bamzeka ke bosixhenxe; abashiya mbewu. Ekugqibeleni kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi." 
Mark12:23 Ngoko eluvukweni, uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi na kubo? kuba babenaye bosixhenxe engumfazi." 
Mark12:24 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Anilahleki na, ngenxa yale ndawo yokuba ningazazi izibhalo kwanamandla kaThixo?" 
Mark12:25 Kuba, xa bathe babuya bavuka kwabafileyo, abazeki, abendiswa; banjengazo izithunywa ezisemazulwini." 
Mark12:26 Ngokusingisele kwabafileyo ke, ukuba bayavuka, anilesanga na encwadini kaMoses, endaweni ethetha ngetyholo, okokuba uThixo wathetha kuye esithi, Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi?" 
Mark12:27 AkaThixo wabafileyo, unguThixo wabaphilileyo. Nina ke ngoko niyalahleka kakhulu." 
Mark12:28 Kwafika omnye wakubabhali; wabeva bebuzana; waqonda ukuba ubaphendule kakuhle. Wambuza esithi, Owona mthetho uphambili kuyo yonke nguwuphi na?" 
Mark12:29 UYesu wamphendula ke esithi, Owona ungaphambili kuyo yonke imithetho ngulo: Yiva, Sirayeli, iNkosi uThixo wethu yiNkosi inye;" 
Mark12:30 uze uyithande ke iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, na ngomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela, nangamandla akho ephela. Nguwo lo ongaphambili umthetho." 
Mark12:31 Nowesibini ufana nawo; nangu: Uze umthande ummelwane wakho njengoko uzithanda ngako. Akukho mthetho wumbi mkhulu kunale. 
Mark12:32 Wathi umbhali kuye, Ngxatsho ke, Mfundisi, uthethe inyaniso; ngokuba mnye uThixo, akukho wumbi ngaphandle kwakhe;" 
Mark12:33 nokuthi umthande yena ngentliziyo iphela, nangengqiqo iphela, nangomphefumlo uphela, nangamandla ephela, nokuthi umthande ummelwane wakho njengoko uzithanda ngako, kungaphezu kwawo onke amadini atshiswayo kuphele, nemibingelelo." 
Mark12:34 UYesu embonile ukuba uphendule ngengqiqo, wathi kuye, Akukude wena ebukumkanini bukaThixo. Akwaba sabakho mntu ubenobuganga bakumbuza nto." 
Mark12:35 Waphendula uYesu, wathi, efundisa etempileni, Batsho ngani na ababhali ukuthi, UKristu ungunyana kaDavide?" 
Mark12:36 Kuba uDavide ngokwakhe wathi ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho." 
Mark12:37 UDavide ngoko ngokwakhe uthi, UyiNkosi. Kuvela phi na ke ukuba ngunyana wakhe? Lwaye ke uninzi lwabantu lumva kamnandi." 
Mark12:38 Wayesithi kubo, ekufundiseni kwakhe, Balumkeleni ababhali, abathanda ukuhamba ngeengubo ezinde, nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho," 
Mark12:39 nezihlalo zobukhulu ezindlwini zesikhungu, nezilili zobukhulu ezidlweni;" 
Mark12:40 abazidla bazigqibe izindlu zabahlolokazi, baze benyhwalaza bathandaze uzungu. Aba baya kwamkela ugwebo olugqithisileyo." 
Mark12:41 Waye uYesu ehleli malungana nomkhumbi wokulondoloza imali, ekhangela ukuba sithini na isihlwele ukuphosa imali yobhedu emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali; zaye izityebi ezininzi ziphosa kakhulu." 
Mark12:42 Kwafika mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu, waphosa iimalanana zambini eziyikodrante." 
Mark12:43 Ebabizele kuye abafundi bakhe, uthi kubo, Inene ndithi kuni, Lo mhlolokazi ulihlwempu uphose ngaphezu kwabo bonke abaphosileyo emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali;" 
Mark12:44 kuba bonke abo baphose bethabatha kwikhupha labo; ke yena ekusweleni kwakhe uphose konke abenako, impilo yakhe iphela." 
Mark13:1 Kwakubon ukuba uyaphuma etempileni, uthi omnye umfundi wakhe kuye, Mfundisi, uyawabona na la matye angaka, nezi zakhiwo zingaka?" 
Mark13:2 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Uyazibona na ezi zakhiwo zikhulu? Akusayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa." 
Mark13:3 Baye, akubon ukuba uhleli eNtabeni yemiNquma malungana netempile, bembuza ngasese ooPetros noYakobi noYohane noAndreya, besithi," 
Mark13:4 Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto, nokuba uya kuba yini na umqondiso, xa zonke ezo zinto ziza kupheliswa." 
Mark13:5 Wabaphendula ke uYesu waqala ukuthi, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa bani;" 
Mark13:6 kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi banguye uKristu, balahlekise into eninzi." 
Mark13:7 Xa nithe neva iimfazwe namarhe eemfazwe, musani kuba navuso; kuba ezo zinto zimelwe kukuhla, ukanti kona ukuphela akukabikho;" 
Mark13:8 kuba uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani; kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo; kuya kubakho neendlala neenkathazeko;ziingqaleko ke zenimba ezo." 
Mark13:9 Zilumkeleni ke okwenu; kuba baya kuninikela ezintlanganisweni zamatyala, nityatyulwe ezindlwini zesikhungu, nimiswe phambi kwabalawuli nookumkani ngenxa yam, kube bubungqina kubo." 
Mark13:10 Kumele ukuthi ke ukuqala kuvakaliswe iindaba ezilungileyo ezi kuzo zonke iintlanga. 
Mark13:11 Xa sukuba ke benirhola beya kuninikela, musani ukuyixhalela kwangaphambili into eniya kuyithetha, ningacamangi nokucamanga nto. Into enithe nayinikwa ngelo xa, thethani yona;kuba asinini enithethayo, nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Mark13:12 Ke kaloku, umzalwana uya kunikela umzalwana ekufeni, aze uyise anikele umntwana, bathi nabantwana bavukelane nabazali, bababulalise;" 
Mark13:13 nithiywe ngabantu bonke, ngenxa yegama lam. Ke onyamezelayo kude kube sekupheleni, lowo wosindiswa." 
Mark13:14 Ke kaloku, xa nithe nalibona isikizi lesiphanziso, ekwakuthethwa lona ngoDaniyeli umprofeti, limi apho lingamele kuba khona (olesayo makaqiqe), mabathi ngelo xa abo bakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni." 
Mark13:15 Ophezu kwendlu ke makangehli aye endlwini, angangeni aye kuthabatha into endlwini yakhe." 
Mark13:16 Nalowo usentsimini makangabuyeli emva, aye kuthabatha ingubo yakhe." 
Mark13:17 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla!" 
Mark13:18 Thandazani ke, ukuze intsabo yenu ingabi khona ebusika." 
Mark13:19 Kuba yona loo mihla iya kuba yimbandezelo, engazanga ibekho enjalo kwasekuqalekeni kwendalo awayidalayo uThixo, kwada kwakalokunje; engasayi kubuya ibekho." 
Mark13:20 Kanjalo ukuba iNkosi ibingayinqamlelanga loo mihla, bekungayi kubakho mntu usindayo; koko ithe ngenxa yabanyulwa ebanyulileyo, yayinqamlela imihla leyo." 
Mark13:21 Ngelo xa ke, ukuba ubani uthe kuni, Nanku apha uKristu, nokuba uthe, Nankuya phaya, musani ukukholwa nguye;" 
Mark13:22 kuba kuya kuvela ooKristu ababuxoki, nabaprofeti ababuxoki, benze imiqondiso nemimangaliso yokulahlekisa nabanyuliweyo, ukuba bekunokwenzeka." 
Mark13:23 Lumkani ke nina; yabonani, ndinixelele izinto zonke ngenxa engaphambili." 
Mark13:24 Ngaloo mihla, emveni kwayo loo mbandezelo, liya kusuka ilanga lenziwe mnyama, ithi nenyanga ingabukhuphi ubumhlophe bayo;" 
Mark13:25 zithi neenkwenkwezi zezulu zivuthuluke; athi mamandla asemazulwini azanyazanyiswe. 
Mark13:26 Baya kumbona ke ngelo xesha uNyana woMntu esiza esemafini, enamandla amakhulu nobuqaqawuli." 
Mark13:27 Uya kuzithuma ngelo xesha izithunywa zakhe, abahlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, baphume kumacala omane omoya, kuthabathela esiphelweni sehlabathi kuse esiphelweni sezulu." 
Mark13:28 Wufundeni ke kuwo umkhiwane umzekeliso; xa selithe lathamba isebe lawo, lahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufuphi ihlobo." 
Mark13:29 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona ezo zinto zisihla, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango." 
Mark13:30 Inene ndithi kuni, Asisayi kudlula esi sizukulwana, zingadanga zonke ezo zinto zibekho." 
Mark13:31 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi, ke wona amazwi am akasayi kudlula." 
Mark13:32 Kodwa akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo lixa, azazi nezithunywa ezisemazulwini, akazi noNyana lo, kuphela nguYise." 
Mark13:33 Lumkani, musani ukulala, thandazani. Kuba anilazi ukuba linini na ixesha elo;" 
Mark13:34 njengokuba wathi umntu ehambela kwelinye, eshiya indlu yakhe, wabanika igunya abakhonzi bakhe, elowo wamnika umsebenzi wakhe, waza umgcini-mnyango wamwisela umthetho ukuba alinde." 
Mark13:35 Lindani ngoko, ngokuba ningakwazi ukuba kunini na ukuza komninindlu: kuko ngokuhlwa, kuko phakathi kobusuku, kuko ekulileni kweenkuku, kuko kusasa;" 
Mark13:36 hleze afike ngebhaqo, anifumane nilele." 
Mark13:37 Oko ndikutsho kuni, ndikutsho kubo bonke, Lindani." 
Mark14:1 Ke kaloku bekuza kubakho ipasika, izonka ezingenagwele, emveni kweentsuku ezimbini; baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumbamba ngenkohliso, bambulale." 
Mark14:2 Babesithi ke, Makungabi khona ngomthendeleko, hleze kubekho isaqunge sabantu." 
Mark14:3 Kuthe eseBhetani, endlwini kaSimon owayeneqhenqa, akubon ukuba uhleli, kweza umfazi enehlala lelabhastile, linamafutha enadusi engangxengelelweyo, exabiso likhulu; walityumza ihlala elo lelabhastile, wamgalela ngawo entloko." 
Mark14:4 Kwaye ke kukho abathile abacaphukayo phakathi kwabo, besithi, Yenzelweni na le nkcitho yamafutha aqholiweyo?" 
Mark14:5 Kuba la mafutha bekungathengiswayo ngawo ngenani elingaphezu kweedenariyo ezimakhulu mathathu, kuphiwe amahlwempu; basuka bamfuthela." 
Mark14:6 Uthe ke uYesu, Myekeni; nimaphulelani na? Usebenze umsebenzi omhle kum;" 
Mark14:7 kuba amahlwempu lawo nihleli ninawo, nize xa sukuba nithanda, nibe nako ukuwenzela okulungileyo; ke mna anihleli ninam." 
Mark14:8 Yena ukwenzile abenako; uphange weza wawuthambisela ukungcwatywa umzimba wam. 
Mark14:9 Inene ndithi kuni, Apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zilungileyo kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto ayenzileyo yena, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngaye." 
Mark14:10 UYuda Sikariyoti, omnye kwabeshumi elinababini, wesuka waya kubabingeleli abakhulu, ukuba amnikele kubo." 
Mark14:11 Bathi ke bona bakuva bavuya; bambeka ngedinga lokumnika imali. Wayefuna ukuba angathini na ukumnikela ngexesha elimlungeleyo. 
Mark14:12 Ke kaloku, ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, xa bekubingelelwa imvana yepasika, bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Unga singaya kulungisa phi na, ukuze uyidle ipasika?" 
Mark14:13 Ususa babini kubafundi bakhe, athi kubo, Hambani niye kuwo umzi; nohlangatyezwa ngumntu ethwele umphanda wamanzi;mlandeleni." 
Mark14:14 Apho athe wangena khona, nothi kumninindlu, Uthi uMfundisi, Iphi na indlu yabahambi, apho ndingayidlela khona ipasika nabafundi bam?" 
Mark14:15 Yena wonibonisa igumbi eliphezulu, elikhulu, landlelwe lalungiswa; silungiseleleni apho." 
Mark14:16 Baphuma abafundi bakhe abo, baya kungena kuwo umzi, bafumana kunjengoko wayebaxelele, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Mark14:17 Uthi kwakuhlwa, eze nabalishumi elinababini." 
Mark14:18 Bakubon ukuba bahleli, bayadla, wathi uYesu, Inene, ndithi kuni, omnye kuni aba uya kundingcatsha, lowo ke udla nam." 
Mark14:19 Baqala ke ukuba buhlungu, nokuthi kuye ngabanye, Ingaba ndim, yini na? Nomnye wathi, Ingaba ndim, yini na?" 
Mark14:20 Uphendule ke wathi kubo, Ngomnye kwabeshumi elinababini, lowo ke uthi nkxu nam esityeni." 
Mark14:21 UNyana woMntu uyemka okunene, njengoko kubhalwe ngaye;yeha ke, loo mntu uNyana woMntu angcatshwa nguye! Ngekumlungele ukuba ebengazalwanga loo mntu." 
Mark14:22 Bakubon ukuba bayadla, uYesu wathabatha isonka, wasikelela, waqhekeza, wabanika, wathi, Thabathani nidle;ngumzimba wam lo." 
Mark14:23 Wayithabatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika; basela kuyo bonke." 
Mark14:24 Wathi kubo, Ligazi lam eli lomnqophiso omtsha, eliphalala ngenxa yabaninzi." 
Mark14:25 Inene ndithi kuni, Andisayi kubuya ndisele esiqhameni somdiliya, kude kube yiloo mini sukuba ndisisela sisitsha ebukumkanini bukaThixo." 
Mark14:26 Bakuba bevume ingoma yokubonga, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma." 
Mark14:27 Athi kubo uYesu, Nonke niya kukhubeka kum ngobu busuku;ngokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kubetha kumalusi, zichithwachithwe izimvu." 
Mark14:28 Ke emveni kokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela, ndiye kwelaseGalili." 
Mark14:29 Wathi ke uPetros kuye, Nokuba baya kukhubeka bonke, mna nakanye." 
Mark14:30 Athi uYesu kuye, Inene ndithi kuwe, namhlanje, kwangobu busuku, ingekalili kabini inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu." 
Mark14:31 Kwaba kukhona wathetha wancamisa, esithi, Ndingafanelana ndimelwe kukufa nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele. Batsho ke bonke." 
Mark14:32 Bafika kumhlatyana ogama liyiGetsemane. Athi kubafundi bakhe, Hlalani phantsi apha, ndikhe ndithandaze;" 
Mark14:33 athabathe naye uPetros noYakobi noYohane. Waqala ukuqhiphuka umbilini, nokudandatheka kakhulu." 
Mark14:34 Athi kubo, Umphefumlo wam ubuhlungu kakhulu, ngokokude ube sekufeni; hlalani apha nilinde." 
Mark14:35 Ehambele phambili umganyana, wawa emhlabeni, wathandazela, ukuba kunokwenzeka, lidlule kuye ilixa elo." 
Mark14:36 Wayesithi, Abha, Bawo, zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kuwe;yigqithise kum le ndebe; noko ke makungabi kokuthandwa ndim, makube kokuthandwa nguwe." 
Mark14:37 Uyeza, abafumane belele; athi kuPetros, Simon, ulele na?Ubungenakulinda noko lilinye na ilixa?" 
Mark14:38 Lindani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni; umoya okunene unentumekelelo, ke yona inyama ithambile." 
Mark14:39 Wabuya wemka wathandaza, ethetha kwalona elo lizwi." 
Mark14:40 Uthe akubuya, wabafumana bebuye balala; kuba amehlo abo ayenzima bubuthongo; baye bengazi into abangamphendula yona." 
Mark14:41 Afike okwesithathu, athi kubo, Lalani ngoku niphumle;kwanele; lifikile ilixa; yabonani, uNyana woMntu uyanikelwa ezandleni zaboni." 
Mark14:42 Vukani sihambe; yabonani, lowo undinikelayo usondele." 
Mark14:43 Kwaoko, esathetha, uthi qatha uYuda, owayengoweshumi elinababini, enendimbane enkulu, inamakrele neentonga, isuka kubo ababingeleli abakhulu, nakubabhali, nakuwo amadoda amakhulu." 
Mark14:44 Ke kaloku, lowo umnikelayo waye ebanike umqondiso, esithi, Lowo ndithe ndamanga, nguye; mbambeni, nimrhole nimnqabisile." 
Mark14:45 Efikile, uye kuye kwaoko, athi, Rabhi, Rabhi; wamanga." 
Mark14:46 Bamsa ke isandla, bambamba." 
Mark14:47 Uthe ke omnye wabo babemi khona, warhola ikrele, wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqumla indlebe." 
Mark14:48 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna na, ninamakrele neentonga nje, nanga niphumele isihange?" 
Mark14:49 Bendikuni imihla ngemihla etempileni ndifundisa, anandibamba; kodwa kunje, ukuze zizaliseke izibhalo." 
Mark14:50 Bamshiya bonke, babaleka." 
Mark14:51 Wayelandelwa yindodana ethile, ithe wambu ilinen entle emzimbeni; asuka ayibamba ke amadodana." 
Mark14:52 Ithe yayilahla ilinen entle leyo, yabaleka kubo ize." 
Mark14:53 Bamrholela uYesu kumbingeleli omkhulu, babuthelana kuye bonke ababingeleli abakhulu, namadoda amakhulu, nababhali." 
Mark14:54 Waza uPetros wamlandela, ebekele kude, wada waya ngaphakathi entendelezweni yendlu yombingeleli omkhulu; waye ehleli phantsi ndawonye namadindala, esotha umlilo." 
Mark14:55 Baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu, nayo intlanganiso yamatyala iphelele, befuna ubungqina ngaye uYesu bokuze bambulalise;bengabufumani." 
Mark14:56 Kuba babebaninzi ababengqina ubuxoki ngaye, baye ubungqina babo bungayelelani." 
Mark14:57 Basuka abathile bangqina ubuxoki ngaye, besithi," 
Mark14:58 Thina samva yena esithi, Mna ndiya kuyichitha le tempile yenziweyo ngezandla, ndize ngeentsuku ezintathu ndakhe enye engenziwe ngazandla." 
Mark14:59 Baye bungayelelani kwangokunjalo nobabo ubungqina. 
Mark14:60 Wesuka wema phakathi umbingeleli omkhulu, wambuza uYesu, esithi, Akuphenduli nento le na? bangqina ntoni na aba ngawe?" 
Mark14:61 Wahlala ke yena wathi tu, akaphendula nento. Wabuya umbingeleli omkhulu wambuza, wathi kuye, Unguye na uKristu, uNyana waLowo ungowokubongwa?" 
Mark14:62 Uthe ke uYesu, Ndinguye; niya kumbona nokumbona uNyana woMntu, ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza namafu ezulu." 
Mark14:63 Usuka ke umbingeleli omkhulu azikrazule iingubo zakhe, athi, Sisawafunelani na amangqina?" 
Mark14:64 Nikuvile ukunyelisa; kunjani kuni nina? Bamgweba ke bonke ukuba unetyala lokuba afe. 
Mark14:65 Yaqala inxenye ukumtshicela, nokumgqubuthela ubuso, nokumntlitha, nokuthi kuye, Profeta; aye amadindala emtywakraza." 
Mark14:66 Kuthi ke, akubon ukuba uPetros usentendelezweni ngezantsi, kuze omnye umkhonzazana wombingeleli omkhulu," 
Mark14:67 ambone uPetros esotha, ondele kuye, athi, Nawe ubunaye uYesu waseNazarete." 
Mark14:68 Wakhanyela ke esithi, Andiyazi, andiyiqondi kanye into oyithethayo wena. Waphuma waya phandle kwengaphambili intendelezo; yalila ke inkuku." 
Mark14:69 Umkhonzazana ubuye wambona, waqala ukuthi kwabo babemi khona, Lo ngowakubo." 
Mark14:70 Waphinda ke wakhanyela. Kuthe, kwakuba mzuzwana, babuya abo babemi khona, bathi kuPetros. Inyaniso, ungowakubo; kuba ungowaseGalili, nokuthetha kwakho kuyafana nokwabo." 
Mark14:71 Waqala ke ukushwabula nokufunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu nimthethayo." 
Mark14:72 Yalila okwesibini inkuku. Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi, abelithethile uYesu kuye, lokuthi, Ingekalili inkuku kabini, uya kundikhanyela kathathu. Wathi akucinga, walila." 
Mark15:1 Bathi, kwaoko kwakusa, ababingeleli abakhulu benza ibhunga, ndawonye namadoda amakhulu, nababhali, nentlanganiso yamatyala iphelele; bambopha uYesu bemka naye, bamnikela kuPilato." 
Mark15:2 UPilato wambuza esithi, Unguye na ukumkani wamaYuda?Waphendula ke yena wathi kuye, Nawe utsho." 
Mark15:3 Baye bemmangalela ke ngeendawo ezininzi ababingeleli abakhulu. 
Mark15:4 Wabuya ke uPilato wambuza, esithi, Akuphenduli nento na?Khangela ukuba zininzi kwazo iindawo abazingqina ngawe." 
Mark15:5 Noko ke uYesu akabanga saphendula nto yena, ngokokude amangaliswe uPilato." 
Mark15:6 Ke kaloku imithendeleko ngemithendeleko ubeqhele ukubakhululela umbanjwa abe mnye, abasukuba bemcela." 
Mark15:7 Kwaye kukho ke obekuthiwa nguBharabhas, ebotshwe ndawonye nabanye abenzi besaqunge, ababulalayo nokubulala esaqungeni apho." 
Mark15:8 Sankqangaza isihlwele, saqala ukucela, ukuba enze ngoko abehlala esenza ngako kubo." 
Mark15:9 Wabaphendula ke uPilato, esithi, Nithanda ukuba ndinikhululele ukumkani wamaYuda na?" 
Mark15:10 Kuba ebesazi ukuba ababingeleli abakhulu abo bamnikele ngomona. 
Mark15:11 Ke bona ababingeleli abakhulu bayixhokonxa indimbane, ukuba icele ukuba kanye abakhululele uBharabhas." 
Mark15:12 Wabuya waphendula ke uPilato, wathi kubo, Ninga ndingamenzani na ngoko lowo nithi nguKumkani wamaYuda?" 
Mark15:13 Babuya ke bankqangaza bathi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!" 
Mark15:14 Wathi ke uPilato kubo, Kuba enze bubi buni na? Kwaba kukhona ke bancamisayo ukunkqangaza, besithi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!" 
Mark15:15 Ke kaloku uPilato, ngokunga angasithomalalisa isihlwele, wabakhululela uBharabhas. Emtyakatyile ke uYesu, wamnikela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:16 Athi amasoldati amrholele ngaphakathi kwentendelezo, oko kukuthi endlwini yerhuluneli; alibizele ndawonye ibutho lawo liphela;" 
Mark15:17 amambathise ngebomvu; aluke isithsaba sameva, amthi jize ngaso," 
Mark15:18 aqale ukumbulisa, athi, Aa! Kumkani wamaYuda!" 
Mark15:19 Ayembetha entloko ngengcongolo; ayemtshicela; ayeguqa ngamadolo, aqubude kuye." 
Mark15:20 Athi akuba edlale ngaye, amhluba ebomvu, amambathisa kwaezakhe iingubo; amrholela phandle, ukuze ambethelele emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:21 Anyanzela umhambi othile, uSimon waseKirene, evela ephandleni, lowo nguyise ka-Alesandire noRufo, ukuba awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe." 
Mark15:22 Amzisa endaweni yeGologota, oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, yindawo yokakayi." 
Mark15:23 Ayemnika iwayini enemore, ukuba ayisele; kodwa akayamkelanga." 
Mark15:24 Athi akumbethelela emnqamlezweni, abelana ngeengubo zakhe, esenza amaqashiso ngazo, ukuze uthile athabathe ethile." 
Mark15:25 Ke kaloku, laye ililixa lesithathu, abambethelela ngalo emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:26 Waye umbhalo wetyala lakhe ubhalwe ngaphezulu, kwathiwa, uKumkani wamaYuda." 
Mark15:27 Kwaye kubethelelwe naye eminqamlezweni izihange zizibini, esinye ngasekunene, esinye ngasekhohlo kwakhe." 
Mark15:28 Sazaliseka ke eso sibhalo sithi, Wabalelwa kwabachasene nomthetho." 
Mark15:29 Baye abadlulayo bemnyelisa, behlunguzela iintloko zabo, besithi, Uha! Wena uchitha itempile, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu," 
Mark15:30 zisindise, uhle emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:31 Ngokukwanjalo nababingeleli abakhulu, bedlala ngaye phakathi kwabo, benababhali, babesithi, Abanye wabasindisa;yena ngokwakhe akanakuzisindisa." 
Mark15:32 UKristu, uKumkani wakwaSirayeli, makehle kalokunje emnqamlezweni, ukuze sibone, sikholwe. Baye nabo babebethelelwe eminqamlezweni kunye naye bemngcikiva." 
Mark15:33 Ke kaloku lakuba lilixa lesithandathu, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, kwada kwalilixa lesithoba." 
Mark15:34 Ngalo ilixa lesithoba, wadanduluka uYesu ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Eloyi! Eloyi! Lama sabhaktani? Oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Thixo wam! Thixo wam! undishiyeleni na?" 
Mark15:35 Inxenye yababemi khona yakuva yathi, Yabonani, ubiza uEliya." 
Mark15:36 Wagidima ke omnye, wazalisa imfunxa ngeviniga, wayifaka engcongolweni, wamseza, esithi, Khanenze kuhle, khe sibone ukuba uEliya woza kumthula na." 
Mark15:37 Wathi ke uYesu, ekhuphe izwi elikhulu, waphuma umphefumlo." 
Mark15:38 Lathi ikhuselo lengcwele lakrazuka kubini, lithabathela phezulu lada lesa phantsi." 
Mark15:39 Ebonile ke umthetheli-khulu obemi malunga naye, ukuba wenjenjalo ukudanduluka waphuma umphefumlo, uthe, Inyaniso, lo mntu ubenguNyana kaThixo." 
Mark15:40 Kwaye ke kukho nabafazi, bekhangele bemgama; kubo apho wayenguMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina wooYakobi omnci nokaYose, kwanoSalome;" 
Mark15:41 ababesithi, oko ebeba kwelaseGalili, bamlandele, bamlungiselele; nabanye abaninzi, ababenyuke naye ukuya eYerusalem." 
Mark15:42 Kuthe sekuhlwile, ekubeni ibiyimini yokulungiselela, oko kukuthi ngumhla ophambi kwesabatha," 
Mark15:43 kweza uYosefu, owaseArimati, umphakathi obekekileyo, owayebulindile naye ubukumkani bukaThixo; waya kungena ngobuganga kuPilato, wacela umzimba kaYesu." 
Mark15:44 Wamangaliswa ke uPilato kukuba selefile. Ebizele kuye umthetheli-khulu, wambuza ukuba uselenexesha na efile." 
Mark15:45 Wathi akuqonda kumthetheli-khulu lowo, wamnika uYosefu umzimba." 
Mark15:46 Yena, ethenge ilinen entle, wamthula; wamsongela kuyo ilinen entle; wamlalisa engcwabeni elalixholwe eweni;waqengqela ilitye emnyango wengcwaba." 
Mark15:47 Baye ke ooMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYose, bebona apho wayebekwe khona." 
Mark16:1 Yakubon ukuba idlule isabatha, ooMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYakobi, noSalome, bathenga ubulawu, ukuba beze bamthambise." 
Mark16:2 Bathi kwakusasa kakhulu, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, beza engcwabeni, liphumile ilanga." 
Mark16:3 Baye bethetha bodwa, besithi, Ngubani na oya kusiqengqela ilitye, lisuke emnyango wengcwaba?" 
Mark16:4 Bathi bakukhangela, babona ukuba liqengqiwe lesuka ilitye;kuba belilikhulu kakhulu." 
Mark16:5 Bakungena engcwabeni, babona indodana ihleli ngasekunene, izithe wambu ngengubo ende, emhlophe; baqhiphuka umbilini." 
Mark16:6 Ithi ke yona kubo, Musani ukuqhiphuka umbilini; nifuna uYesu waseNazarete, obebethelelwe emnqamlezweni. Uvukile, akakho apha; nantsi indawo ababembeke kuyo." 
Mark16:7 Hambani ke niye, nibaxelele abafundi bakhe noPetros ukuthi, uyanandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili; nombona khona apho, njengokuba wayetshilo kuni." 
Mark16:8 Baphuma ke kamsinya, babaleka engcwabeni. Baye ke bephethwe lungcangcazelo nokuthi nqa; abathetha nto nakubani, kuba babesoyika." 
Mark16:9 Ke kaloku wathi uYesu, evuke ekufeni kusasa ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, wabonakala kuqala kuMariya waseMagadala, awayekhuphe kuye iidemon zasixhenxe." 
Mark16:10 Waya yena wabikela ababenaye, bakubon ukuba bakhedamile, bayalila." 
Mark16:11 Basuka nabo, bakuva ukuba uhleli, nokuba ukhe wabonwa nguye, abakholwa." 
Mark16:12 Emveni koko ke, wabonakaliswa ngesinye isimo kwababini bakubo, behamba besinga emaphandleni." 
Mark16:13 Nabo baya babikela abanye; abakholwa nangabo. 
Mark16:14 Kamva wabonakalaliswa kwabalishumi elinamnye, behleli ngasesithebeni; wakungcikiva ukungakholwa kwabo, nobulukhuni beentliziyo zabo; ngokuba bengakholwanga ngabo babembonile evukile." 
Mark16:15 Wathi kubo, Hambani niye kulo lonke ihlabathi, nizivakalise iindaba ezilungileyo kuyo yonke indalo." 
Mark16:16 Lowo ukholiweyo wabhaptizwa, wosindiswa; ke yena ongakholwanga, wogwetywa." 
Mark16:17 Imiqondiso ke eya kulandelana nabo bakholiweyo nantsi:egameni lam baya kukhupha iidemon; baya kuthetha ngeelwimi ezintsha; 
Mark16:18 baya kuphatha iinyoka; nokuba bathe basela into ebulalayo, ayikukha ibenzakalise bona; baya kubeka izandla phezu kwemilwelwe, iphile." 
Mark16:19 Yathi okunene ngoko yona iNkosi, emveni kokuthetha kubo, yanyuselwa emazulwini, yahlala ngasekunene kukaThixo." 
Mark16:20 Ke bona baphuma, bavakalisa ezindaweni zonke, iNkosi isebenza nabo, iliqinisela ilizwi ngayo imiqondiso ephelekana nalo. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Bethe nje ke abaninzi bazamela ukucacisa ibali lezo zinto ziziziganeko phakathi kwethu," 
Luke1:2 njengoko basinikelayo abo, bathi kwasekuqaleni baba ngababoneli nabakhonzi balo ilizwi:" 
Luke1:3 kwabonakala kulungile nakum, ndizilandile nje ngokucokisekileyo zonke, ndizekela kwasentloko, ukuba ndikubhalele ngokucacileyo, Tiyofilo odume kunene," 
Luke1:4 ukuze uyazi kakuhle ingqiniseko yamazwi owafundisiweyo ngomlomo. 
Luke1:5 Ngemihla kaHerode ukumkani wakwaYuda, kwaye kukho umbingeleli othile, ogama linguZekariya, engoweqela lika-Abhiya, nomfazi wakhe engowasezintombini zika-Aron, igama lakhe linguElizabhete." 
Luke1:6 Bebengamalungisa ke bobabini emehlweni kaThixo, behamba ngayo yonke imithetho nemimiselo yeNkosi, bengenakusoleka." 
Luke1:7 Baye bengenamntwana, ngokokuba uElizabhete ebengazali, kanjalo bobabini babesebekhulile." 
Luke1:8 Kwathi ke kaloku, ekubuphatheni ububingeleli bakhe ngexesha leqela lakhe phambi koThixo," 
Luke1:9 ngokwesiko lobubingeleli, kwaba liqashiso lakhe ukuba aqhumise ubulawu, akuba engene endaweni engcwele yeNkosi." 
Luke1:10 Yaye yonke inkitha yabantu ithandaza ngaphandle ngelixa lesiqhumiso. 
Luke1:11 Kwabonakala ke kuye isithunywa seNkosi, simi ngasekunene kwesibingelelo sesiqhumiso." 
Luke1:12 Wakhathazeka uZekariya, akusibona, wangenelwa kukoyika." 
Luke1:13 Sathi ke isithunywa eso kuye, Musa ukoyika, Zekariya, ngokokuba isikhungo sakho siviwe; wothi ke umfazi wakho uElizabhete akuzalele unyana, umthiye igama elinguYohane." 
Luke1:14 Uya kuba nokuvuya nokugcoba, bathi nabaninzi bakuvuyele ukuzalwa kwakhe." 
Luke1:15 Kuba uya kuba mkhulu emehlweni eNkosi, angakhe asele wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo; uya kuzaliswa nguMoya oyiNgcwele kwasekuzalweni kwakhe." 
Luke1:16 Nento eninzi ke yoonyana bakaSirayeli uya kuyibuyisela eNkosini uThixo wabo. 
Luke1:17 Yena uya kuhamba phambi kobuso bayo, enomoya enamandla kaEliya, ukuba azibuyisele iintliziyo zooyise kubantwana, nabangevayo kuko ukuqonda kwamalungisa, alungisele iNkosi abantu abalungisiweyo." 
Luke1:18 Wathi uZekariya kuso isithunywa, Ndiya kukwazi ngani na oko? Kuba mna ndimdala, waye nomfazi wam selekhulile." 
Luke1:19 Saphendula ke isithunywa, sathi kuye, Mna ndinguGabriyeli, oma phambi koThixo. Ndithunyiwe ukuba ndithethe kuwe, ndikushumayeze ezi ndaba zilungileyo." 
Luke1:20 Uyabona, uya kuba sisidenge, ungabi nako ukuthetha, kude kube yimini eziya kuthi zenzeke ngayo ezi zinto, ngenxa enokuba ungakholwanga ngamazwi am; aya kuzalisekiswa wona ngexesha lawo." 
Luke1:21 Baye abantu bemlindile uZekariya, bemangalisiwe kukulibala kwakhe endaweni engcwele leyo." 
Luke1:22 Uthe ke akuphuma, akaba nako ukuthetha kubo; baqonda ukuba ubone umbono endaweni engcwele apho, waye yena emana ukunqwala kubo, wahlala engathethi." 
Luke1:23 Kwathi yakuzaliseka imihla yombuso wakhe, wemka waya endlwini yakhe." 
Luke1:24 Emveni kwayo loo mihla ke, uElizabhete umfazi wakhe wathabatha, wazizimeza iinyanga zantlanu, esithi," 
Luke1:25 Yenjenje iNkosi kum ngemihla eyandikhangelayo, ukuba ikususe ukungcikiveka kwam phakathi kwabantu." 
Luke1:26 Ke kaloku ngenyanga yesithandathu, isithunywa esinguGabriyeli sathunyelwa nguThixo emzini welaseGalili, ogama liyiNazarete," 
Luke1:27 kwintombi, eganelwe indoda egama linguYosefu, yendlu kaDavide; laye igama lentombi leyo linguMariya." 
Luke1:28 Sangena isithunywa kuye, sathi, Vuya, wena ubabalweyo!INkosi inawe; usikelelwe wena phakathi kwabafazi." 
Luke1:29 Uthe ke akusibona, wee qhiphu umbilini ngenxa yelizwi laso;wayecamanga ukuba ungaba mbuliso mni na lo." 
Luke1:30 Sathi ke isithunywa kuye, Musa ukoyika, Mariya; kuba ubabalwe nguThixo." 
Luke1:31 Uyabona, uya kuthabatha esizalweni, uzale unyana, umthiye igama elinguYesu." 
Luke1:32 Yena uya kuba mkhulu, abizwe ngokuba nguNyana wOsenyangweni; iNkosi uThixo iya kumnika itrone kaDavide," 
Luke1:33 uyise, abe ngukumkani phezu kwendlu kaYakobi kude kube ngunaphakade, nobukumkani bakhe bungabi nasiphelo." 
Luke1:34 Wathi ke uMariya kuso isithunywa, Kuya kuthini na ukubakho oku, ndingazani nandoda nje?" 
Luke1:35 Saphendula isithunywa sathi kuye, UMoya oyiNgcwele uya kuza phezu kwakho, athi namandla Osenyangweni akusibekele; kungoko loo nto ingcwele izalwa nguwe iya kubizwa ngokuba nguNyana kaThixo." 
Luke1:36 Uyabona, uElizabhete, ozalana nawe, naye umithe unyana ebudaleni bakhe; nale yinyanga yesithandathu kuye, lowo bekuthiwa ngongazaliyo;" 
Luke1:37 ngokuba akukho nanye into eya kumnqabela yena uThixo. 
Luke1:38 Wathi ke uMariya, Nanko umkhonzazana weNkosi; makwenzeke kum ngokwelizwi lakho. Saza isithunywa semka kuye." 
Luke1:39 Ke kaloku, wesuka uMariya ngaloo mihla, wasinga kweleentaba ngobungxamo, emzini wakwaYuda;" 
Luke1:40 wangena endlwini kaZekariya, wambulisa uElizabhete." 
Luke1:41 Kwathi, akuwuva uElizabhete umbuliso kaMariya, lwasuka lwaxhuma usana esizalweni sakhe, wesuka wazala nguMoya oyiNgcwele uElizabhete." 
Luke1:42 Wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Unentsikelelo wena phakathi kwabafazi; sinentsikelelo nesiqhamo sesizalo sakho." 
Luke1:43 Kuhle ngani na kum, ukuthi unina weNkosi yam eze kum?" 
Luke1:44 Kuba uyabona, kuthe lakubakho izwi lombuliso wakho ezindlebeni zam, lwasuka lwaxhuma usana ngokugcoba esizalweni sam." 
Luke1:45 Unoyolo lowo wakholwayo koko; ngokuba kuya kubakho inzaliseko yezo zinto zithethiweyo kuye yiNkosi. 
Luke1:46 Wathi uMariya: Umphefumlo wam uyenza nkulu iNkosi," 
Luke1:47 Nomoya wam ugcobile ngoThixo uMsindisi wam; 
Luke1:48 Ngokuba wakukhangela ukuthobeka komkhonzazana wakhe; Kuba, uyabona, ziya kuqala kwangoku ukuthi ndingonoyolo zonke izizukulwana;" 
Luke1:49 Ngokuba wandenzela izinto ezinkulu uSomandla; Lingcwele igama lakhe. 
Luke1:50 Yaye inceba yakhe ikwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana Kwabo bamoyikayo. 
Luke1:51 Wenze amandla ngengalo yakhe, Wabachithachitha abanekratshi ekucingeni kweentliziyo zabo." 
Luke1:52 Wabawisa abanamandla ezitroneni zabo, Wabaphakamisa abathobekileyo." 
Luke1:53 Wahluthisa abalambileyo ngezinto ezilungileyo; Wabandulula abazizityebi belambatha. 
Luke1:54 Wasiza uSirayeli, umkhonzi wakhe, Ngokukhumbula inceba yakhe;" 
Luke1:55 Njengoko wathethayo koobawo bethu, KuAbraham nakwimbewu yakhe ngonaphakade." 
Luke1:56 Wahlala ke uMariya naye iinyanga ngathi zaba ntathu, waza wabuyela ekhaya." 
Luke1:57 Ke kaloku, ixesha likaElizabhete lazaliseka lokuba azale;wazala unyana." 
Luke1:58 Beva abamelwane nemizalwane yakhe, ukuba iNkosi iyenze nkulu inceba yayo kuye, baye ke bevuyisana naye." 
Luke1:59 Kwathi ngomhla wesibhozo, beza kumalusa umntwana; baye bemthiya igama likayise, besithi nguZekariya;" 
Luke1:60 koko waphendulayo unina, wathi, Hayi; uya kubizwa ngokuba nguYohane." 
Luke1:61 Bathi kuye, Akukho namnye ubizwa ngelo gama kwimizalwane yakho." 
Luke1:62 Baye ke benqwala kuyise besithi, angathanda ukuba athiweni na ukubizwa." 
Luke1:63 Wabiza icwecwana, wabhala esithi, Igama lakhe nguYohane.Bamangaliswa bonke." 
Luke1:64 Wavuleka ke kwaoko umlomo wakhe, lwathukululeka nolwimi lwakhe, wamana ethetha, ebonga uThixo." 
Luke1:65 Kwehla ukoyika phezu kwalo lonke umelwane lwabo; kwaye kulo lonke eleentaba lakwaYuda kuxoxwa ngazo zonke ezi zinto. 
Luke1:66 Bathi bonke abazivayo, bazibeka entliziyweni yabo, besithi, Azi uya kuba yintoni na lo mntwana? Saye isandla seNkosi sinaye." 
Luke1:67 UZekariya uyise wazala nguMoya oyiNgcwele, waprofeta esithi:" 
Luke1:68 Mayibongwe iNkosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, Ngokuba ibavelele yabakhulula ngentlawulelo abantu bayo." 
Luke1:69 Yasiphakamisela uphondo losindiso Endlwini kaDavide, umkhonzi wayo," 
Luke1:70 Njengoko yathethayo ngomlomo wabangcwele, ababengabaprofeti bayo kwasephakadeni;" 
Luke1:71 Usindiso lokusisindisa ezintshabeni zethu, nasesandleni sabo bonke abo basithiyayo;" 
Luke1:72 Ukubenzela inceba oobawo bethu, Nokukhumbula umnqophiso wayo ongcwele," 
Luke1:73 Isifungo eyasifungela uAbraham ubawo wethu," 
Luke1:74 Sokusinika ukuba sithi, sihlangulwe esandleni seentshaba zethu, Siyikhonze singenakoyika," 
Luke1:75 Ngobungcwele nangobulungisa emehlweni ayo, yonke imihla yobomi bethu." 
Luke1:76 Nawe, mntwana, uya kubizwa ngokuba ungumprofeti wOsenyangweni, Kuba uya kuhamba phambi kobuso beNkosi, ulungise iindlela zayo," 
Luke1:77 Ukuze ubanike abantu bayo ukwaziwa kosindiso Ngoxolelo lwezono zabo," 
Luke1:78 Ngenxa yenceba nemfesane yoThixo wethu, Othe ngaye wasivelela umso wasenyangweni," 
Luke1:79 Ukuba ukhanye kwabo bahleliyo emnyameni, nasethunzi nilokufa, Ukuba uzingenise iinyawo zethu endleleni yoxolo." 
Luke1:80 Wakhula umntwana, waya esomelela ngomoya; waye esentlango, kwada kwayimini yokubonakalaliswa kwakhe kuSirayeli." 
Luke2:1 Ke kaloku kwathi ngaloo mihla, kwaphuma ummiselo kuKesare Awugusto othi, malibhalwe encwadini yomlibo wokuzalwa lonke elimiweyo." 
Luke2:2 Olo lubhalo lwaba lolokuqala, akubon ukuba uKireniyo uyirhuluneli yeSiriya." 
Luke2:3 Babesithi bonke baye kubhalwa, athi elowo aye kowakowabo umzi." 
Luke2:4 Wenyuka ke noYosefu, evela kwelaseGalili, kumzi oyiNazarete, waya kwelakwaYuda, emzini kaDavide, ekuthiwa yiBhetelehem, ngenxa yokuba ebengowendlu kaDavide, engowemizalwane yakhe;" 
Luke2:5 esiya kubhalwa, enoMariya, umfazi lowo wayemganelwe, selekhulelwe." 
Luke2:6 Ke kaloku kwathi, xa bakhona, yazaliseka imihla yokuba azale." 
Luke2:7 Wamzala unyana wakhe wamazibulo, wamsongela eziqhiyeni, wamlalisa emkhumbini wesitali, ngenxa enokuba babengenandawo endlwini yabahambi." 
Luke2:8 Kwaye kukho abalusi kwakwelo lizwe, behlala ezindle, belinda ebusuku imihlambi yabo." 
Luke2:9 Babona ngesithunywa seNkosi simi phezu kwabo, bathi nobuqaqawuli beNkosi bababengezelela ngeenxa zonke; besuka boyika ngokoyika okukhulu." 
Luke2:10 Isithunywa eso sathi kubo, Musani ukoyika; kuba, yabonani, ndinishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zovuyo olukhulu, oluya kuba kubo bonke bantu;" 
Luke2:11 ngokuba nizalelwe namhlanje emzini kaDavide uMsindisi, onguKristu iNkosi." 
Luke2:12 Nantsi ke into eyoba ngumqondiso kuni: nofumana lusana lusongelweyo eziqhiyeni, lulele emkhumbini wesitali." 
Luke2:13 Kwabakho ngesiquphe, ndawonye nesithunywa eso, inkitha yomkhosi wasemazulwini, idumisa uThixo, isithi," 
Luke2:14 Uzuko kuThixo enyangweni, Uxolo emhlabeni, Inkolelo ebantwini." 
Luke2:15 Kwathi ke, zakumka kubo izithunywa zisiya emazulwini, abantu abo abalusi bathi omnye komnye, Masesihamba sisiya eBhetelehem apho, siyibone le nto ihlileyo, esiyazisiweyo yiNkosi." 
Luke2:16 Beza ngobungxamo, bamfumana uMariya, kwanoYosefu, nalo usana lulele emkhumbini wesitali." 
Luke2:17 Bathi ke, bakubona, balibhengeza ilizwi elabe lithethwe kubo ngaye lo mntwana." 
Luke2:18 Bathi bonke abo bevayo, bamangaliswa zezo zinto zabe zithethwe kubo ngabalusi." 
Luke2:19 Waye ke uMariya ezigcina zonke ezi zinto eziguquguqula entliziyweni yakhe. 
Luke2:20 Babuya abalusi, bemzukisa bemdumisa uThixo, ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ababezivile nababezibonile, njengoko kwabe kuthethiwe kubo." 
Luke2:21 Xeshikweni ke zazizalisekile iintsuku ezisibhozo zokuba umntwana aluswe, wathiywa igama elinguYesu, elo wabelithiyiwe sisithunywa sezulu, engekamithwa nokumithwa." 
Luke2:22 Xeshikweni ke zazizalisekile iintsuku zokuhlanjululwa kwabo ngokomthetho kaMoses, benyuka naye baya eYerusalem, ukuba bammise phambi kweNkosi," 
Luke2:23 njengoko kubhaliweyo emthethweni weNkosi, kwathiwa, Yonke into eliduna, evula isizalo, ize kuthiwe ingcwele eNkosini;" 
Luke2:24 nokuba benze idini njengoko kutshiwoyo emthethweni weNkosi ukuthi, Isibini samahobe, nokuba ngamagobo amabini amavukuthu." 
Luke2:25 Kwaye ke kukho umntu eYerusalem, ogama linguSimon; waye loo mntu elilungisa, emoyika uThixo, elinde intuthuzelo kaSirayeli;waye noMoya oyiNgcwele ephezu kwakhe." 
Luke2:26 Wayehlatyelwe nguMoya oyiNgcwele, ukuba akayi kubona kufa, engekamboni uKristu weNkosi." 
Luke2:27 Weza ngaye uMoya etempileni; kwathi, ekumngeniseni kwabo abazali umntwana uYesu, ukuba bamenze ngokwesiko lomthetho," 
Luke2:28 yena wamamkelela ezingalweni zakhe, wabonga uThixo, wathi:" 
Luke2:29 Uyamndulula ngoku umkhonzi wakho enoxolo, Mnini-nto-zonke, ngokwelizwi lakho;" 
Luke2:30 Ngokuba amehlo am alubonile usindiso lwakho," 
Luke2:31 Olulungisileyo ebusweni bazo zonke izizwe," 
Luke2:32 Isikhanyiso sokutyhilela iintlanga, Uzuko lwabantu bakho, amaSirayeli." 
Luke2:33 Babemangaliswa ooYosefu nonina zezo zinto zithethwayo ngaye. 
Luke2:34 USimon wabasikelela, wathi kuMariya unina, Uyabona, lo umiselwe ukuwa nokuvuka kwabaninzi kwaSirayeli, nokuba abe ngumqondiso ochasiweyo;" 
Luke2:35 ngokokuze zibe nokutyhilwa izicamango eziphuma ezintliziyweni ezininzi; ewe ke, nowakho umphefumlo ikrele liya kuwutyhutyha." 
Luke2:36 Kwaye kukho noAna umprofetikazi, intombi kaFanuweli, wesizwe sika-Ashere. Yena waye eselekhulile kakhulu; waye ke ebehleli nendoda iminyaka esixhenxe, ethabathela ebuntombini bakhe." 
Luke2:37 Waye yena engumhlolokazi ominyaka ngathi imashumi asibhozo anamine, obengemki etempileni, ekhonza uThixo ngokuzila ukudla nangokukhunga ubusuku nemini." 
Luke2:38 Yena wayemele kufuphi ngelo lixa, wathelela ekuyidumiseni iNkosi; wayethetha ngayo kubo bonke abo babelinde ukukhululwa ngentlawulelo, eYerusalem." 
Luke2:39 Bakuba bezigqibile zonke izinto ngokomthetho weNkosi, babuyela kwelaseGalili, emzini wabo iNazarete." 
Luke2:40 Ke kaloku wakhula umntwana, waya esomelela emoyeni, ezele bubulumko; lwaye nobabalo lukaThixo luphezu kwakhe." 
Luke2:41 Baye ke abazali bakhe behambela eYerusalem, iminyaka ngeminyaka, emthendelekweni wepasika." 
Luke2:42 Kuthe, xa abe eminyaka ilishumi elinamibini ezelwe, bakubon ukuba banyuke baya eYerusalem ngokwesiko lomthendeleko lowo," 
Luke2:43 bakubon ukuba bazigqibile ke iintsuku ezo, ekubuyeni kwabo, umntwana uYesu wasalela eYerusalem. Babengazi ke uYosefu nonina." 
Luke2:44 Babeba ke bona usemkhokweni wabahambi, bahamba uhambo lwamini-nye; bamana bemfuna phakathi kwemizalwana, naphakathi kwabazana nabo." 
Luke2:45 Bathe bakuba bengamfumani, babuyela eYerusalem, bemfuna." 
Luke2:46 Kwathi, emveni kwemihla emithathu, bamfumana etempileni, ehleli phakathi kwabafundisi, ebaphulaphula, ebuya ebabuza." 
Luke2:47 Basuka bonke ababemphulaphula bathi nqa yingqondo yakhe na ziimpendulo zakhe. 
Luke2:48 Bakumbona bakhwankqiswa. Unina wathi kuye, Mntwana wam, yini na ukuba usenjenje? Uyabona, uyihlo nam sibe sikufuna, sibuhlungu kakhulu." 
Luke2:49 Wathi kubo, Benindifunela ntoni na? Beningazi na ukuba ndimelwe kukuba ndibe semicimbini kaBawo?" 
Luke2:50 Ke bona abayiqondanga into awayeyithetha kubo. 
Luke2:51 Wehla nabo, waya kufika eNazarete, wabalulamela. Wamana ukuzigcina ke unina zonke ezo ndawo entliziyweni yakhe." 
Luke2:52 Waye UYesu ehambela phambili ebulumkweni nasebukhulwini, nasekuthandweni nguThixo nangabantu." 
Luke3:1 Ke kaloku, ngomnyaka weshumi elinantlanu wokulawula kukaTibheriyo Kesare, inguPontiyo Pilato irhuluneli kwelakwaYuda, inguHerode umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseGalili, inguFilipu ke umzalwana wakhe umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseYitureya nelizwe leTrakoniti, inguLisaniyo umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseAbhilene," 
Luke3:2 ngexa lababingeleli abakhulu ooAnas noKayafa, lafika ilizwi likaThixo kuYohane, unyana kaZekariya, entlango." 
Luke3:3 Weza kuwo wonke ummandla waseYordan, evakalisa ubhaptizo lwenguquko ukuze kuxolelwe izono;" 
Luke3:4 njengoko kubhaliweyo encwadini yamazwi kaIsaya umprofeti, esithi, Izwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yilungiseni indlela yeNkosi, Wutyenenezeni umendo wayo." 
Luke3:5 Yonke imifula iya kudityelelwa, Nazo zonke iintaba neenduli ziya kuthotywa, Neendawo ezigoso ziya kuthi tye, Nezibugqagala ziya kuba ziindlela ezigudileyo;" 
Luke3:6 Bonke abantu baya kulubona usindiso lukaThixo. 
Luke3:7 Wayesithi ngoko kuzo izihlwele ezaziphuma zisiza kubhaptizwa nguye, Nzalandini yamarhamba, ngubani na owanibonisayo, ukuba niyibaleke ingqumbo ezayo?" 
Luke3:8 Velisani ngoko iziqhamo eziyifaneleyo inguquko; ize ningaqali nithi ngaphakathi kwenu, Thina sinobawo uAbraham:kuba ndithi kuni, Unako uThixo kuwo la matye ukumvelisela abantwana uAbraham." 
Luke3:9 Kananjalo izembe selibekiwe engcanjini yemithi; ngoko umthi wonke ongavelisi siqhamo sihle, uyagawulwa, uphoswe emlilweni." 
Luke3:10 Zaye izihlwele zibuza kuye, zisithi, Masenze ntoni na ke?" 
Luke3:11 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Lowo uneengubo zangaphantsi ezimbini, makabele ongenayo: nalowo unokudla, makenjenjalo." 
Luke3:12 Kweza ke nababuthi berhafu ukuba babhaptizwe, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, masenze ntoni na?" 
Luke3:13 Wathi ke kubo, Ningabizi okungaphezu kwenikumiselweyo." 
Luke3:14 Ayebuza kuye ke namasoldati, esithi, Masenze ntoni na ke thina? Wathi kuwo, Ningaphangi mntu ngokumoyikisa, ningadli mntu ngokumtyhola; yanelani yimivuzo yenu." 
Luke3:15 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba abantu balindile, becamanga bonke ezintliziyweni zabo ngaye uYohane, ukuba akangebi nguye na uKristu," 
Luke3:16 waphendula uYohane kubo bonke esithi, Mna okunene ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi; kodwa uyeza lowo unamandla kunam, endingafanelekileyo ukuba ndiwuthukulule nomtya weembadada zakhe; uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangomlilo yena;" 
Luke3:17 omnyazi wokwela usesandleni sakhe. Uya kusicokisa kuthi tu isanda sakhe, ayibuthele kuvimba wakhe ingqolowa; ke wona umququ uya kuwutshisa ngomlilo ongacimekiyo." 
Luke3:18 Waye ke ngoko evuselela nangezinye izinto ezininzi, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo ebantwini." 
Luke3:19 Ke kaloku uHerode, umphathi wesahlulo sesine selizwe, ohlwayiwe nguye ngenxa kaHerodiya, umfazi kaFilipu umninawa wakhe, nangenxa yezinto zonke ezingendawo abezenzile uHerode," 
Luke3:20 wongezelela nale kuzo zonke, yokuba amvalele entolongweni uYohane." 
Luke3:21 Ke kaloku kwathi, ekubeni bebhaptiziwe abantu bonke, ebhaptiziwe naye uYesu, ethandaza nokuthandaza, lasuka lavuleka izulu," 
Luke3:22 wehla phezu kwakhe uMoya oyiNgcwele, enembonakalo yomzimba onjengehobe. Kweza nezwi eliphuma ezulwini lisithi, Wena unguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo nguwe." 
Luke3:23 Waye uYesu eminyaka ngathi imashumi mathathu ezelwe, ukuqala kwakhe ukufundisa, engobe kusithiwa ngunyana kaYosefu, kaHeli," 
Luke3:24 kaMatati, kaLevi, kaMeleki, kaYana, kaYosefu," 
Luke3:25 kaMatatiya, ka-Amos, kaNahum, kaEsli, kaNagayi," 
Luke3:26 kaMahati, kaMatatiya, kaShimehi, kaYosefu, kaYuda," 
Luke3:27 kaYohanan, kaResha, kaZerubhabheli, kaShalatiyeli, kaNeri," 
Luke3:28 kaMeleki, ka-Adi, kaKosam, kaElmodam, kaEre," 
Luke3:29 kaYose, kaEliyezere, kaYoram, kaMatati, kaLevi," 
Luke3:30 kaSimon, kaYuda, kaYosefu, kaYonan, kaEliyakim," 
Luke3:31 kaMaleya, kaMina, kaMatata, kaNatan, kaDavide," 
Luke3:32 kaYese, kaObhede, kaBhohazi, kaSalemon kaNashon," 
Luke3:33 ka-Aminadabhi, ka-Aram, kaHetseron, kaPeretse, kaYuda," 
Luke3:34 kaYakobi, kaIsake, ka-Abraham, kaTera, kaNahore," 
Luke3:35 kaSerugi, kaRehu, kaPelege, kaHebhere, kaShela," 
Luke3:36 kaKenan, ka-Arpakishadi, kaShem, kaNowa, kaLameki," 
Luke3:37 kaMetusela, kaEnoki, kaYerede, kaMahalaleli, kaKenan," 
Luke3:38 kaEnos, kaSete, ka-Adam, kaThixo." 
Luke4:1 Ke kaloku, wathi uYesu, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wabuya eYordan, wesiwa nguMoya entlango." 
Luke4:2 Wantsuku zimashumi mane ehendwa nguMtyholi. Akadla nto ngezo ntsuku; zakuphela ke, walamba." 
Luke4:3 Wathi uMtyholi kuye, Ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, yitsho kweli litye libe sisonka." 
Luke4:4 UYesu wamphendula esithi, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Akungasonka sodwa aya kuphila umntu; kungamazwi onke kaThixo." 
Luke4:5 UMtyholi, emnyuse entabeni ephakamileyo, wambonisa zonke izikumkani zelimiweyo, ngesiquphe sexesha." 
Luke4:6 Wathi ke uMtyholi kuye, Ndokunika bonke obu bukhosi bazo nozuko lwazo; ngokuba bunikelwe kum; nosukuba ndithanda ndiyamnika bona." 
Luke4:7 Ukuba ngoko uthe wena waqubuda phambi kwam, konke oko koba kokwakho." 
Luke4:8 UYesu wamphendula wathi, Suka umke, uye emva kwam, Sathana, ngokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze uqubude eNkosini uThixo wakho, ukhonze yena yedwa." 
Luke4:9 Wamsa eYerusalem, wammisa eluchochoyini lwetempile, wathi kuye, Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, ziphose ezantsi phaya." 
Luke4:10 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uya kuziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe, ukuba zikugcine;" 
Luke4:11 kwathiwa, Ziya kukufukula ngezandla, Hleze ubetheke etyeni ngonyawo lwakho." 
Luke4:12 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Kuthiwe, Uze ungayihendi iNkosi uThixo wakho." 
Luke4:13 Waza uMtyholi, ekugqibile konke ukuhenda, wesuka kuye umzuzu." 
Luke4:14 Wabuya uYesu enamandla oMoya, weza kwelaseGalili; kwaphuma udaba ngaye, lwaya kuloo mmandla wonke." 
Luke4:15 Wabe yena efundisa ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu, ezukiswa ngabo bonke." 
Luke4:16 Wafika eNazarete, apho waye ondlelwe khona, wangena ngokwesiko lakhe ngomhla wesabatha endlwini yesikhungu, wesuka wema ukuba alese." 
Luke4:17 Wanikelwa incwadi kaIsaya umprofeti, wathi, akuba eyitwabulule incwadi leyo, wafumana indawo le kubhalwe kuyo kwathiwa," 
Luke4:18 UMoya weNkosi uphezu kwam, Ethe ngenxa yoko yandithambisela ukushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo kumahlwempu. Indithume ukuba ndiphilise abantliziyo ityumkileyo, ndivakalise inkululeko kubathinjwa, Nokubuyiselwa kokubona kwabaziimfama, Ndindulule abaqobekileyo bekhululekile," 
Luke4:19 Ndivakalise umnyaka owamkelekileyo weNkosi. 
Luke4:20 Eyisongile ke incwadi, wayibuyisela kwisicaka, wahlala phantsi. Aye amehlo abo bonke abasendlwini yesikhungu enamathele kuye." 
Luke4:21 Waqala ke ukuthi kubo, Namhlanje esi sibhalo sizalisekile ezindlebeni zenu." 
Luke4:22 Baye bonke bemngqinela, bemangaliswa ngamazwi amnandi aphuma emlonyeni wakhe; babesithi, Lo asinguye na unyana kaYosefu?" 
Luke4:23 Wathi kubo, Kakade niya kuwuthetha kum lo mzekeliso uthi, Gqirha, ziphilise; okungangoko sikuve kwenzeke eKapernahum, kwenze nakowenu apha." 
Luke4:24 Wathi ke, Inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho mprofeti wamkelekileyo kowabo." 
Luke4:25 Kodwa inene ndithi kuni, Babebaninzi abahlolokazi kwaSirayeli ngemihla kaEliya, oko lalivingcekile izulu iminyaka emithathu eneenyanga ezintandathu, xeshikweni kwakukho indlala enkulu kulo lonke ilizwe;" 
Luke4:26 kanti uEliya akathunywanga nakumnye kubo; wathunywa eTsarfati yakwaTsidon kumhlolokazi, kwakuphela." 
Luke4:27 Kanjalo babebaninzi abaneqhenqa kwaSirayeli ngexesha likaElisha umprofeti; kanti ke akuhlanjululwanga namnye kubo, yaba nguNahaman umSiriya kwaba kuphela." 
Luke4:28 Bazala ngumsindo bonke ababesendlwini yesikhungu, bakuziva ezo zinto." 
Luke4:29 Besuka bamkhuphela ngaphandle komzi, bamrholela elungqamekweni lwentaba, owakhelwe kuyo umzi wabo, ukuze bamphose ezantsi eweni." 
Luke4:30 Usuke yena wacanda phakathi kwabo, wemka." 
Luke4:31 Wehla waya eKapernahum, umzi welaseGalili; wayebafundisa ngesabatha." 
Luke4:32 Baye ke bekhwankqiswa kukufundisa kwakhe; ngokuba ilizwi lakhe libe linegunya. 
Luke4:33 Kwaye kukho endlwini yesikhungu apho umntu onomoya wedemon engcolileyo; 
Luke4:34 wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Yoo! yini na enathi nawe, Yesu waseNazarete? Uze kusitshabalalisa na? Ndiyakwazi wena, lowo unguye; ungoyiNgcwele kaThixo." 
Luke4:35 Wawukhalimela uYesu, esithi, Yithi tu, uphume kuye. Yasuka idemon yamjulela esazulwini, yaphuma kuye ingamenzakalisanga." 
Luke4:36 Besuka bathi qhiphu umbilini bonke, baye bethetha bodwa besithi, Lilizwi lini na eli, le nto abathethela ngegunya nangamandla oomoya abangcolileyo aba, baze baphume?" 
Luke4:37 Lwaye luphuma udaba lwakhe, lusiya kuzo zonke iindawo zaloo mmandla." 
Luke4:38 Esukile endlwini yesikhungu, wangena endlwini kaSimon. Waye ke umkhwekazi kaSimon ebanjwe yicesina enkulu; bambika kuye." 
Luke4:39 Wema phezu kwakhe, wayikhalimela icesina, yamyeka; evukile ke kwangoko, wamana ebalungiselela." 
Luke4:40 Kuthe ke bakubon ukuba liyatshona ilanga, bonke abo babenabafayo zizifo ngezifo, babazisa kuye; wazibeka izandla phezu kwabo bonke ngabanye, wabaphilisa." 
Luke4:41 Zaye ke needemon ziphuma kwabaninzi, zikhala zisithi, Wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo. Uthe ezikhalimela, akazivumela ukuba zithethe; ngokuba bezimazi ukuba unguye uKristu." 
Luke4:42 Kwakusa, waphuma waya endaweni eyintlango; zaye izihlwele zimfuna, zada zaza kufika kuye; zazimbambezela ukuba angemki kuzo." 
Luke4:43 Uthe ke kuzo, Ndimelwe kukuba ndizishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukaThixo nakweminye imizi, ngokuba ndithunywe oko." 
Luke4:44 Waye ezivakalisa ke ezindlwini zesikhungu zelaseGalili. 
Luke5:1 Ke kaloku kuthe, ekubeni zimxinile izihlwele, ziza kuva ilizwi likaThixo, wesuka wema ngasedikeni laseGenesarete." 
Luke5:2 Wabona imikhombe emibini imi ngasedikeni apho; babe ke ababambisi beentlanzi bephumile kuyo, behlamba iminatha yabo." 
Luke5:3 Wathi ke, engene komnye umkhombe, owawungokaSimon, wamcela ukuba akhe akhwelelise kancinane emhlabeni; waza, ehleli phantsi, wamana ezifundisa izihlwele esemkhombeni apho." 
Luke5:4 Akupheza ke ukuthetha, wathi kuSimon, Khwelelisela enzulwini, nihlise iminatha yenu, kubanjiswe." 
Luke5:5 Waphendula uSimon wathi kuye, Mongameli, sibulaleke ubusuku buphela, asabamba nento; kodwa ngelakho ilizwi ndiya kuwuhlisa umnatha." 
Luke5:6 Bathi, bakukwenza oko, bavingcela inkitha enkulu yeentlanzi;wawuqhaqheka ke umnatha wabo." 
Luke5:7 Bakhoba amahlulelana abo, abekomnye umkhombe, ukuba eze kuncedisana nabo. Beza, bayizalisa imikhombe yomibini, yada yafuna ukutshona." 
Luke5:8 Uthe ke akukubona oko uSimon Petros, wawa emadolweni kaYesu, esithi, Mka kum, ngokuba ndiyindoda engumoni, Nkosi." 
Luke5:9 Kuba wathi makatha, kwanabo bonke ababenaye, ngobanjiso lweentlanzi ezo bazibambisayo." 
Luke5:10 Baba kwanjalo ke noYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, ababengamadlelane noSimon. UYesu wathi kuSimon, Musa ukoyika;uya kuthabathela kweli xesha ubambisa abantu." 
Luke5:11 Bakuyifikisa imikhombe emhlabeni, bashiya into yonke, bamlandela." 
Luke5:12 Kwathi ekomnye umzi, babona ngendoda ezele liqhenqa; yathi yakumbona uYesu, yawa ngobuso, yamkhunga, isithi, Nkosi, ukuba uyathanda, unako ukundihlambulula." 
Luke5:13 Wasolula isandla, wayichukumisa, esithi, Ndiyathanda, hlambuluka. Lathi kwaoko iqhenqa lemka kuyo." 
Luke5:14 Wayithethela yena ngelithi, mayingaxeleli bani. Wathi, Yiya kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, usondeze idini, ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwakho, njengoko wamisayo uMoses, kube bubungqina kubo." 
Luke5:15 Kwaba kukhona ke luhlakazekayo udaba ngaye; kwaye kubuthelana izihlwele ezikhulu ukuza kuphulaphula, nokuphiliswa nguye ebulwelweni bazo." 
Luke5:16 Waye ke yena emana ukuzisithelisa ezindaweni eziziintlango, athandaze."
