Luke19:24 Wathi kwababemi ngakhona, Mhlutheni imina leyo, niyinike lowo uneemina ezilishumi." 
Luke19:25 Bathi ke kuye, Nkosi, uneemina ezilishumi." 
Luke19:26 Kuba ndithi kuni, Wonke umntu onako uya kunikwa; ongenako ke, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako." 
Luke19:27 Ke zona ezo ntshaba zam zazingathandanga ukuba ndibe ngukumkani phezu kwazo, ziziseni apha, nizincinithe phambi kwam." 
Luke19:28 Waye, akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, ehamba ngaphambili, enyuka esiya eYerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Kwathi, akusondela eBhetefage naseBhetani, esingise entabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma, wesusa bababini kubafundi bakhe," 
Luke19:30 wathi, Hambani niye emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani; nothi, nakungena kuwo, nifumane ithole le-esile libotshelelwe, ekungazanga kuhlale namnye umntu phezu kwalo; likhululeni nilizise." 
Luke19:31 Nokuba ubani uyanibuza, esithi, Yini na ukuba nilikhulule?nothi ukuthetha kuye, Liyafuneka eNkosini." 
Luke19:32 Basuka ke baya abo babethunyiwe, bafumana kunjengoko abekutshilo kubo." 
Luke19:33 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba bayalikhulula ithole, bathi abaninilo kubo, Nilikhululelani na ithole?" 
Luke19:34 Bathi ke bona, Liyafuneka eNkosini." 
Luke19:35 Balizisa kuYesu, baphosa iingubo zabo phezu kwethole elo, bamkhwelisa uYesu." 
Luke19:36 Akubon ukuba uyahamba ke, bamana bezandlala iingubo zabo endleleni." 
Luke19:37 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba selesondele ekuhleni kwayo iNtaba yemiNquma, yaqala yonke inkitha yabafundi yavuya, yadumisa uThixo ngezwi elikhulu, ngayo yonke imisebenzi yamandla abayibonayo;" 
Luke19:38 besithi, Makabongwe lo Kumkani uzayo egameni leNkosi;uxolo emazulwini, uzuko enyangweni." 
Luke19:39 Abathile kubaFarisi esihlweleni apho bathi kuye, Mfundisi, bakhalimele abafundi bakho." 
Luke19:40 Waphendula wathi kubo, Ndithi kuni, kungathi kuthe cwaka aba, kunkqangaze amatye la." 
Luke19:41 Akusondela, wawubona umzi, wawulilela," 
Luke19:42 esithi, Akwaba ubusazi nawe lo kwangayo yona le mini yakho, izinto ezizezoxolo lwakho! Ke kungoku zifihliwe emehlweni akho." 
Luke19:43 Ngokuba uya kufikelwa yimihla, eziya kuthi iintshaba zakho zikubiyele ngodonga, zikungqinge, zikuxine ngeenxa zonke," 
Luke19:44 zikukhahlele phantsi wena, nabantwana bakho phakathi, kwakho; zingashiyi nelitye phezu kwelitye phakathi kwakho, ngenxa enokuba ungalazanga ixesha lokuvelelwa kwakho." 
Luke19:45 Waza, eye kungena etempileni, waqala ukubakhupha abo babethengisa kuyo, nababethenga;" 
Luke19:46 esithi kubo, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Indlu yam yindlu yokuthandaza; ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange." 
Luke19:47 Wayefundisa imihla ngemihla etempileni apho. Baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, kwanabaziintloko zabantu, befuna ukumtshabalalisa." 
Luke19:48 Baye ke bengafumani nto bangayenzayo; kuba bonke abantu babenamathele kuye, bemphulaphula." 
Luke20:1 Kwathi ngenye imini, akubon ukuba uyabafundisa abantu etempileni, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, wafikelwa ngababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, kunye namadoda amakhulu." 
Luke20:2 Bathetha kuye besithi, Sixelele; uzenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto? Kanjalo ngubani na okunike eli gunya?" 
Luke20:3 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kubuza kuni zwi-nye, ize nindixelele ke." 
Luke20:4 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma emazulwini, lwaluphuma ebantwini, sini na?" 
Luke20:5 Bacamanga ke bona bodwa, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaphuma emazulwini, wothi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?" 
Luke20:6 Ukuba ke sithe, Lwaphuma ebantwini, bonke abantu bosigibisela ngamatye; kuba beyisekile ukuba uYohane ungumprofeti." 
Luke20:7 Baphendula ngokuthi, abazi ukuba lwaphuma phi na." 
Luke20:8 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Luke20:9 Ke kaloku waqala wathetha ebantwini lo mzekeliso: Umntu othile watyala isidiliya, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe umzuzu owaneleyo." 
Luke20:10 Wathi ngalo ixesha elifanelekileyo, wathuma umkhonzi kubalimi, ukuba bamnike esiqhameni sesidiliya. Basuka ke bona abalimi bamtyabula, bamndulula elambatha." 
Luke20:11 Waphinda wathuma omnye umkhonzi. Bamtyabula ke nalowo, bamhlazisa, bamndulula elambatha." 
Luke20:12 Waphinda wathuma nowesithathu. Bathi ke bona bamngxwelerha nalowo, bamkhupha." 
Luke20:13 Uthe ke umninisidiliya, Ndiya kuthini na? Ndiya kuthuma unyana wam oyintanda; mhlawumbi, bakumbona, bangamhlonela yena." 
Luke20:14 Bathe ke abalimi, bakumbona, bacamanga bodwa, besithi, Yindlalifa le; yizani siyibulale, ukuze ilifa libe lelethu." 
Luke20:15 Bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya, bambulala. Uya kuthini na ke ngoko kubo umninisidiliya?" 
Luke20:16 Uya kufika abatshabalalise abo balimi, asinikele bambi isidiliya eso. Bathe ke bakukuva oko, Mayingabikho loo nto!" 
Luke20:17 Wondela ke kubo, wathi, Yintoni na phofu le ibhaliweyo:Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo?" 
Luke20:18 Bonke abathe bawa phezu kweli litye, botyumka; ke bona elithe labawela, lobabetha bathi saa." 
Luke20:19 Baza ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali bafuna ukumsa izandla ngelo lixa; boyika abantu, kuba babesazi ukuba uwuthethe esingisele kubo lo mzekeliso." 
Luke20:20 Bamlalela, bathuma iintlola ezizenza amalungisa, ukuba zimbambise ngokuthetha, ukuze bamnikele elulawulweni nasegunyeni lerhuluneli." 
Luke20:21 Zambuza ke zisithi, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uthetha ufundise ngobulungisa, ungakhethi buso bamntu; usuka ufundise indlela kaThixo ngenene." 
Luke20:22 Kuvumelekile na ukuba simnike irhafu uKesare, akuvumelekile, sini na?" 
Luke20:23 Ebuqondile kakuhle ubuqhetseba bazo, wathi kuzo, Nindilingelani na?" 
Luke20:24 Ndiboniseni idenariyo. Inomfanekiso nombhalo kabani na?Ziphendule ke zathi, KaKesare." 
Luke20:25 Uthe ke yena kuzo, Nikelani kaloku izinto zikaKesare kuKesare; nezinto zikaThixo kuThixo." 
Luke20:26 Zakhohlwa ukumbambisa ngamazwi phambi kwabantu, zamangaliswa yimpendulo yakhe, zathi cwaka." 
Luke20:27 Kwafika ke kuye abathile bakubaSadusi, bona abo bakuphikayo ukuba kukho uvuko; bambuza," 
Luke20:28 besithi, Mfundisi, uMoses wasibhalela wathi, Ukuba ozalana nothile uthe wafa enomfazi, wafa ke lowo engenabantwana, maze ozalana naye amzeke umfazi lowo, amvelisele imbewu ozalana naye." 
Luke20:29 Ke bekukho abantu abasixhenxe bezalana; waza owokuqala wazeka umfazi, wafa engenabantwana." 
Luke20:30 Nowesibini wamzeka umfazi lowo, wafa naye engenabantwana." 
Luke20:31 Nowesithathu wamzeka; benjenjalo ke bosixhenxe, bafa bengashiyanga bantwana." 
Luke20:32 Emveni ke kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi lowo." 
Luke20:33 Eluvukweni ngoko, ungumfazi wawuphi na kubo? Kuba bosixhenxe bebenaye engumfazi." 
Luke20:34 Waphendula ke wathi kubo uYesu, Abeli phakade bayazeka, bayendiswa;" 
Luke20:35 ke bona abo kuthiwe bafanele ukufika kwelo phakade, nakukuvuka kwabafileyo, abazeki, abendiswa;" 
Luke20:36 kuba abasenakubuya bafe; kuba bengangezithunywa zezulu;kanjalo bangoonyana bakaThixo, bengabovuko njalo." 
Luke20:37 Ke kaloku, le ndawo yokuba abafileyo bayavuka, noMoses wayithi thupha kwindawo ethetha ngetyholo, xenikweni athi, INkosi inguThixo ka-Abraham, inguThixo kaIsake, inguThixo kaYakobi." 
Luke20:38 AkaThixo ke wabafileyo, ungowabaphilileyo; kuba bonke baphile ngaye." 
Luke20:39 Baphendula ke abathile bakubabhali, bathi, Mfundisi, utyaphile ukutsho." 
Luke20:40 Baye ke bengasenabuganga bakumbuza nento le. 
Luke20:41 Wathi ke kubo, Batsho ngani na ukuthi, uKristu ungunyana kaDavide?" 
Luke20:42 Kanti noDavide yena ngokwakhe uthi encwadini yeeNdumiso, Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam," 
Luke20:43 Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho. 
Luke20:44 UDavide ngoko umbiza ngokuthi, Nkosi; aze abe ke ngunyana wakhe ngani na?" 
Luke20:45 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba bayeva bonke abantu, wathi kubafundi bakhe," 
Luke20:46 Balumkeleni ababhali, abathandayo ukuhamba ngeengubo ezinde, bathande imibuliso ezindaweni zembutho, nezihlalo zobukhulu ezindlwini zesikhungu, nezilili zobukhulu ezidlweni;" 
Luke20:47 abadla izindlu zabahlolokazi, baze ngokunyhwalaza bathandaze uzungu. Abo baya kwamkela ugwebo olugqithiseleyo." 
Luke21:1 Ke kaloku akubheka, wazibona izityebi, ziphosa iminikelo yazo emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali." 
Luke21:2 Wabona ke mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu, ephosa apho iimalanana ezimbini." 
Luke21:3 Wathi, Inyaniso ndithi kuni, Lo mhlolokazi usweleyo uphose ngaphezu kwabo bonke;" 
Luke21:4 kuba bonke aba baphose eminikelweni kaThixo, bethabatha kwintabalala yabo; ukanti lo, ekusweleni kwakhe, uphose yonke impilo abenayo." 
Luke21:5 Ke kaloku, kwakubon ukuba abathile bayathetha ngayo itempile, ukuba ihonjiswe ngamatye amahle nangeminikelo, wathi," 
Luke21:6 Ezi zinto nizibona nje, kuya kufika imihla ekungayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa." 
Luke21:7 Bambuza ke besithi, Mfundisi, ziya kubakho nini na ke ezi zinto? Uya kuba yintoni na nomqondiso, xa ngaba ezi zinto ziza kubakho?" 
Luke21:8 Wathi ke yena, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa; kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi, banguye uKristu; ewe, ixesha lisondele; ngoko musani ukubalandela." 
Luke21:9 Xa nithe neva iimfazwe neziphithiphithi, musani ukunkwantya; kuba ezo zinto zimele ukuthi zihle kuqala; sona ke isiphelo asiyi kuba kwaoko." 
Luke21:10 Wandula wathi kubo, Uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani." 
Luke21:11 Kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba ezinkulu kwiindawo ngeendawo, neendlala, neendyikitya zokufa; kuya kubakho izinto ezoyikekayo, kwanemiqondiso emikhulu evela ezulwini." 
Luke21:12 Ngaphambili ke kwazo zonke ezo zinto, baya kunisa izandla, banitshutshise, beninikela ezindlwini zesikhungu nasezintolongweni, nisiwe phambi kookumkani neerhuluneli ngenxa yegama lam." 
Luke21:13 Oko ke kuya kuthi kube bubungqina kuni. 
Luke21:14 Kumiseni ngoko ezintliziyweni zenu, ukuba ningakucingi ngaphambili ukuziphendulela." 
Luke21:15 Kuba mna ndiya kuninika umlomo nobulumko, abangayi kuba nako ukubuphikisa nokumelana nabo, bonke abanichasileyo." 
Luke21:16 Ke kaloku niya kunikelwa nangabazali, nangabazalwana, nayimizalwane, nazizihlobo, kubekho nabababulalayo kuni;" 
Luke21:17 nithiywe ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam. 
Luke21:18 Akusayi kutshabalala nonwele olu entlokweni yenu. 
Luke21:19 Ekunyamezeleni kwenu, noyizuza imiphefumlo yenu." 
Luke21:20 Xa nithe nayibona iYerusalem irhawulwe yimikhosi, yazini oko ukuba kusondele ukuphanza kwayo." 
Luke21:21 Ngelo xa mabathi abakwelakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni, nabo baphakathi kwayo mabaphume bemke, nabo basemaphandleni mabangangeni kuyo." 
Luke21:22 Ngokuba yimihla yempindezelo leyo, ukuze kuzaliseke konke okubhaliweyo." 
Luke21:23 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla; kuba kuya kubakho ingxakeko enkulu phezu kwawo umhlaba, nengqumbo kwaba bantu;" 
Luke21:24 bawe ngohlangothi lwekrele, bathinjwe, basiwe kuzo zonke iintlanga, neYerusalem inyathelelwe phantsi ziintlanga, ade azaliseke amaxesha eentlanga." 
Luke21:25 Kuya kubakho imiqondiso elangeni nasenyangeni nasezinkwenkwezini; nasemhlabeni kubekho ukuxinezeleka kweentlanga, zithingaza; lugquma ulwandle namaza;" 
Luke21:26 abantu besifa kukoyika nakukulindela izinto ezilizelayo elimiweyo; kuba amandla ezulu aya kuzanyazanyiswa. 
Luke21:27 Baya kwandula ke ukumbona uNyana woMntu, esiza ngelifu, enamandla nobuqaqawuli obukhulu." 
Luke21:28 Ke kaloku, zakubon ukuba ezi zinto ziyaqala ukuhla, sukani nime, niziphakamise iintloko zenu, ngenxa yokuba iyasondela inkululeko yenu." 
Luke21:29 Wathetha umzekeliso kubo, wathi, Wukhangeleni umkhiwane nemithi yonke;" 
Luke21:30 xa iselithe yavelisa amagqabi, niyabona nazi ngokwenu ukuba ihlobo selikufuphi." 
Luke21:31 Kwangokunjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona ezi zinto zisihla, yazini ukuba bukufuphi ubukumkani bukaThixo." 
Luke21:32 Inene ndithi kuni, Asiyi kukha sidlule esi sizukulwana, zide zihle zonke ezi zinto." 
Luke21:33 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi; ke wona amazwi am akasayi kudlula. 
Luke21:34 Zilumkeleni ke, hleze zisindwe iintliziyo zenu kukuzingxala, nakukunxila, nangamaxhala obu bomi, ize loo mini inifikele ngebhaqo." 
Luke21:35 Kuba iya kubazela njengomgibe bonke abahleliyo phezu kwehlabathi lonke. 
Luke21:36 Phaphani ngoko, amaxesha onke nikhunga, ukuze kuthiwe nikufanele ukuzisaba zonke ezo zinto ziza kuhla, nokumiswa phambi koNyana woMntu." 
Luke21:37 Ke kaloku, emini ebefundisa etempileni; athi ngobusuku aphume, ayekulala entabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma." 
Luke21:38 Bonke ke abantu babesiza kuye kwakusasa etempileni, ukuba beve ukuthetha kwakhe." 
Luke22:1 Ke kaloku, wawusondela umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, ekuthiwa yipasika." 
Luke22:2 Baye ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumbulala, kuba bebesoyika abantu." 
Luke22:3 Wangena ke uSathana kuYuda, ogama limbi linguSikariyoti, ongowenani labalishumi elinababini." 
Luke22:4 Wemka, waya wathetha nababingeleli abakhulu nabaphathi betempile, ukuba angathini na ukumnikela kubo." 
Luke22:5 Bavuya, banqophisana naye ukumnika imali," 
Luke22:6 wabavumela, wamana efuna ithuba elimlungeleyo lokumnikela kubo, kungekho siphendu." 
Luke22:7 Wafika ke umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, ekwakumele ukuthi ngawo kubingwe imvana yepasika." 
Luke22:8 Wesusa uPetros noYohane, wathi, Hambani niye kusilungisela ipasika, ukuze sidle." 
Luke22:9 Bathe ke bona kuye, Ufuna ukuba siyilungise phi na?" 
Luke22:10 Uthe ke yena kubo, Yabonani, nakungena kuwo umzi lo, nohlangatyezwa ngumntu ethwele umphanda wamanzi; mlandeleni, niye endlwini angena kuyo." 
Luke22:11 Nothi kumninindlu, Uthi uMfundisi kuwe, Liphi na igumbi labahambi, apho ndingadlela khona ipasika nabafundi bam?" 
Luke22:12 Kwayena wonibonisa igumbi eliphezulu elikhulu, landlelwe;lungisani apho ke." 
Luke22:13 Bemka ke, bafumana kunjengoko ebetshilo kubo, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Luke22:14 Uthe ke lakufika ilixa, wahlala phantsi, nabapostile abalishumi elinababini kunye naye." 
Luke22:15 Wathi kubo, Asikuko nokuba ndinqwenile ukuyidla nani le pasika, ndingekabuva ubunzima." 
Luke22:16 Kuba ndithi kuni, Andiyi kubuya ndibe sadla kuyo, ide izaliseke ebukumkanini bukaThixo." 
Luke22:17 Wamkela indebe, wabulela, wathi, Yithabatheni, nabelane ngayo." 
Luke22:18 Kuba ndithi kuni, Andisayi kusela kwisiqhamo somdiliya, bude bufike ubukumkani bukaThixo." 
Luke22:19 Wathabatha isonka, wathi akubulela waqhekeza, wabanika, esithi, Ngumzimba wam lo, onikelwa ngenxa yenu; oku kwenzeleni ukundikhumbula." 
Luke22:20 Kwangokunjalo nayo indebe wayithabatha, kwakukhovwa ukudliwa, esithi, Le ndebe ingumnqophiso omtsha osegazini lam, eliphalalela nina." 
Luke22:21 Kodwa niyabona, isandla sondingcatshayo sinam etafileni apha." 
Luke22:22 UNyana woMntu okunene uyemka, njengoko kumisiweyo; kodwa ke, yeha, loo mntu angcatshwa nguye!" 
Luke22:23 Baqala bona ukubuzana phakathi kwabo, ukuba ingaba ke nguwuphi na kubo, oza kuyenza le nto." 
Luke22:24 Ke kaloku kwabakho nokubangisana phakathi kwabo, kokuthi, nguwuphi na kubo ekungathiwa ngomkhulu." 
Luke22:25 Uthe ke yena kubo, Ookumkani beentlanga bayazigagamela;kwanabo benza ngegunya kuzo, kuthiwa ngabancedi." 
Luke22:26 Ke nina ze ningabi njalo: omkhulu kuni, makabe njengomnci;nongumphathi makabe njengomlungiseleli." 
Luke22:27 Kuba nguwuphi na omkhulu: ngulowo uhleli esithebeni, ngulowo ulungiselelayo, kusini na? Asingulowo uhleli esithebeni na? Ke mna phakathi kwenu ndinjengomlungiseleli." 
Luke22:28 Nina ke ningabo basoloko behleli nam ekulingweni kwam. 
Luke22:29 Nam ndinimisela ubukumkani, njengokuba uBawo endimisele mna," 
Luke22:30 ukuze nidle, nisele, esithebeni sam ebukumkanini bam, nihlale ezitroneni, nigweba izizwe ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli." 
Luke22:31 Ithe ke iNkosi, Simon, Simon, uyabona, uSathana ubenibanga, ukuba anele njengengqolowa." 
Luke22:32 Ke mna ndikhungile ngawe, ukuba ukholo lwakho lungapheli;nawe ke, xa ubuye wabuya, uze ubazimase abazalwana bakho." 
Luke22:33 Wathi ke yena kuyo, Nkosi, sendikulungele ukuya nawe nasentolongweni, nasekufeni." 
Luke22:34 Ithe ke yona, Ndithi kuwe, Petros, ayisayi kulila namhlanje inkuku, ungekakhanyeli kathathu ukuba uyandazi." 
Luke22:35 Yathi kubo, Okuya ndanithuma ningenangxowa yamali, nangxowa yamphako, nazimbadada, khe naswela nto na? Bathi ke bona, Nento le." 
Luke22:36 Ithe ke kubo, Kungokunje, lowo unengxowa yemali makayithabathe, enjenjalo nonengxowa yomphako; nalowo usweleyo, makathengise ngengubo yakhe, athenge ikrele." 
Luke22:37 Kuba ndithi kuni, Oku kubhaliweyo kusamele ukufezeka kum, khona oku: Wabalwa nabachasi-mthetho; kuba kananjalo izinto ezingam zinemfezeko." 
Luke22:38 Bathi ke bona, Nkosi, uyabona, nanga amakrele emabini.Ithe ke yona kubo, Kwanele." 
Luke22:39 Uphumile ke, waya ngokwesiko lakhe eNtabeni yemiNquma, bamlandela ke nabafundi bakhe." 
Luke22:40 Efikile ke kuloo ndawo, wathi kubo, Thandazani, ningangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:41 Waziqhiwula yena kubo umgama ongangokugibisela ilitye, waguqa ngamadolo wathandaza," 
Luke22:42 esithi, Bawo, ukuba uyavuma, mayidlule le ndebe, kum;kodwa makungabi kukuthanda kwam, makube kokwakho okwenzekayo." 
Luke22:43 Kwabonakala ke kuye isithunywa, sivela ezulwini, simomeleza." 
Luke22:44 Uthe ke, eneminzunzu, kwaba kukhona athandaza enyamekile.Kwathi ke ukubila kwakhe kwanga kungamathontsi amakhulu egazi, esiwa emhlabeni." 
Luke22:45 Wavuka ekuthandazeni, weza kubafundi bakhe, wabafumana belele ngokuba buhlungu kwentliziyo." 
Luke22:46 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nilale? Vukani, nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:47 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba usathetha, kwathi gqi indimbane, waye nalowo kuthiwa nguYuda, omnye weshumi elinababini, ehamba phambi kwabo; wasondela kuYesu eza kumanga." 
Luke22:48 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Yuda, umngcatsha uNyana woMntu ngokumanga na?" 
Luke22:49 Ke kaloku abo babemphahlile, bakukubona okuza kuhla, bathi kuye, Nkosi, sixabele na ngekrele?" 
Luke22:50 Omnye kubo abo wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqamla indlebe yokunene." 
Luke22:51 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi, Yekani, kwanele. Wayichukumisa indlebe yakhe, wamphilisa." 
Luke22:52 Uthe ke uYesu kwabo babemfikele, ababingeleli abakhulu, nabaphathi betempile, namadoda amakhulu, Niphume ninamakrele neentonga na, nanga nize esihangeni?" 
Luke22:53 Bendinani imihla ngemihla etempileni, anolula zandla ngakum; kambe eli lilixa lenu, negunya lobumnyama." 
Luke22:54 Bambambile ke, bamrhola, bamsa endlwini yombingeleli omkhulu; waye ke uPetros elandela ekude." 
Luke22:55 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba babase umlilo phakathi kwentendelezo, behleli phantsi ndawonye, uthe wahlala uPetros phakathi kwabo." 
Luke22:56 Ke umkhonzazana othile umbonile ehleli ebandezini, wamjonga wathi, Nalo ube enaye." 
Luke22:57 Wamkhanyela ke yena, esithi, Nkazanandini, andimazi." 
Luke22:58 Kwakuba mzuzwana, omnye wambona wathi, Nawe ungowabo.Wathi ke uPetros, Mntundini, andinguye." 
Luke22:59 Kwakuba kuhambe ilixa ngathi linye, omnye uqinisele wathi, Inyaniso, nalo ubenaye; kuba ukwangowaseGalili." 
Luke22:60 Uthe ke uPetros, Mntundini, andiyazi into oyithethayo.Kuthe kwangoko, esathetha, yalila inkuku." 
Luke22:61 Yajika iNkosi, yondela kuPetros. Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi leNkosi, njengoko ibithe kuye, Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu." 
Luke22:62 Waza uPetros, ephume phandle, walila ngokukrakra." 
Luke22:63 Aye amadoda ambambileyo uYesu edlala ngaye, emtyakatya." 
Luke22:64 Athe akuba emgqubuthele, ambetha ebusweni, ambuza esithi, Profeta; ngubani na lo ukubethileyo?" 
Luke22:65 Aye emthethela nezinye izinto ezininzi, enyelisa." 
Luke22:66 Kuthe kwakusa, yahlanganisana intlanganiso yamadoda amakhulu abantu, nababingeleli abakhulu, kwanababhali, bamrholela entlanganisweni yabo yamatyala, besithi," 
Luke22:67 Ukuba unguye uKristu wena, sixelele. Uthe ke yena kubo, Ukuba ndithe ndanixelela, anisayi kukholwa;" 
Luke22:68 nokuba ke ndithe ndanibuza, anisayi kundiphendula, anisayi kundikhulula." 
Luke22:69 Ethabathela kweli xa, uNyana woMntu uya kuba ehleli ekunene kwamandla kaThixo." 
Luke22:70 Bathi ke bonke, Unguye na ke wena uNyana kaThixo? Uthe ke yena kubo, Nani nithi ndinguye." 
Luke22:71 Bathi ke bona, Sisabufunelani na ubungqina, kuba thina ngokwethu sivile ngomlomo wakhe." 
Luke23:1 Yesuka yonke inkitha yabo, yamrholela kuPilato." 
Luke23:2 Baqala ke ukummangalela, besithi, Simfumene lo elulahlekisa uhlanga, engavumi ukuba kunikelwe irhafu kuKesare, esithi, unguKristu uKumkani yena ngokwakhe." 
Luke23:3 UPilato wambuza ke, esithi, Unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda?Umphendule ke yena wathi, Nawe utsho." 
Luke23:4 Uthe ke uPilato kubabingeleli abakhulu nakwizihlwele, Andifumani tyala kulo mntu." 
Luke23:5 Kwaba kukhona ke bajokisayo, besithi, Uxhokonxa abantu, efundisa kulo lonke elakwaYuda, eqalele kwelaseGalili, wada wezisa apha." 
Luke23:6 Ke kaloku uPilato, akuva elaseGalili, wabuza ukuba umntu lo ngowaseGalili na." 
Luke23:7 Wathi, akuqonda ukuba ngowasebukhosini bukaHerode, wamthumela kuHerode, obe eseYerusalem naye ngaloo mihla." 
Luke23:8 Ke kaloku uHerode, akumbona uYesu, wavuya kunene; kuba bekumzuzu ethanda ukumbona, ngenxa yokuba ebeve kuthethwa izinto ezininzi ngaye; kanjalo wayethembe ukubona umqondiso usenziwa nguye." 
Luke23:9 Wayembuza ke amazwi amaninzi; ke yena akamphendulanga nento. 
Luke23:10 Bema ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, bemmangalela kabukhali." 
Luke23:11 UHerode ke, kwanempi yakhe, wamenza into engento, wadlala ngaye, wamthi wambu ngengubo eqaqambileyo, wamthumela kuPilato." 
Luke23:12 Ngaloo mini baba zizihlobo ke uPilato noHerode; kuba ngenxa engaphambili babenobutshaba phakathi kwabo. 
Luke23:13 Ke kaloku uPilato, ebabizele ndawonye ababingeleli abakhulu, nabaphathi bamaYuda, nabantu," 
Luke23:14 wathi kubo, Nizise kum lo mntu, ngathi ngophambukisa abantu; niyabona ke, ndimncinile mna emehlweni enu, andafumana tyala kulo mntu, kwezo zinto nimmangalele ngazo;" 
Luke23:15 kwanoHerode, kuba ndanithumela kuye. Nanku ke kungekho nto ifanelwe kukufa, yenziwe nguye." 
Luke23:16 Ndothi ke ngoko, ndakumbetha, ndimkhulule." 
Luke23:17 Ke kaloku, ubemelwe kukuthi abakhululele umbanjwa abe mnye, imithendeleko ngemithendeleko." 
Luke23:18 Bankqangaza ke ngokuphela kwabo, besithi, Msuse lo, usikhululele uBharabhas," 
Luke23:19 owayethe, ngenxa yesaqunge esithile, esibe senziwe phakathi komzi, kwanokubulala, waphoswa entolongweni." 
Luke23:20 Waphinda ngoko uPilato wathetha nabo, efuna ukumkhulula uYesu." 
Luke23:21 Ke bona bamana benkqangaza, besithi, Bethelela emnqamlezweni; mbethelele emnqamlezweni." 
Luke23:22 Uthe ke yena okwesithathu kubo, Kuba enze bubi buni na lo?Andifumananga tyala lakufa kuye; ndothi ngoko, ndakumbetha, ndimkhulule." 
Luke23:23 Bamxina ke bona ngezandi ezikhulu zamazwi, becela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni; aza ke eyisa amazwi abo, nawababingeleli abakhulu." 
Luke23:24 Usuke ke uPilato wagweba ngelithi, masenziwe isicelo sabo." 
Luke23:25 Wabakhululela ke owayethe ngenxa yesaqunge nokubulala waphoswa entolongweni, lowo babecela yena; wamnikela ekuthandeni kwabo uYesu." 
Luke23:26 Kuthe ke xa bamrholayo, babamba Simon uthile, waseKirene, obevela emaphandleni; bawubeka phezu kwakhe umnqamlezo, ukuba awuthwale emva koYesu." 
Luke23:27 Wayelandelwa ke yinkitha eninzi yabantu, neyabafazi ababemmbambazelela, bemlilela." 
Luke23:28 Wabaguqukela ke uYesu, wathi, Zintombi zaseYerusalem, musani ukundililela mna; kanye zilileleni nina, nabantwana benu;" 
Luke23:29 ngokuba, yabonani, kuza imihla abaya kuthi ngayo, Banoyolo abaziindlolo, nezizalo ezingazalanga, namabele anganyisanga." 
Luke23:30 Oko baya kuqala bathi ezintabeni, Siweleni; nasezindulini, Sigubungeleni." 
Luke23:31 Ngokuba ukuba benza ezi zinto komanzi umthi, kuya kuba njani na kowomileyo?" 
Luke23:32 Ke kaloku baberhola nabanye abangabambi, bebabini, bengabenzi bobubi, beya kubulawa kunye naye." 
Luke23:33 Bathi ke bakufika kwindawo le kuthiwa luKakayi, bambethelela emnqamlezweni khona apho, kwanabenzi bobubi abo, omnye ngasekunene, nomnye ngasekhohlo." 
Luke23:34 Wathi ke uYesu, Bawo, baxolele; kuba abayazi into abayenzayo. Bathi ke, besabelana ngeengubo zakhe, benza amaqashiso." 
Luke23:35 Baye bemi abantu bebonela. Babemsinekela ke nabaphathi bamaYuda kunye nabo, besithi, Wabasindisa abanye;makazisindise, ukuba lo unguye uKristu, umnyulwa kaThixo." 
Luke23:36 Ayedlala ngaye ke namasoldati, esiza asondeze iviniga kuye," 
Luke23:37 esithi, Ukuba wena unguye uKumkani wamaYuda, zisindise." 
Luke23:38 Kwaye ke kubhalwe nombhalo ngaphezu kwakhe, ngamagama esiGrike, nawesiRoma, nawesiHebhere, kwathiwa, lo nguKumkani wamaYuda." 
Luke23:39 Ke kaloku, omnye wabenzi bobubi ababexhonyiwe wayemnyelisa, esithi, Ukuba wena unguye uKristu, zisindise, nathi usisindise." 
Luke23:40 Waphendula ke omnye wamkhalimela, esithi, Akumoyiki na wena uThixo, ukwakoku kugwetywa nje?" 
Luke23:41 Thina ke okunene sigwetywe ngobulungisa, kuba samkela okufanele esakwenzayo; kodwa yena lo akenzanga nto ingendawo." 
Luke23:42 Wathi kuYesu, Uze undikhumbule, Nkosi, xa uthe weza usebukumkanini bakho." 
Luke23:43 UYesu wathi kuye, Inene, ndithi kuwe, Namhlanje uya kuba nam eParadisi." 
Luke23:44 Ke kaloku, kwakumalunga nelixa lesithandathu, kwaza kwakho ubumnyama phezu kwawo umhlaba uphela, kwada kwaba lilixa lesithoba." 
Luke23:45 Lenziwa mnyama ilanga; isikhuselo sendawo eyingcwele sakrazuka phakathi. 
Luke23:46 Wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu uYesu, wathi, Bawo, ndiyawunikela ezandleni zakho umoya wam. Uthe akuba etshilo, waphuma umphefumlo." 
Luke23:47 Ke kaloku umthetheli-khulu, akukubona okuhlileyo, wazukisa uThixo, esithi, Inene, lo mntu ubelilungisa." 
Luke23:48 Zathi zonke izihlwele ezabe zibuthelene kuloo mbonelo, zakukubona okuhlileyo, zabuya zibetha izifuba zazo." 
Luke23:49 Baye ke bonke abazana naye bemi kude, nabafazi ababelandelene naye, bevela kwelaseGalili, bezikhangela ezi zinto." 
Luke23:50 Kwaye ke kukho indoda egama linguYosefu, engumphakathi, indoda elungileyo, elilungisa" 
Luke23:51 (yona yayingavumelananga necebo labo, nesenzo sabo), eyaseArimatiya, umzi wamaYuda, eyayibulindile nayo ubukumkani bukaThixo;" 
Luke23:52 eyathi yona yeza kuPilato, yawucela umzimba kaYesu." 
Luke23:53 Yawuthula, yawusongela kwilinen entle; yawubeka engcwabeni elixholwe etyeni, ekungazanga kulale bani kulo." 
Luke23:54 Loo mhla wawungowokulungiselela, nesabatha ibisondele." 
Luke23:55 Ke kaloku nabafazi abalandelayo, abeza naye bephuma kwelaseGalili, balikhangela ingcwaba, nokubekwa komzimba wakhe." 
Luke23:56 Babuya ke, balungisa ubulawu namafutha aqholiweyo. Bathi ngesabatha baphumla ngokomthetho." 
Luke24:1 Ke kaloku, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, ngesifingo sokusa, beza engcwabeni, bephethe ubulawu ababebulungisile, kukho nabanye abafazi nabo." 
Luke24:2 Balifumana ke ilitye liqengqiwe, lesuka engcwabeni." 
Luke24:3 Bakuba bengenile, abawufumananga umzimba weNkosi uYesu." 
Luke24:4 Kwathi, ekukhohlweni kwabo yile nto, kwabonakala amadoda amabini, ebafikela, eneengubo ezibengezelayo." 
Luke24:5 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba bangenelwe kukoyika, beqondele emhlabeni, athi kubo, Yini na ukuba ophilileyo nimfune phakathi kwabafileyo?" 
Luke24:6 Akakho apha, uvukile; khumbulani ukuthetha kwakhe kuni, oko ebesekwelaseGalili," 
Luke24:7 esithi, UNyana woMntu umelwe kukuthi anikelwe ezandleni zabantu abangaboni, abethelelwe emnqamlezweni, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke." 
Luke24:8 Bawakhumbula ke amazwi akhe; 
Luke24:9 bebuyile engcwabeni, bazibika zonke ezo zinto kwabalishumi elinamnye, nakubo bonke abanye." 
Luke24:10 Baye ke bengooMariya waseMagadala, noYohana, noMariya kaYakobi, nabanye ababenabo, abazixelayo ezo zinto kubapostile." 
Luke24:11 Amazwi abo abonakala emehlweni abo engathi kukulavuza;abakholwa ngabo. 
Luke24:12 Esukile ke uPetros, wagidima waya engcwabeni; athi eqondele, azibone iilinen abesongelwe kuzo, zilele zodwa;wagoduka, emangalisiwe koko kuhlileyo." 
Luke24:13 Kwabonakala kusiya babini bakubo, kwangaloo mini, kumzana ozitadiya zimashumi mathandathu, umgama wawo neYerusalem, ogama liyiEmawusi." 
Luke24:14 Baye bona bexoxa bodwa ngazo zonke izinto ezibe zihlile. 
Luke24:15 Kwathi, ekuxoxeni kwabo, nasekubuzaneni kwabo, uYesu ngokwakhe wasondela wahamba nabo." 
Luke24:16 Kuloko amehlo abo ayebanjiwe, ukuba bangamazi." 
Luke24:17 Wathi ke kubo, Ziindawo zini na ezi nincokola ngazo, nihamba nibe nithe matshamatsha?" 
Luke24:18 Uphendule ke omnye, lo ugama linguKleyopa, wathi kuye, Umhambi eYerusalem apha nguwe wedwa na, ukuba ungazazi nje izinto ezihle khona ngazo ezi mini?" 
Luke24:19 Wathi kubo, Ziphi na? Bathi ke bona kuye, EzingoYesu waseNazarete, obeyindoda engumprofeti, enobunkunkqele ekwenzeni nasekuthetheni, phambi koThixo nabo bonke abantu;" 
Luke24:20 ukuba bathini na ababingeleli abakhulu nabaphathi bethu ukumnikela ukuba agwetywe afe, bambethelela nasemnqamlezweni." 
Luke24:21 Ke kaloku, thina besithembe ukuba nguye oza kukhulula uSirayeli ngentlawulelo; kunjalonje ke, namhla lusuku lwesithathu zenzekile ezo zinto." 
Luke24:22 Kananjalo abafazi abathile bethu, ababesengcwabeni kwakusasa, babethe sathi nqa." 
Luke24:23 Bathe bengawufumani umzimba wakhe, beza besithi, babone nombono wezithunywa zezulu, ezithi zona, uhleli." 
Luke24:24 Basuka nabathile ababenathi, baya engcwabeni, bafika kunjengoko babetshilo abafazi; ke yena abambonanga." 
Luke24:25 Waza yena wathi kubo, Oyi! basweli-kuqonda, bantliziyo zizeka kade ukukholwa kuko konke abakuthethayo abaprofeti!" 
Luke24:26 UKristu ubengamelwe na kukuthi abuve obu bunzima, aze angene eluzukweni lwakhe?" 
Luke24:27 Uqalele ke kuMoses nakubo bonke abaprofeti, wabachazela kuzo zonke izibhalo iindawo ezingaye." 
Luke24:28 Basondela kuloo mzana babesiya kuwo; wanga yena uyegqitha. 
Luke24:29 Besuka bamzama, besithi, Hlala nathi; ngokuba kuza kuhlwa, nemini iseyisangene. Wangena ukuba ahlale nabo." 
Luke24:30 Kwathi, ekungqengqeni kwakhe ngasesithebeni ndawonye nabo, wasithabatha isonka, wasikelela, waqhekeza, wabanika." 
Luke24:31 Avulwa ke amehlo abo, bamazi; wathi shwaka yena kubo." 
Luke24:32 Batshono ukuthi, Intliziyo yethu ibingavuthi na ngaphakathi kwethu, xa ebethetha nathi endleleni, naxa ebesityhilela izibhalo?" 
Luke24:33 Besuka kwangelo lixa, babuyela eYerusalem, babafumana abalishumi elinamnye, bequkene ndawonye nabo babenabo," 
Luke24:34 besithi, INkosi inene ivukile, yabonakala kuSimon." 
Luke24:35 Baye nabo bezichankcisa izinto zendlela, nokwazeka kwayo kubo ekuqhekezeni isonka." 
Luke24:36 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba bayazithetha ezo zinto, uYesu ngokwakhe wema phakathi kwabo, wathi kubo, Uxolo malube nani." 
Luke24:37 Besuka ke bankwantya, bangenelwa kukoyika, beba babone umshologu." 
Luke24:38 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nikhathazeke? Kungani na ke ukuba kunyuke izicamango ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Luke24:39 Khangelani izandla zam neenyawo zam, ngokuba ndim kanye;ndicofeni, nikhangele; ngokuba umshologu awunanyama namathambo, njengokuba nindibona ndinawo mna." 
Luke24:40 Utshilo, wababonisa izandla neenyawo zakhe." 
Luke24:41 Ke kaloku, bakubon ukuba abakakholwa, ngenxa yovuyo, bemangalisiwe, wathi kubo, Ninanto na idliwayo apha?" 
Luke24:42 Bamnika ke intwana yentlanzi eyosiweyo, neyenqatha lobusi;" 
Luke24:43 wathabatha, wadla emehlweni abo." 
Luke24:44 Uthe ke kubo, Ngawo la amazwi endawathethayo kuni ndisenani, okokuba zimelwe kukuzaliseka zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo ngam emthethweni kaMoses, nasebaprofetini, nasezindumisweni." 
Luke24:45 Wandula wayivula ingqiqo yabo, ukuze baziqonde izibhalo;" 
Luke24:46 wathi kubo, Kubhaliwe ngokunjalo, umelwe ngokunjalo uKristu kukuthi eve ubunzima, abuye avuke kwabafileyo ngomhla wesithathu;" 
Luke24:47 nokuba kuvakaliswe egameni lakhe inguquko noxolelo lwezono kuzo zonke iintlanga, kuqalelwa eYerusalem." 
Luke24:48 Nina ke ningamangqina ezi zinto. 
Luke24:49 Yabonani, mna ndilithumela kuni idinga likaBawo; ke nina hlalani kuwo umzi oyiYerusalem, nide nambathiswe amandla aphuma enyangweni." 
Luke24:50 Ke kaloku wabarholela ngaphandle, kwada kwaya eBhetani;waziphakamisa izandla zakhe, wabasikelela." 
Luke24:51 Kwathi, ekubasikeleleni kwakhe, wahluka kubo, wenyuswa wasiwa emazulwini." 
Luke24:52 Baza bona, bakuba bequbudile kuye, babuyela eYerusalem benovuyo olukhulu." 
Luke24:53 Bamana behleli etempileni, bedumisa, bebonga uThixo. Amen." 
John1:1 Ekuqalekeni ube ekho uLizwi, waye uLizwi ekuye uThixo, waye uLizwi enguThixo." 
John1:2 Yena lowo ebekho ekuqalekeni kuThixo. 
John1:3 Izinto zonke zabakho ngaye; engekho yena, akubangakho nanye into ethe yabakho." 
John1:4 Kuye kwakukho ubomi, baye ubomi obo bulukhanyiselo lwabantu." 
John1:5 Ukhanyiso ke olo lwabonakala ebumnyameni, basuka ubumnyama abaluqiqa." 
John1:6 Kwakho mntu uthunyiweyo evela kuThixo, ugama linguYohane." 
John1:7 Lowo weza kuba lingqina, ukuze angqine ngalo ukhanyiso, ukuze bonke bakholwe ngaye." 
John1:8 Yena lowo ubengelulo ukhanyiso; weza kungqina ngalo ukhanyiso. 
John1:9 Waye ke yena elukhanyiso oluyinyaniso, olubakhanyiselayo abantu bonke, esiza ehlabathini." 
John1:10 Ube esehlabathini ke; ihlabathi labakho ngaye, ihlabathi alimazanga." 
John1:11 Weza kokwakhe, baza abakhe abamvuma." 
John1:12 Ke bonke abamamkelayo wabanika igunya lokuba babe ngabantwana bakaThixo, abo ke bakholwayo kwigama lakhe;" 
John1:13 abangazalwanga ngagazi, nangakuthanda kwanyama, nangakuthanda kwandoda; bazalwa nguThixo." 
John1:14 ULizwi waba yinyama, wahlala phakathi kwethu, sabubona ubuqaqawuli bakhe, ubuqaqawuli kanye bowokuphela kwamzeleyo uYise, ezele lubabalo nayinyaniso." 
John1:15 Uthi uYohane angqine ngaye, adanduluke esithi, Ubenguye lo bendithetha yena, ndisithi, Lowo uzayo emva kwam, usuke waba phambi kwam, ngokuba waye etanci kum." 
John1:16 Enzalisekweni yakhe thina sonke samkela kwaubabalo phezu kobabalo. 
John1:17 Ngokuba umthetho wawiswa ngoMoses, lwabakho lona ubabalo nenyaniso ngoYesu Kristu." 
John1:18 Akukho namnye wakha wambona uThixo; uNyana okuphela kwamzeleyo, lowo usesifubeni sikaYise, nguye ocacise oko." 
John1:19 Nabu ke ubungqina bukaYohane, oko amaYuda athuma ababingeleli nabaLevi, bephuma eYerusalem, ukuze bambuze besithi, Wena ungubani na?" 
John1:20 Wavuma akakhanyela, wavuma esithi, Andinguye mna uKristu." 
John1:21 Bambuza, besithi, Untoni na ke? UnguEliya na? Athi, Andinguye. Unguye na umprofeti lowo? Wathi ukuphendula, Hayi." 
John1:22 Bathi ngoko kuye, Ungubani na ke? ukuze sibaphendule abo basithumileyo. Uthini na wena ngawe ngokwakho?" 
John1:23 Wathi, Mna ndililizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yityenenezeni indlela yeNkosi, njengoko watshoyo uIsaya umprofeti." 
John1:24 Baye abo babethunyiwe bengabakubo abaFarisi. 
John1:25 Bambuza bathi kuye, Ubhaptizelani na phofu, ukuba wena akunguye uKristu, noEliya, nomprofeti lowo?" 
John1:26 Wabaphendula uYohane, esithi, Mna ndibhaptiza ngamanzi; ke phakathi kwenu kumi eningamaziyo nina." 
John1:27 Yena ngothe, esiza emva kwam nje, wesuka waba phambi kwam, endingafanelekileyo mna ukuba ndinyobulule umtya wembadada yakhe." 
John1:28 Ezi zinto zenzeka eBhetabhara, phesheya kweYordan, apho uYohane wayebhaptiza khona." 
John1:29 Ngengomso uYohane umbona uYesu esiza kuye, athi, Nantso iMvana kaThixo, ethwala isuse isono sehlabathi." 
John1:30 Nguye lo ndathi ngaye mna, Emva kwam kuza indoda, esuke yaba phambi, kwam; ngokuba yayitanci kum." 
John1:31 Bendingayazi nam; le nto ndeza mna, ndibhaptiza ngamanzi, kukuze ibonakalaliswe kuSirayeli." 
John1:32 Wangqina uYohane, esithi, Ndimbonile uMoya, esihla njengehobe, ephuma ezulwini, wahlala phezu kwakhe." 
John1:33 Bendingamazi nam; owandithumayo ukubhaptiza ngamanzi, nguye owathi kum, Othe wambona uMoya esihla ahlale phezu kwakhe, nguye lowo ubhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele." 
John1:34 Nam ndibonile, ndingqinile, ukuba lo nguye uNyana kaThixo." 
John1:35 Ngengomso ubuye wema uYohane nababini kubafundi bakhe; 
John1:36 ondele kuYesu ehamba, uthi, Nantso iMvana kaThixo." 
John1:37 Bamva ethetha abafundi ababini, bamlandela uYesu." 
John1:38 Ke kaloku ujikile uYesu, ababone belandela, athi kubo, Nifuna ntoni na? Bathi ke bona kuye, Rabhi (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, mfundisi), uhlala phi na?" 
John1:39 Athi kubo, Yizani nibone. Beza, babona ke apho ahlala khona; bahlala naye loo mini; laye ke ilixa lingathi leleshumi." 
John1:40 YayinguAndreya, umzalwana kaSimon Petros, omnye wabo babini, babeve kuYohane, bamlandela." 
John1:41 Yena ufumana kuqala owakhe umzalwana, uSimon, athi kuye, Simfumene uMesiya (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, uKristu)." 
John1:42 Wamsa kuYesu; uthe ke uYesu wondela kuye, wathi, Wena unguSimon, unyana kaYona; kuya kuthiwa unguKefas (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, unguPetros)." 
John1:43 Ngengomso uYesu wafuna ukuphuma aye kwelaseGalili; ufumana uFilipu, athi kuye, Ndilandele." 
John1:44 Ke kaloku uFilipu ebengowaseBhetesayida, womzi wakuloAndreya noPetros." 
John1:45 UFilipu ufumana uNataniyeli, athi kuye, Lowo uMoses wabhala ngaye emthethweni, kwanabaprofeti, simfumene, uYesu unyana kaYosefu, lowo waseNazarete." 
John1:46 Wathi uNataniyeli kuye, Inako na into elungileyo ukuphuma eNazarete? Athi uFilipu kuye, Yiza ubone." 
John1:47 UYesu wambona uNataniyeli esiza kuye, athi ngaye, Nanko umSirayeli inyaniso, ekungekho nkohliso kuye." 
John1:48 Athi uNataniyeli kuye, Undazi ngani na? Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Phambi kokuba uFilipu akubize, uphantsi komkhiwane, ndandikubona." 
John1:49 Aphendule uNataniyeli athi kuye, Rabhi, wena unguye uNyana kaThixo, wena unguye uKumkani kaSirayeli." 
John1:50 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Ngokuba ndithe kuwe, Ndandikubona uphantsi komkhiwane, uyakholwa na? Uya kubona izinto ezingaphezulu kwezo." 
John1:51 Athi kuye, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Emveni koku niya kulibona izulu livulekile, nezithunywa zikaThixo zinyuka zisihla phezu koNyana woMntu." 
John2:1 Kuthe ngomhla wesithathu, kwabakho umsitho eKana yelaseGalili; waye unina kaYesu ekhona." 
John2:2 Wamenyelwa ke noYesu kwanabafundi bakhe emsithweni lowo. 
John2:3 Kuthe ke, bakuphelelwa yiwayini, wathi unina kaYesu kuye, Abanawayini." 
John2:4 Uthi uYesu kuye, Yintoni na enam nawe, mfazi? Alikafiki ilixa lam." 
John2:5 Athi unina kubalungiseleli, Asukuba ekuthetha kuni, kwenzeni." 
John2:6 Kwakumi khona ke imiphanda yamatye imithandathu, ngokwentlambululo yamaYuda, engena ngaminye iibhate ezimbini nantathu." 
John2:7 Athi kubo uYesu, Yizaliseni imiphanda ngamanzi. Bayizalisa ke, yada yee cike." 
John2:8 Athi kubo, Yikhani ngoku, nise kwinjoli. Besa ke." 
John2:9 Ke kaloku, yakuweva injoli amanzi abenziwe iwayini (yayingayazi apho ivela khona; kodwa abalungiseleli ababewakhile amanzi babesazi), yasuka injoli yabiza umyeni." 
John2:10 Yathi kuye, Wonke umntu ubeka kuqala iwayini emnandi, aze xa bathe basela bakholisa, andule ukubeka enganeno kwaleyo;wena uyibandezile iwayini emnandi, kwada kwangoku." 
John2:11 Oku kuqaleka kwemiqondiso wakwenza uYesu eKana yelaseGalili, walubonakalalisa Uzuko lwakhe; bakholwa kuye abafundi bakhe." 
John2:12 Emveni koko wehla waya eKapernahum, yena nonina, nabazalwana bakhe, nabafundi bakhe; bahlala khona iintsuku ezingeninzi." 
John2:13 Yayikufuphi ke ipasika yamaYuda; wenyuka uYesu waya eYerusalem. 
John2:14 Wabafumana etempileni ababethengisa ngeenkomo nezimvu namahobe, nabananisa ngemali behleli." 
John2:15 Wenza iziniya ngemizi, wabakhupha bonke etempileni, kwanezimvu neenkomo; wayiphalaza imali yabananisi, wazibhukuqa neetafile;" 
John2:16 wathi nakwabo bathengisa ngamahobe, Ezi zinto zisuseni apha; musani ukuyenza indlu kaBawo indlu yokuthengisela." 
John2:17 Bakhumbula ke abafundi bakhe, ukuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ukuzondelela indlu yakho kundidlile kanye." 
John2:18 Aphendula ke ngoko amaYuda, athi kuye, Usibonisa mqondiso mni na, uzenza nje ezi zinto?" 
John2:19 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Yichitheni le tempile, mna ke ndiya kuyivusa ngeentsuku ezintathu." 
John2:20 Athi ke ngoko amaYuda, Yayiminyaka imashumi mane anesithandathu nje isakhiwa le tempile, ke wena woyivusa ngeentsuku ezintathu na?" 
John2:21 Yena ke wayethetha ngetempile yomzimba wakhe. 
John2:22 Ke ngoko, xenikweni wavukayo kwabafileyo, bakhumbula abafundi bakhe, ukuba ebekuthethile oku kubo, bakholwa sisibhalo nalilizwi awalithethayo uYesu." 
John2:23 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba useYerusalem epasikeni, emthendelekweni, into eninzi yakholwa kulo igama lakhe, ibona imiqondiso yakhe abeyenza." 
John2:24 Ke yena uYesu akaziyekelanga kubo, ngenxa yokuba ebazi bonke;" 
John2:25 nangokuba bekungafuneki kuye, ukuba kungqine bani ngaye umntu, kuba ubekwazi yena okungaphakathi komntu." 
John3:1 Kwaye kukho ke umntu wakubaFarisi, ogama linguNikodemo, umphathi wamaYuda." 
John3:2 Lowo weza kuYesu ebusuku, wathi kuye, Rabhi, siyazi ukuba ungumfundisi ovela kuThixo; kuba akukho namnye unako ukuyenza le miqondiso uyenzayo wena, ukuba uThixo akanaye." 
John3:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Ukuba akathanga umntu azalwe ngokutsha, akanakububona ubukumkani bukaThixo." 
John3:4 Uthi uNikodemo kuye, Angathini na umntu ukuzalwa emdala?Angaba nako yini na ukungena okwesibini esizalweni sonina azalwe?" 
John3:5 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Ukuba umntu akathanga azalwe ngamanzi nanguMoya, akanakungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo." 
John3:6 Okuzelwe yinyama kuyinyama, nokuzelwe nguMoya kungumoya." 
John3:7 Musa ukumangaliswa kukuba ndithe kuwe, Nimelwe kukuthi nizalwe ngokutsha." 
John3:8 Umoya uphepheza apho uthanda khona, uze usive isandi sawo, kodwa ungawazi apho uvela khona, nalapho usinga khona:bakwanjalo bonke abazelwe nguMoya." 
John3:9 Waphendula uNikodemo wathi kuye, Zingathini na ezi zinto ukuba nokubakho?" 
John3:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Wena, ungumfundisi nje wakwaSirayeli, akuzazi na ezi zinto?" 
John3:11 Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Sithetha esikwaziyo, singqine esikubonileyo; nisuke ningabamkeli ubungqina bethu." 
John3:12 Ukuba ndinixelele izinto ezisemhlabeni, naza anakholwa, nothini na ukukholwa, ukuba ndithe ndanixelela izinto ezisemazulwini?" 
John3:13 Akukho namnye unyukileyo waya emazulwini, ngulowo yedwa wehla ephuma emazulwini, uNyana woMntu, lowo usemazulwini." 
John3:14 Njengokuba ke uMoses wayiphakamisayo inyoka entlango, umelwe kukuphakanyiswa ngokunjalo uNyana woMntu;" 
John3:15 ukuze bonke abakholwayo kuye bangatshabalali, koko babe nobomi obungunaphakade." 
John3:16 Kuba wenjenje uThixo ukulithanda kwakhe ihlabathi, ude wancama uNyana wakhe okuphela kwamzeleyo, ukuze bonke abakholwayo kuye bangatshabalali, koko babe nobomi obungunaphakade." 
John3:17 Kuba uThixo akamthumanga uNyana wakhe ehlabathini, ukuze aligwebe ihlabathi; wamthuma ukuze ihlabathi lisindiswe ngaye." 
John3:18 Lowo ukholwayo kuye, akagwetywa; ke lowo ungakholwayo, uselegwetyiwe, ngokuba engakholwanga kwigana loNyana okuphela kwamzeleyo uThixo." 
John3:19 Ke kaloku, umgwebo nguwo lo, ukuba ukhanyiso lufikile ehlabathini, baza abantu bathanda ubumnyama ngaphezu kokhanyiso; kuba imisebenzi yabo ingendawo." 
John3:20 Kuba bonke abenza okubi, bayaluthiya ukhanyiso, bangezi elukhanyisweni, ukuze imisebenzi yabo ingohlwaywa." 
John3:21 Ke lowo uyenzayo inyaniso uyeza elukhanyisweni, ukuze imisebenzi yakhe ibonakalaliswe; ngokuba isetyenzelwe kuThixo." 
John3:22 Emveni kwezi zinto, weza uYesu nabafundi bakhe emhlabeni wakwaYuda; wakha walibala khona apho nabo; wabhaptiza." 
John3:23 Waye ke noYohane ebhaptiza e-Enon, kufuphi neSalem, ngokuba amanzi abemaninzi khona apho; babesiza ke babhaptizwe." 
John3:24 Kuba ebengekaphoswa entolongweni uYohane. 
John3:25 Kwabakho ke imbuzwano kubafundi bakaYohane namaYuda ngokuhlanjululwa. 
John3:26 Beza kuYohane, bathi kuye, Rabhi, lowa wayenawe phesheya kweYordan, umngqinela, yabona, yena uyabhaptiza; beza kuye ke bonke." 
John3:27 Waphendula uYohane wathi, Akanakwamkela nto umntu, engayinikwanga ivela emazulwini." 
John3:28 Nani ngokwenu niyandingqinela ukuba ndathi, Andinguye uKristu mna; ndathi, Ndithunyiwe phambi kwakhe." 
John3:29 Lowo unomtshakazi ngumyeni; isihlobo ke somyeni, esimiyo simve, sivuya kunene ngenxa yezwi lomyeni; ngoko olu luvuyo lwam luzalisekile." 
John3:30 Yena umelwe kukuthi ande, ndinciphe ke mna." 
John3:31 Lowo uvela phezulu ungaphezu kwabo bonke; lowo uphuma emhlabeni ungowasemhlabeni, ethetha okwasemhlabeni. Lowo ungowasemazulwini ungaphezu kwabo bonke;" 
John3:32 akubonileyo ke wakuva, uyakungqina oko; akukho bani ubamkelayo ubungqina bakhe." 
John3:33 Lowo ubamkeleyo ubungqina bakhe, utywine waqinisela ukuthi, uThixo uyinyaniso;" 
John3:34 kuba lowo uthunywe nguThixo, uthetha amazwi kaThixo; kuba uThixo akamniki uMoya ngomlinganiselo." 
John3:35 UYise uyamthanda uNyana; uzinikele zonke izinto esandleni sakhe. 
John3:36 Lowo ukholwayo kuNyana, unobomi obungunaphakade; ke lowo ungamviyo uNyana, akayi kubona bomi; ingqumbo kaThixo ihleli phezu kwakhe." 
John4:1 Ithe ngoko iNkosi, yakwazi ukuba abaFarisi bavile ukuba uYesu ugqithisile kuYohane ngokwenza nokubhaptiza abafundi" 
John4:2 (nakubeni ke uYesu ngokwakhe ebengabhaptizi, bekubhaptiza abafundi bakhe)," 
John4:3 yalishiya yona elakwaYuda, yabuya yaya kwelaseGalili." 
John4:4 Ibimelwe ke kukuthi icande kwela maSamariya. 
John4:5 Ifike ke emzini welamaSamariya ekuthiwa yiSikare, kufuphi nomhlaba awathi uYakobi wawunika uYosefu unyana wakhe." 
John4:6 Ke kaloku umthombo kaYakobi ubukhona. Uthe ke ngoko uYesu, ebulalekile kukuhamba, wahlala enjalo phezu komthombo; ilixa ngathi belilelesithandathu." 
John4:7 Kufika intokazi yelamaSamariya, isiza kukha amanzi, athi uYesu kuyo, Ndiphe ndisele." 
John4:8 (Kuba abafundi bakhe bebemke baya kuthenga ukudla emzini apho.) 
John4:9 Ithi ngoko intokazi engumSamariyakazi kuye, Uthini na wena, ungumYuda nje, ukucela kum into eselwayo, ndingumSamariyakazi nje? Kuba akanabudlelane amaYuda namaSamariya." 
John4:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuyo, Ukuba ubusazi isipho sikaThixo, nokuba ngubani na lo uthi kuwe, Ndiphe ndisele: unge ucele kuye wena, wakupha amanzi aphilileyo." 
John4:11 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, akunanto yakukha, nequla linzulu; uwazuza phi na ke amanzi aphilileyo lawo?" 
John4:12 Wena umkhulu yini na kunobawo wethu uYakobi, owasinikayo iqula eli, wayesela kulo yena, nabantwana bakhe, nemfuyo yakhe?" 
John4:13 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuyo, Bonke abasela kula manzi, baya kubuya banxanwe;" 
John4:14 ke yena othe wasela kuwo amanzi, endiya kumpha wona mna, akasayi kuza anxanwe naphakade; aya kusuka amanzi, endiya kumpha wona, abe ngumthombo kuye wamanzi ampompozela ebomini obungunaphakade." 
John4:15 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, ndiphe loo manzi, ukuze ndinganxanwa, ndingezi nokuza kukha apha." 
John4:16 Athi uYesu kuyo, Hamba uye kubiza indoda yakho, uze apha." 
John4:17 Yaphendula intokazi yathi, Andinandoda. Athi uYesu kuyo, Ulungisile ukuthi, Andinandoda;" 
John4:18 kuba ubunamadoda amahlanu; onayo ngoku asindoda yakho, unyanisile ukutsho." 
John4:19 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, ndiyabona ukuba ungumprofeti wena." 
John4:20 Oobawo bethu babenqula kule ntaba; nina ke nithi iseYerusalem indawo apho abantu bamelwe kukunqula khona. 
John4:21 Athi uYesu kuyo, Ntokazindini, kholwa ndim, ukuba kuza ilixa, eningasayi kuthi nakule ntaba, naseYerusalem, nimnqule uBawo." 
John4:22 Nina ninqula eningakwaziyo; thina sinqula esikwaziyo;ngokuba usindiso luphuma kumaYuda. 
John4:23 Kodwa kuza ilixa, nangoku selikho, xa abanquli abayinyaniso baya kumnqula uBawo ngoMoya nangenyaniso; kuba uBawo ufuna abanjalo ukumnqula." 
John4:24 UThixo unguMoya; abo ke bamnqulayo bamelwe kukumnqula ngoMoya nangenyaniso. 
John4:25 Ithi intokazi kuye, Ndiyazi ukuba uMesiya uyeza, ekuthiwa nguKristu; xa athe weza yena, uya kusityela izinto zonke." 
John4:26 Athi uYesu kuyo, Mna ndithethayo nawe ndinguye." 
John4:27 Kwathi kwangoko bafika abafundi bakhe, bamangaliswa kukuba athethe nomntu oyinkazana; noko ke akubangakho namnye owathi.Ufuna ntoni na? nowathi, Yini na ukuba uthethe nayo?" 
John4:28 Yawushiya ngoko umphanda wayo intokazi, yemka yaya ekhaya;ithi ebantwini," 
John4:29 Yizani, nibone umntu ondixelele izinto zonke endakha ndazenza; lo akangebi nguye uKristu yini na?" 
John4:30 Baphuma ke ekhaya, baye besiza kuye." 
John4:31 Ke kaloku, kweso sithuba abafundi babemthandaza, besithi, Rabhi, yidla." 
John4:32 Uthe ke yena kubo, Mna ndinokudla endikudlayo, eningakwaziyo nina." 
John4:33 Babethetha bodwa ngoko abafundi, besithi, Ingaba kukho omziseleyo na ukudla?" 
John4:34 Athi uYesu kubo, Okwam ukudla kukuba ndenze ukuthanda kowandithumayo, ndiwufeze umsebenzi wakhe." 
John4:35 Anitsho na nina ukuthi, Iinyanga zisene, kuze kufike ukuvuna? Yabonani, ndithi kuni, Waphakamiseni amehlo enu, niwakhangele amasimi; ngokuba aselemhlophe ukuba kuvunwe." 
John4:36 Novunayo wamkela umvuzo, abuthele iziqhamo ebomini obungunaphakade, ukuze nalowo uhlwayelayo avuye, kunye nalowo uvunayo." 
John4:37 Kuba likule nto ilizwi eliyinyaniso, eli lithi, Omnye uyahlwayela, nomnye avune." 
John4:38 Mna ndanithuma ukuvuna oko ningabulalekanga kuko nina;abanye babulalekile, naza nangena nina ekubulalekeni kwabo." 
John4:39 Ke kaloku, kwakholwa kuye into eninzi yamaSamariya kuloo mzi, ngenxa yelizwi lentokazi leyo, yangqinayo yathi, Undityele izinto zonke endakha ndazenza." 
John4:40 Akufika ngoko kuye amaSamariya, amcela ukuba ahlale nawo;wahlala khona ke imihla emibini." 
John4:41 Into eninzi yakholwa ngakumbi ngenxa yelizwi lakhe. 
John4:42 Kanjalo babesithi kwintokazi leyo, Asisakholwa ngenxa yokuthetha kwakho, kuba sizivele thina ngokwethu, sazi ukuba, inyaniso, lo unguye uMsindisi wehlabathi, uKristu." 
John4:43 Ke kaloku, emveni kwemihla emibini leyo, waphuma khona, wemka waya kwelaseGalili." 
John4:44 Kuba uYesu ngokwakhe wangqina, ukuba umprofeti akanambeko kowabo." 
John4:45 Xenikweni ngoko wafikayo kwelaseGalili, bamamkela abaseGalili ababezibonile zonke izinto awazenzayo eYerusalem emthendelekweni; kuba babeyile nabo emthendelekweni." 
John4:46 Wabuya ngoko weza uYesu eKana yelaseGalili, apho amanzi ebewenze iwayini. Kwaye kukho igosa lakomkhulu elithile, elinyana wayesifa eKapernahum." 
John4:47 Lithe lakuva lona ukuba uYesu uphumile kwaYuda, wafika kwelaseGalili, laya kuye, lamcela ukuba ehle amphilise unyana walo, kuba ebeza kubhubha." 
John4:48 Wathi ngoko uYesu kulo, Ukuba anithanga nibone imiqondiso nemimangaliso, anisayi kukha nikholwe." 
John4:49 Lithi kuye igosa lakomkhulu, Nkosi, yihla, engekabhubhi umntwana wam." 
John4:50 Athi uYesu kulo, Hamba uhambe; unyana wakho uhleli.Wakholwa umntu lowo lilizwi awalithethayo uYesu kuye, wahamba ke." 
John4:51 Ke kaloku, akubon ukuba uselesihla, izicaka zakhe zamhlangabeza, zambikela zisithi, Umntwana wakho uhleli." 
John4:52 Wabuza ngoko kuzo ilixa aqale ukuchacha ngalo; zathi kuye, Izolo, ngelixa lesixhenxe, yamyeka icesina." 
John4:53 Wazi ngoko uyise, ukuba bekukwangelo lixa abethe ngalo uYesu kuye, Unyana wakho uhleli; wakholwa, yena nendlu yakhe iphela." 
John4:54 Lo mqondiso ke wesibini wawenza uYesu, eselephumile kwelakwaYuda, weza kwelaseGalili." 
John5:1 Emveni kwezi zinto, kwaye kukho umthendeleko wamaYuda, wenyuka uYesu waya eYerusalem." 
John5:2 Ke kaloku kukho eYerusalem apho, ngakwelezimvu isango, ichibi, ekuthiwa ukubizwa yiBhetesda ngesiHebhere, lineevaranda ezintlanu." 
John5:3 Kwakulele kuzo inkitha eninzi yemilwelwe: iimfama, iziqhwala, abome umzimba, belinde ukuzanyazanyiswa kwamanzi." 
John5:4 Kuba isithunywa sezulu ngaxesha lithile besisihla, singene echibini, siwagxobhagxobhe amanzi; lowo ngoko ubethe angene tanci emva kokugxojwagxojwa kwamanzi, ubephila nakusiphi na isifo abebanjwe siso." 
John5:5 Ke kaloku, bekukho mntu uthile apho, ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anesibhozo engumlwelwe." 
John5:6 UYesu embona lowo elele, esazi ukuba uselenexesha elikhulu enjalo, uthi kuye, Uyafuna na ukuba uphile?" 
John5:7 Waphendula umlwelwe wathi, Nkosi, andinamntu wokuthi, xa athe agxojwagxojwa amanzi, andiphose echibini. Kuthi ke, ndakubon ukuba mna ndiyaya, ndiphangelwe ngomnye ukuhla." 
John5:8 Athi uYesu kuye, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe." 
John5:9 Usuke kwaoko waphila umntu, waluthabatha ukhuko lwakhe, wahamba. Ke kaloku kwakuyisabatha loo mini." 
John5:10 Ayesithi ke amaYuda kophilisiweyo, Yisabatha; akuvumelekile ukuba uthwale ukhuko lwakho." 
John5:11 Wawaphendula wathi, Owandiphilisayo, nguye owathi kum, Thabatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe." 
John5:12 Ambuza ngoko athi, Ngubani na yena loo mntu uthe kuwe, Thabatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe?" 
John5:13 Ke kaloku, owaphiliswayo ebengazi ukuba ngubani na; kuba uYesu wathi shwaka, kwakubon ukuba kukho izihlwele kuloo ndawo." 
John5:14 Emveni kwezi zinto, uYesu umfumana etempileni, athi kuye, Uyabona, uphilile; musa ukuba sona, ukuze ungahlelwa yinto embi kunaleyo." 
John5:15 Wemka umntu lowo, waxela kumaYuda, ukuba nguYesu omenze waphila." 
John5:16 Ngenxa yoko ayemtshutshisa uYesu amaYuda, afuna ukumbulala;ngokuba wayesenza ezo zinto ngesabatha." 
John5:17 Wawaphendula ke uYesu wathi, UBawo uyasebenza kude kube ngoku, nam ndiyasebenza." 
John5:18 Ngenxa yoko ke ayefuna ngakumbi amaYuda ukumbulala; ngokuba ubengaphule sabatha yodwa, wayetshilo nokuthi, uThixo ngowakhe uYise, ezenza alingane noThixo." 
John5:19 Waphendula ngoko uYesu, wathi kuwo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, UNyana akanakwenza nto ngokwakhe, engathanga abone uYise eyenza; kuba izinto asukuba ezenza yena, ezo uyazenza uNyana kwangokunjalo;" 
John5:20 kuba uYise uyamthanda uNyana, ambonise izinto zonke azenzayo yena; uya kumbonisa nemisebenzi emikhulu kunale, ukuze nina nimangaliswe." 
John5:21 Kuba, njengoko uYise abavusayo abafileyo, abadlise ubomi, kwangokunjalo noNyana ubadlisa ubomi abo athandayo." 
John5:22 Kuba kananjalo uYise akagwebi namnye; uthe umgwebo wonke wawunikela kuNyana; 
John5:23 ukuze bonke bambeke uNyana, kwanjengoko bambekayo uYise.Lowo ungambekiyo uNyana, akambeki uYise owamthumayo." 
John5:24 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo ulivayo ilizwi lam, akholwe ngulowo wandithumayo, unobomi obungunaphakade; akezi ekugwetyweni; uphume ekufeni, wangena ebomini." 
John5:25 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Kuza ilixa, nangoku liselikho, xa abafileyo baya kuliva izwi loNyana kaThixo, bathi abalivileyo badle ubomi." 
John5:26 Kuba njengokuba uYise enabo ubomi kuye ngokwakhe, ngokunjalo wamnika noNyana ukuba abe nobomi kuye ngokwakhe." 
John5:27 Wamnika negunya lokugweba; ngokuba enguNyana woMntu. 
John5:28 Musani ukumangaliswa kuko oko; ngokuba kuza ilixa abaya kuthi ngalo bonke abasemangcwabeni balive ilizwi lakhe; 
John5:29 baphume ke: abo benza izinto ezilungileyo beze eluvukweni lobomi; nabo ke benza izinto ezimbi, beze eluvukweni lokugwetywa." 
John5:30 Mna ngokwam andinakwenza nto; njengoko ndivayo, ndigweba ngako, nomgwebo wam ububulungisa; ngokuba andifuni kuthanda kwam, ndifuna ukuthanda kukaBawo owandithumayo." 
John5:31 Ukuba mna ndisuka ndizingqinele, ubungqina bam abungebi yiyo inene." 
John5:32 Kukho omnye ongqinayo ngam; ndiyazi ke, ukuba buyinene ubungqina abungqinayo ngam." 
John5:33 Nina nithumele kuYohane; uyingqinele ke inyaniso. 
John5:34 Mna ke andamkeli bungqina mntwini; ndizithetha ezi zinto, ukuze nina nisindiswe." 
John5:35 Yena lowo ebesiso isibane esivuthayo, esikhanyayo; ke nina nathanda ukugcoba umzuzwana elukhanyweni lwakhe." 
John5:36 Mna ke ndinabo ubungqina obungaphezu kobukaYohane; kuba imisebenzi awandinikayo uBawo ukuba ndiyifeze, yona le misebenzi ndiyenzayo mna, iyangqina ngam, ukuba uBawo undithumile." 
John5:37 NoBawo owandithumayo, yena ungqinile ngam. Anizanga nilive izwi lakhe nakanye, niyibone nembonakalo yakhe." 
John5:38 Nezwi lakhe aninalo lihleli, kuni; ngokuba lowo uthunywe nguye, ningakholwa nguye nina." 
John5:39 Ziphengululeni izibhalo, ngokuba nina niba ninobomi obungunaphakade kuzo; zaye zona zingqina ngam." 
John5:40 Nibe ke nina ningathandi ukuza kum, ukuze nibe nobomi." 
John5:41 Andamkeli luzuko bantwini. 
John5:42 Ndiyanazi nina, ukuba uthando lukaThixo aninalo ngaphakathi kwenu." 
John5:43 Mna ndize egameni likaBawo, anindamkeli; ukuba omnye uthe weza ngelilelakhe igama, nomamkela yena." 
John5:44 Ningathini na ukuba nako ukukholwa, nisamkelela uzuko omnye komnye nje nina, nibe uzuko lona oluvela kuThixo yedwa ningalufuni?" 
John5:45 Ningabi ndiya kunimangalela kuBawo mna; ukho onimangalelayo, uMoses, lowo nimthembileyo nina." 
John5:46 Kuba, ukuba benikholiwe nguMoses, ninge nikholiwe ndim;kuba yena wabhala ngam." 
John5:47 Ke ukuba anikholwa zizibhalo zakhe yena, ningathini na ukukholwa ngawam amazwi?" 
John6:1 Emveni kwezi zinto, wemka uYesu, waya phesheya kolwandle lwaseGalili, lwaseTibheriya." 
John6:2 Wayelandelwa ke sisihlwele esikhulu, ngokuba babebona imiqondiso yakhe, abeyenza kwababesifa." 
John6:3 Ke kaloku, wenyuka uYesu waya entabeni, wahlala phantsi khona nabafundi bakhe." 
John6:4 Yaye ke ikufuphi ipasika, umthendeleko wamaYuda." 
John6:5 Ewaphakamisile ngoko uYesu amehlo akhe, ebone isihlwele esikhulu sisiza kuye, wathi kuFilipu, Sozithenga phi na izonka, ukuze badle aba?" 
John6:6 Ubesitsho ke emlinga; kuba ubeyazi yena into abeza kuyenza. 
John6:7 UFilipu wamphendula wathi, Izonka zeedenariyo ezimakhulu mabini azibanele, ukuze elowo athabathe intwana." 
John6:8 Athi kuye omnye kubafundi bakhe, uAndreya, umzalwana kaSimon Petros," 
John6:9 Kukho nkwenkwana apha, inezonka ezihlanu zerhasi neentlanzi ezimbini; kodwa ke ziyintoni na ezo kwabangakanana?" 
John6:10 Uthe ke uYesu, Bahlaliseni phantsi abantu. Kwaye ke kukho utyani obuninzi kuloo ndawo. Ahlala phantsi ngoko amadoda, engathi amawaka mahlanu inani." 
John6:11 Wazithabatha ke izonka uYesu, wathi akubulela wababela abafundi, bathi ke abafundi babela abo babehleli phantsi, kwaba kwanjalo nakwiintlanzi, ngangokuthanda kwabo." 
John6:12 Bakuhlutha ke, uthi kubafundi bakhe, Buthani amaqhekeza aseleyo, ukuze kungonakali nto." 
John6:13 Babutha ngoko, bazalisa izitya zalishumi elinazibini ngamaqhekeza abesele kubo ababedlile, ezonkeni ezihlanu zerhasi." 
John6:14 Ngoko abantu aba, bakuwubona umqondiso awawenzayo uYesu, bathi, Lo nguye inyaniso umprofeti lowo uzayo ehlabathini." 
John6:15 Uthe ngoko uYesu, esazi ukuba bahlalele ukuza kumbamba ngamandla, bamenze ukumkani, wabuya wemka, waya entabeni Yena yedwa." 
John6:16 Ke kaloku, kuthe kwakuhlwa, behla abafundi bakhe, baya elwandle." 
John6:17 Bengenile ke emkhombeni, baluwela ulwandle, besiya eKapernahum; kwakusekumnyama, waye uYesu engafikanga kubo." 
John6:18 Lwaye nolwandle lusilwa, kananjalo kuvuthuza umoya omkhulu." 
John6:19 Bakuba ngoko begweqile izitadiya ezingathi zimashumi mabini anazihlanu, nokuba mathathu, bambona uYesu ehamba phezu kolwandle, esiza kubo kufuphi nomkhombe; basuka boyika." 
John6:20 Athi ke yena kubo, Ndim; musani ukoyika." 
John6:21 Babethanda ngoko ukumamkelela emkhombeni; waza kwaoko umkhombe waba semhlabeni lowo babesiya kuwo. 
John6:22 Ngengomso indimbane leyo, ibimi phesheya kolwandle, yakuba ibonile ukuba akukho mkhonjana wumbi khona, ngulowo mnye wodwa babengene kuwo abafundi bakhe; nokuba uYesu akangenanga nabafundi bakhe emkhonjaneni lowo, bemke bodwa abafundi bakhe;" 
John6:23 nokuba kuze eminye imikhonjana ivela eTibheriya, kufuphi nendawo apho babedle isonka khona, yakuba ibulele iNkosi:" 
John6:24 xeshikweni ke indimbane yabonayo ukuba uYesu akakho apho nabafundi bakhe, besuka bangena nabo emikhombeni, beza eKapernahum, bemfuna uYesu." 
John6:25 Bathe bakumfumana phesheya kolwandle, bathi kuye, Rabhi, ufike nini na apha?" 
John6:26 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Anindifuni ngakuba nabona imiqondiso; nindifuna ngokuba nadla kwezaa zonka, nahlutha." 
John6:27 Musani ukusebenzela ukudla okutshabalalayo; sebenzelani ukudla okuhlala kuse ebomini obungunaphakade, aya kunipha kona uNyana woMntu; kuba uYise uThixo utywine waqinisela yena lowo." 
John6:28 Bathe ngoko kuye, Masenze ntoni na, ukuze sisebenze imisebenzi kaThixo?" 
John6:29 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo, Umsebenzi kaThixo nguwo lo, ukuba nikholwe kuye othunyiweyo nguye." 
John6:30 Bathi ngoko kuye, Wenza mqondiso mni na wena, ukuze sibone, sikholwe nguwe? Usebenza ntoni na?" 
John6:31 Oobawo bethu bona badla imana entlango, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Wabanika isonka siphuma ezulwini, ukuba badle sona." 
John6:32 Uthe ngoko uYesu kubo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, AsinguMoses oninike isonka esiphuma ezulwini; nguBawo oninika isonka esiphuma ezulwini, esiyinyaniso." 
John6:33 Kuba isonka sikaThixo sesi sehlayo ezulwini, silinike ubomi ihlabathi." 
John6:34 Bathi ke ngoko kuye, Nkosi, sinike eso sonka ngamaxa onke." 
John6:35 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Isonka sobomi esi ndim; lowo uzayo kum, akasayi kulamba; lowo ukholwayo kum, akasayi kunxanwa naphakade." 
John6:36 Senditshilo kuni ukuthi, Nindibonile nokundibona, anikholwa noko." 
John6:37 Konke andinikayo uBawo, kuya kuza kum; nozayo kum, andisayi kukha ndimlahlele phandle;" 
John6:38 ngokuba ndihle emazulwini, ndingaze kwenza ukuthanda kwam;ndize kwenza ukuthanda kwalowo wandithumayo." 
John6:39 Kuko ke oku ukuthanda kowandithumayo, kukaBawo: ukuba konke awandinikayo, ndingalahli nento kuko, ndikuvuse ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:40 Kuko ke oku ukuthanda kowandithumayo, ukuthi babe nobomi obungunaphakade bonke abambonayo uNyana, bakholwe kuye;ndandiya kubavusa mna ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:41 Ayemkrokrela ngoko amaYuda, ngokuba wathi, Ndim isonka, esi sehlayo emazulwini." 
John6:42 Ayesithi ke, Lo asinguye na kanene uYesu, unyana kaYosefu, esimaziyo thina uyise nonina? Angathini na ke ngoko yena ukuthi, Ndihle emazulwini?" 
John6:43 Waphendula ngoko UYesu wathi kubo, Musani ukukrokra ngaphakathi kwenu." 
John6:44 Akukho namnye unako ukuza kum, engathanga uBawo owandithumayo amtsale; ndaye mna ndiya kumvusa ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:45 Kubhaliwe ebaprofetini kwathiwa, Baye bonke beya kuba ngabafundiswa bakaThixo; bonke ngoko abathe beva kuBawo, bafunda kuye, bayeza kum." 
John6:46 Kungekuba kukho bani umbonileyo uBawo, ingenguye ovela kuThixo; nguye yedwa ombonileyo uBawo." 
John6:47 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo ukholwayo kum unobomi obungunaphakade." 
John6:48 Ndim isonka sobomi. 
John6:49 Ooyihlo bayidla imana leyo entlango, bafile noko." 
John6:50 Isonka sona esihla emazulwini sesi, athi ubani akusidla, angafi." 
John6:51 Ndim isonka esiphilileyo, esi sehlayo emazulwini. Ukuba ubani uthe wasidla esi sonka, wodla ubomi ngonaphakade; ke isonka endiya kumnika sona mna, siyinyama yam, endiya kuyinikela ubomi behlabathi." 
John6:52 Ngoko amaYuda ayesilwa phakathi kwawo, esithi, Angathini na lo ukusinika inyama yakhe siyidle?" 
John6:53 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuwo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba anithanga niyidle inyama yoNyana woMntu, nilisele igazi lakhe, aninabo ubomi kuni." 
John6:54 Lowo uyidlayo eyam inyama, alisele elam igazi, unobomi obungunaphakade; ndaye mna ndiya kumvusa ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:55 Kuba inyama yam ikukudla, inyaniso; negazi lam liluselo, inyaniso." 
John6:56 Lowo uyidlayo eyam inyama, alisele elam igazi, uhleli kum, nam ndihleli kuye." 
John6:57 Njengoko uBawo ophilileyo wandithumayo, ndibe nam ndiphilile ngenxa enoBawo, lowo undidlayo, kwayena uya kuphila ngam." 
John6:58 Siso eso isonka esehla emazulwini; kungenjengokuba ooyihlo bayidlayo imana, bafa noko. Lowo usidlayo esi sonka, uya kuphila ngonaphakade." 
John6:59 Ezi zinto wazithetha endlwini yesikhungu, efundisa eKapernahum." 
John6:60 Into eninzi ngoko kubafundi bakhe yakuva yathi, Lilizwi elinqabileyo eli; ngubani na onako ukuliva?" 
John6:61 Ke kaloku, esazi uYesu ngaphakathi kwakhe, ukuba bayakrokra lilo abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Kuyanikhubekisa na oku?" 
John6:62 Hi na ke, ukuba nithe nambona uNyana woMntu enyukela apho ebefudula ekhona?" 
John6:63 Ngumoya odlisa ubomi; inyama yona ayincedi lutho. Amazwi la ndiwathethayo kuni mna angumoya, abubomi." 
John6:64 Kukho abathile kuni abangakholwayo. Kuba ebesazi kwasekuqalekeni uYesu, ukuba ngoobani na ababengakholwa, nokuba ngubani na oya kumnikela." 
John6:65 Wayesithi, Kungenxa yoku ndatshoyo kuni ukuthi, Akukho namnye unako ukuza kum, ukuba akathanga akunikwe nguBawo." 
John6:66 Ngenxa yoko into eninzi yabafundi bakhe yabuya umva, ayaba sahamba naye." 
John6:67 Wathi ngoko uYesu kwabalishumi elinababini, Nani nifuna ukumka, yini na?" 
John6:68 Wamphendula ngoko uSimon Petros wathi, Nkosi, sosuka siye kubani na? Nguwe onamazwi obomi obungunaphakade." 
John6:69 Nathi sikholiwe, sazile, ukuba wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo ophilileyo." 
John6:70 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi, Andininyulanga na mna, nina shumi linababini? Ukanti omnye kuni ungumtyholi." 
John6:71 Wayethetha ke ngoYuda Sikariyoti kaSimon, kuba lowo ibinguye obeza kumngcatsha, engomnye weshumi elinababini." 
John7:1 Emveni kwezi zinto, wayehamba uYesu kwelaseGalili; kuba ebengathandi ukuhamba kwelakwaYuda; ngokuba amaYuda ebefuna ukumbulala." 
John7:2 Ke kaloku, wawukufuphi umthendeleko wamaYuda weminquba." 
John7:3 Bathi ngoko kuye abazalwana bakhe, Gqitha apha, uye kwelakwaYuda, ukuze nabafundi bakho bayibone imisebenzi yakho oyenzayo." 
John7:4 Kuba akukho namnye wenza into emfihlekweni, abe yena ngokwakhe efuna ukuba sekuhleni. Ukuba uyazenza ezi zinto, zibonakalise ngokwakho kwihlabathi." 
John7:5 Kuba nabazalwana bakhe bebengakholwa kuye. 
John7:6 Wathi ngoko uYesu kubo, Ixesha lam alikabikho, ke elenu ixesha lihlala lilungile." 
John7:7 Ihlabathi alinakunithiya nina; mna ke liyandithiya, ngokuba mna ndingqina ngalo, ukuba imisebenzi yalo ayindawo." 
John7:8 Nyukani nina, niye kulo mthendeleko; mna andikanyuki, ndiye kulo mthendeleko; ngokuba ixesha lam alikazaliseki." 
John7:9 Akuba ke ezithethile ezi zinto kubo, wahlala kwelaseGalili." 
John7:10 Ke, bakuba benyukile abazalwana bakhe, wenyuka naye, waya emthendelekweni, kungekhona ekuhleni, kubusithela." 
John7:11 Ayemfuna ngoko amaYuda emthendelekweni, esithi, Uphi na yena?" 
John7:12 Kwaye kukho ukukrokra okukhulu ngaye ebantwini; inxenye ibisithi, Ulungile; abanye ke besithi, Hayi, yena ulahlekisa uluntu olu." 
John7:13 Noko ke bekungekho namnye ubethetha ngaye ngokusekuhleni, ngenxa yokoyika amaYuda." 
John7:14 Ke kaloku, kwakubon ukuba sekuphakathi komthendeleko, wenyuka uYesu waya etempileni, wafundisa." 
John7:15 Ayemangaliswa amaYuda, esithi, Lo uyazi ngani na imfundo, engafundanga nje?" 
John7:16 Waphendula uYesu, wathi, Eyam imfundiso asiyam, yeyalowo wandithumayo." 
John7:17 Ukuba kukho othi afune ukukwenza ukuthanda kwakhe, woyazi imfundiso le: ukuba iphuma kuThixo, nokuba mna ndithetha okukokwam, kusini na." 
John7:18 Lowo uthetha okwakhe, ufuna olulolwakhe uzuko; ke lowo ufuna uzuko lowamthumayo, uyinene yena, akukho kungalungisi kuye." 
John7:19 Umthetho aniwunikelwanga na nguMoses? Kanti ke akukho namnye kuni uwugcinayo umthetho; yini na ukuba nifune ukundibulala? 
John7:20 Saphendula isihlwele sathi, Unedemon; ngubani na ofuna ukukubulala?" 
John7:21 Wapendula uYesu wathi kubo. Ndenze umsebenzi wamnye, namangaliswa ke nonke." 
John7:22 UMoses uninike ulwaluko ngenxa yoku, kungengenxa yokuba luphume kuMoses, kungenxa yokuba luphume kooyihlo. Niyamalusa ke umntu nangesabatha." 
John7:23 Ukuba umntu uyaluswa ngesabatha, ukuze ungaphulwa umthetho kaMoses, nindijalele na ngokuba ndiphilise umntu, waphila kwaphela, ngesabatha?" 
John7:24 Musani ukugweba ngokwembonakalo; gwebani ngomgwebo olungisayo. 
John7:25 Babesithi ngoko abathile kwabaseYerusalem, Asinguye na lo bafuna ukumbulala?" 
John7:26 Niyabona, uthetha ngokuphandle, abathethi nto kuye; bangaba kanti na ke bayazi okwenyaniso abaphathi, ukuba lo nguye uKristu okwenyaniso?" 
John7:27 Thina siyamazi lo apho avela khona; xa sukuba ke uKristu esiza, akukho namnye uya kumazi apho avela khona." 
John7:28 Wadanduluka ke ngoko uYesu, efundisa etempileni, wathi, Nina niyandazi, nikwazi nalapho ndivela khona; andizanga ngokwam; uyinyaniso owandithumayo, eningamaziyo nina." 
John7:29 Mna ke ndiyamazi; ngokuba ndivela kuye, waye yena endithumile." 
John7:30 Babefuna ngoko ukumbamba; kodwa akubangakho namnye umsa isandla, ngokuba ilixa lakhe belingekafiki." 
John7:31 Ke kaloku, into eninzi esihlweleni yakholwa kuye;yayisithi, UKristu, xa athe wafika, angaba uya kwenza imiqondiso emininzi na kunale ayenzileyo lo?" 
John7:32 AbaFarisi beva abantu bezikrokrela ezi zinto ngaye; baza abaFarisi nababingeleli abakhulu bathuma amadindala, ukuba ambambe." 
John7:33 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuwo, Liselixesha elifutshane endinani, ndize ndiye kowandithumayo." 
John7:34 Niya kundifuna, ningandifumani; nithi apho ndikhona mna, ningabi nakufika nina." 
John7:35 Athi ngoko amaYuda phakathi kwawo, Uza kuya phi na lo, le nto singayi kumfumana thina? Angaba uza kuya kwiintsali ezikumaGrike, afundise amaGrike, yini na?" 
John7:36 Liyintoni na eli lizwi alithethileyo, lithi, Niya kundifuna, ningandifumani; nithi apho ndikhona mna, ningabi nakufika nina?" 
John7:37 Ke kaloku, ngomhla wokugqibela, ongowona mkhulu womthendeleko, wema uYesu, wadanduluka esithi, Ukuba kukho othi anxanwe, makeze kum asele." 
John7:38 Lowo ukholwayo kum, njengoko satshoyo isibhalo, kuya kumpompoza imilambo yamanzi aphilileyo, iphuma embilinini wakhe." 
John7:39 Oku wakutsho ke ngaye uMoya, ababeza kumamkeliswa abo bakholwayo kuye; kuba ebengekamkelwa uMoya oyiNgcwele; ngokuba uYesu ebengekazukiswa." 
John7:40 Yaye ngoko into eninzi esihlweleni, yakuliva ilizwi elo, isithi, Lo nguye umprofeti, inyaniso. Babesithi abanye, Lo nguye uKristu." 
John7:41 Babesithi abanye, uKristu angavela kwelaseGalili yini na?" 
John7:42 Asitshongo na isibhalo ukuthi, uKristu uphuma embewini kaDavide, naseBhetelehem, umzana abekuwo uDavide?" 
John7:43 Ke ngoko sathi qheke kubini isihlwele ngenxa yakhe. 
John7:44 Inxenye ke kubo yayithanda ukumbamba, kodwa akubangakho namnye umsa izandla." 
John7:45 Afika ngoko amadindala kubabingeleli abakhulu nakubaFarisi;baza bona bathi kuwo, Kungani na ukuba ningezi naye?" 
John7:46 Aphendula amadindala athi, Akuzanga kuthethe mntu njengoko athetha ngako lo mntu." 
John7:47 Bawaphendula ngoko abaFarisi, bathi, Ningaba nilahlekisiwe nani na?" 
John7:48 Kubaphathi nakubaFarisi kungaba kukho mntu ukholiweyo kuye yini na? 
John7:49 Olu luntu lungawaziyo umthetho luqalekisiwe. 
John7:50 Uthe uNikodemo kubo (lowo wezayo kuye ebusuku, engomnye kwabo)," 
John7:51 Umthetho wethu uyamgweba yini na umntu, ukuba awuthanga uve kuye kuqala, uqonde into ayenzayo?" 
John7:52 Baphendula bathi kuye, Ungaba ungowelaseGalili nawe na?Phengulula ubone, ukuba akuveli mprofeti kwelaseGalili." 
John7:53 Walowo ke waya kweyakhe indlu. 
John8:1 UYesu ke yena waya eNtabeni yemiNquma. 
John8:2 Uthe ke ngesifingo wabuya wafika etempileni; baye bonke abantu besiza kuye; wahlala phantsi, wabafundisa." 
John8:3 Ababhali nabaFarisi bazisa ke kuye umfazi obanjwe ekrexeza;baza, bemmise phakathi," 
John8:4 bathi kuye, Mfundisi, lo mfazi wabanjwa ekrexeza, kanye kuloo ntlondi." 
John8:5 Ke kaloku, emthethweni uMoses wasimisela ukuthi, abanjalo mabagityiselwe ngamatye; uthini na ke wena?" 
John8:6 Babesitsho ke bemhenda, ukuze babe nokummangalela; kodwa uYesu, ethobe phantsi, wabhala ngomnwe emhlabeni." 
John8:7 Uthe ke bakumana bembuza, waphakama, wathi kubo, Ongenasono kuni makaqale amgibisele ngelitye." 
John8:8 Wabuya wathoba phantsi, wabhala emhlabeni." 
John8:9 Bathe ke bona bakuva, besohlwaywa naluvalo lwabo, baphuma ngabanye, beqalela kwabakhulu, kwada kwaba kwabokugqibela.Wasala yedwa uYesu, waye umfazi emi phakathi." 
John8:10 Ephakamile ke uYesu, akabona mntu kwakuphela ngumfazi lowo;wathi kuye, Mfazindini, baphi na abo bamangaleli bakho? Akukho ukugwebileyo na?" 
John8:11 Wathi ke yena, Noko amnye, Nkosi. Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Nam andikugwebi; hamba, ungabuye wone." 
John8:12 Wabuya ngoko uYesu wathetha kubo, esithi, Ndim ukhanyiselo lwehlabathi; lowo undilandelayo akasayi kuhamba ebumnyameni;yena uya kuba nalo ukhanyiso lobomi." 
John8:13 Bathe ngoko abaFarisi kuye, Wena uyazingqinela, ubungqina bakho abunene." 
John8:14 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Nokuba ndithi ndizingqinele mna ngokwam, buyinene ubungqina bam; ngokuba ndiyazi apho ndavela khona, nalapho ndiya khona; ke nina anazi apho ndivela khona, nalapho ndiya khona." 
John8:15 Nina nigweba ngokwenyama; mna andigwebi namnye. 
John8:16 Nokuba ndithi ndigwebe mna, umgwebo wam uyinene; ngokuba andindedwa, ndim noBawo owandithumayo." 
John8:17 Nasemthethweni wenu ke kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ubungqina babantu ababini buyinene." 
John8:18 Mna ndingulowo uzingqinelayo; uyandingqinela nalowo wandithumayo, uBawo." 
John8:19 Bathi ngoko kuye, Uphi na uYihlo? Waphendula uYesu, wathi, Anindazi mna; animazi noBawo. Ukuba benindazi mna, ninge nimazi noBawo." 
John8:20 Loo mazwi wawathetha uYesu ngasemkhumbini wokulondoloza imali, efundisa etempileni; akwabakho namnye umbambayo; ngokuba belingekafiki ilixa lakhe." 
John8:21 Wabuya ngoko uYesu wathi kubo, Ndiyemka mna; niya kundifuna, nifele esonweni senu; apho ndiya khona mna, aninako ukufika nina." 
John8:22 Abesithi ngoko amaYuda, Angaba uya kuzibulala na, le nto athi, Apho ndiya khona mna, aninako ukufika nina?" 
John8:23 Wathi kuwo, Nina ningabangaphantsi, mna ndingowangaphezulu;nina ningabeli hlabathi, mna andingoweli hlabathi." 
John8:24 Ndatsho ngoko kuni ukuthi, Niya kufela ezonweni zenu; kuba ekubeni nithe anakholwa ukuba ndinguye, niya kufela ezonweni zenu." 
John8:25 Abesithi ngoko kuye, Ungubani wena? Wathi kuwo uYesu, Ndiyiloo nto ndayixelayo kuni kwasekuqaleni." 
John8:26 Ndineendawo ezininzi zokuthetha nokugweba ngani; lowo wandithumayo uyinene; ndithi ke mna, izinto endazivayo kuye, ndithethe zona ezo kwihlabathi." 
John8:27 Akaqondanga ukuba ebethetha ngoYise kuwo. 
John8:28 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuwo, Xa nithe namphakamisa uNyana woMntu, noqonda oko ukuba ndinguye, nokuba andenzi nto ngokwam;ndisuka ndizithethe ezi zinto njengoko wandifundisayo uBawo." 
John8:29 Lowo wandithumayo unam; uBawo akandishiyanga ndedwa;ngokuba mna ndihleli ndizenza izinto ezikholekileyo kuye. 
John8:30 Akubon ukuba uyazithetha ezi zinto, bakholwa kuye, baba baninzi." 
John8:31 Ubesithi ngoko uYesu kuloo maYuda akholiweyo kuye, Ukuba nina nithe nahlala elizwini lam, noba ningabafundi bam, inyaniso." 
John8:32 Naniya kuyazi inyaniso, yaye inyaniso iya kunikhulula." 
John8:33 Amphendula, athi, Thina siyimbewu ka-Abraham; asizanga sibe sebukhobokeni nakubani; utsho ngani na wena ukuthi, Noba ngabakhululekileyo?" 
John8:34 Uwaphendule uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Bonke abenza isono bangamakhoboka esono." 
John8:35 Ikhoboka ke alihlali endlwini ngonaphakade; ngunyana ohlala ngonaphakade. 
John8:36 Ngoko ukuba uNyana uthe wanikhulula, noba nikhululekile inene." 
John8:37 Ndiyazi ukuba niyimbewu ka-Abraham; ke nifuna ukundibulala, ngokuba ilizwi lam lingenakuhamba kuni." 
John8:38 Mna ndithetha endikubonileyo kuBawo; nani ke nenza enikubonileyo kuyihlo. 
John8:39 Aphendula athi kuye, Ubawo thina nguAbraham. Athi kuwo uYesu, Ukuba nibe ningabantwana baka-Abraham, ninge niyenza imisebenzi ka-Abraham." 
John8:40 Kaloku ke, nifuna ukubulala mna, mntu unixelele inyaniso endayiva kuThixo; akakwenzanga oko uAbraham." 
John8:41 Nina nenza imisebenzi yooyihlo. Athi ngoko kuye, Thina asizelwe ngabuhenyu, sinaBawo mnye, uThixo." 
John8:42 Uthe ke uYesu kuwo, Ukuba uThixo ebenguYihlo, ninge nindithanda; kuba mna ndaphuma kuThixo, ndifikile ke; kuba andizanga ngokwam, nguye owandithumayo." 
John8:43 Kungani na ukuba ningayiqondi intetho yam? Kungokuba ningenakuliva ilizwi lam. 
John8:44 Nina ningaboyihlo uMtyholi, neenkanuko zoyihlo niyathanda ukuzenza. Yena waye esisibulala-mntu kwasekuqaleni; akemi enyanisweni, ngokuba akukho nyaniso kuye. Xa sukuba ethetha ubuxoki, uthetha okukokwakhe; ngokuba ulixoki, noyise wawo." 
John8:45 Mna ke, ngokuba ndithetha inyaniso, anikholwa ndim." 
John8:46 Ngubani na kuni ondohlwayayo ngenxa yesono? Ukuba ke ndithetha inyaniso, kungani na ukuba ningakholwa ndim?" 
John8:47 Lowo ungokaThixo, uyaweva amazwi kaThixo; ngenxa yoko aniweva nina, ngokuba ningengabakaThixo." 
John8:48 Aphendula ngoko amaYuda, athi kuye, Asilungisi na thina ukuthi ungumSamariya wena, nokuthi unedemon?" 
John8:49 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Andinademon mna; ndibeka uBawo;nina ke nibe nindihlaza." 
John8:50 Mna ke andifuni luzuko lwam; ukho lowo ufunayo, ugwebayo." 
John8:51 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba umntu uthe waligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kuza abone kufa naphakade." 
John8:52 Athi ngoko amaYuda kuye, Kukalokunje, siyazi ukuba unedemon. UAbraham wafa, nabo abaprofeti bafa, ube wena usithi, Ukuba umntu uthe waligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kuza eve kufa naphakade." 
John8:53 Wena ungaba umkhulu yini na kunobawo wethu uAbraham, yena wafayo? Nabaprofeti bafa; uzenza bani na wena?" 
John8:54 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Ukuba mna ndithi ndizizukise, uzuko lwam alungebi nto; nguBawo ondizukisayo; enithi nina nguThixo wenu." 
John8:55 Kanti ke animazanga, mna ke ndiyamazi. Ukuba ke ndithe andimazi, ndoba ndilixoki njengani; ndiyamazi, ndiligcinile nelizwi lakhe." 
John8:56 UAbraham, uyihlo, wagcobela ukuwubona umhla wam; wawubona, wavuya." 
John8:57 Athi ngoko amaYuda kuye, Ungekabi naminyaka imashumi mahlanu nje, umbonile na uAbraham?" 
John8:58 Wathi kuwo uYesu, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Engekabikho uAbraham, mna ndikho kade." 
John8:59 Ngoko achola amatye, ukuze amgibisele; wazimela ke uYesu, waphuma etempileni, wacanda phakathi kwawo; wenjenjalo ukudlula." 
John9:1 Uthe ke edlula, wabona umntu obe eyimfama kwasekuzalweni kwakhe." 
John9:2 Bambuza ke abafundi bakhe, besithi, Rabhi, ngubani na owonayo, ngulo, ngabazali bakhe, sini na, ukuze azalwe eyimfama nje?" 
John9:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Akone lo, akone bazali bakhe; uzelwe eyimfama ukuze ibonakalaliselwe kuye imisebenzi kaThixo." 
John9:4 Ndimelwe kukuyisebenza imisebenzi yowandithumayo, kusesemini; kuza ubusuku, xa kungekho namnye unako ukusebenza." 
John9:5 Xa ndisesehlabathini, ndilukhanyiselo lwehlabathi." 
John9:6 Akuba etshilo, watshica emhlabeni, wenza udaka ngamathe, wawaqaba amehlo emfama ngodaka olo." 
John9:7 Wathi kuyo, Yiya kuhlamba echibini leSilowa (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Thunyiwe). Yemka ngoko, yaya yahlamba, yeza ibona." 
John9:8 Baye ngoko abamelwane, nababembona ngaphambili ukuba uyimfama, besithi, Lo asinguye na obehleli engqiba?" 
John9:9 Abanye babesithi, Nguye lo; bambi ke bathi, ufana naye; yena ke wayesithi, Ndinguye." 
John9:10 Babesithi ngoko kuye, Atheni na ukuvuleka amehlo akho?" 
John9:11 Waphendula yena wathi, Umntu ekuthiwa nguYesu wenze udaka, waqaba amehlo am, wathi kum, Yiya echibini leSilowa, uhlambe;ndiyile ke ndahlamba, ndabuya ndibona." 
John9:12 Bathi ngoko kuye, Uphi na yena? Athi, Andazi." 
John9:13 Bamzisa kubaFarisi lowo ubefudula eyimfama. 
John9:14 Ke kaloku yaye iyisabatha, oko uYesu wenza udaka, wawavula amehlo akhe." 
John9:15 Babuya ngoko ke bambuza nabaFarisi, ukuba utheni na ukuba abuye abone. Wathi ke yena kubo, Ubeke udaka emehlweni am, ndaza ndahlamba; ndiyabona ke." 
John9:16 Babesithi ngoko abathile bakubaFarisi, Lo mntu asingowakwaThixo, ngokuba isabatha akayigcini. Babesithi abanye, Angathini na umntu ongumoni ukwenza imiqondiso engakanana? Bathi qheke kubini." 
John9:17 Babuya bathi kwimfama, Uthini na wena ngaye, ewavulile nje amehlo akho? Uthe ke yena, Ungumprofeti." 
John9:18 Akakholwa ngoko amaYuda ngaye, ukuba ebeyimfama, wabuye wabona, ada abiza abazali balowo ubuye wabona." 
John9:19 Aza ababuza esithi, Lo ngunyana wenu na, enithi nina wazalwa eyimfama? Phofu ubona ngani na ngoku?" 
John9:20 Abazali bakhe bawaphendula bathi, Siyazi ukuba lo ngunyana wethu, kwanokuba ke wazalwa eyimfama;" 
John9:21 le nto ke abonayo ngoku asazi, novule amehlo akhe, asimazi thina; uselemkhulu yena, buzani kuye, wozithethela." 
John9:22 Batsho abazali bakhe, ngokuba babesoyika amaYuda; kuba amaYuda abeselenqophisene ngokuthi, Ukuba uthe umntu wamvuma ukuba nguKristu, aze akhutshwe esikhungwini." 
John9:23 Kungenxa yoko abazali bakhe bathi, Uselemkhulu, buzani kuye." 
John9:24 Ambiza ngoko okwesibini umntu obeyimfama, athi kuye, Zukisa uThixo; siyazi thina ukuba lo mntu ungumoni." 
John9:25 Uphendule ngoko yena, wathi, Ukuba ungumoni, andazi; ndazi nto-nye, eyokuba ndibe ndiyimfama nje, ngoku ndiyabona." 
John9:26 Abuye ke athi kuye, Wenze ntoni na kuwe? utheni na ukuwavula amehlo akho?" 
John9:27 Wawaphendula wathi, Sendinixelele, naza aneva; nithandelani na ukubuya nive? Nani ningaba nithanda ukuba ngabafundi bakhe na?" 
John9:28 Amtshabhisa ngoko athi, Nguwe umfundi wakhe; ke thina singabafundi bakaMoses." 
John9:29 Siyazi thina, ukuba uThixo uthethile kuMoses; lo yena asimazi apho avela khona."
